Their exact numbers are classified but are known to **hover in the low hundreds**. These individuals are described as **living, breathing, precision instruments of war**, experts in the application of violence.

### A New War, A New Warrior

In **Medal of Honor™**, players will **step into the boots of these warriors** and utilize their unique skill sets. The game challenges players to fight a new enemy in the most **unforgiving and hostile conditions** of present-day Afghanistan. This is a new war, and the player embodies the **new warrior: Tier 1**.

### Fight Today's War

Experience a gritty combat campaign that combines the **surgical tactics of Tier 1 Operators** with the **sledgehammer force of Army Rangers**. This is your opportunity to engage in **today's war** with unparalleled authenticity.

### Unparalleled Authenticity and Online Multiplayer

The game delivers an **intense story with incredible pacing and variety**, set against the rugged Afghanistan landscape. This creates a shooter experience **only available from the storied Medal of Honor franchise**.

Furthermore, **online multiplayer has been redefined**. Developed by the world-class team at DICE, the makers of Battlefield Bad Company 2, this fast-paced combat offers the **perfect mix of tactical warfare and all-out action**.

**Online Disclaimer:** Acceptance of the EA End User License Agreement and PunkBuster End User License Agreement is required to play. Access to online features requires an EA account and registration with a single-use serial code. EA may retire online features after 30 days' notice posted on ea.com/service-updates. Software incorporates PunkBuster anti-cheat technology.

Name: Alpha Protocol™
Description:
Loyalty carries a price and no one knows this more than agent Michael Thorton. A talented young agent cast out by his government, Thorton is the only one with the information needed to stop an impending international catastrophe. To do so means he must cut himself off from the very people he is sworn to protect. As players determine how to accomplish different objectives, the decisions made and actions taken in each mission will ultimately transform the type of secret agent Michael Thorton will become. Every choice the player makes as Michael Thorton will carry consequences for his future and the fate of the world.

Name: BioShock™
Description:
BioShock is a shooter unlike any you've ever played, loaded with weapons and tactics never seen. You'll have a complete arsenal at your disposal from simple revolvers to grenade launchers and chemical throwers, but you'll also be forced to genetically modify your DNA to create an even more deadly weapon: you. Injectable plasmids give you super human powers: blast electrical currents into water to electrocute multiple enemies, or freeze them solid and obliterate them with the swing of a wrench. No encounter ever plays out the same, and no two gamers will play the game the same way. Biologically modify your body: send fire storming from your fingertips and unleash a swarm of killer hornets hatched from the veins in your arms. Hack devices and systems, upgrade your weapons and craft new ammo variants. Turn everything into a weapon: the environment, your body, fire and water, and even your worst enemies. Explore an incredible and unique art deco world hidden deep under the ocean. BioShock: Breaking the Mold A free download that takes an inside look at the art of BioShock. Download it now (75MB .PDF)

## Half-Life 2: Revolutionizing Immersive Gaming

The gaming world was transformed in 1998 by the release of *Half-Life*. This landmark title from Valve expertly merged intense action with a fluid, immersive story, garnering over 50 game-of-the-year awards and the esteemed title of Best PC Game Ever from PC Gamer. The franchise's impact was further underscored by over eight million retail units sold globally.

*Half-Life 2* builds upon this groundbreaking foundation, intensifying the suspense, challenge, and visceral thrill that defined the original. This sequel introduces a remarkable new level of realism and responsiveness, crafting a world where player actions profoundly affect their environment. Your presence is palpable, influencing everything from the physical surroundings to the behaviors and emotions of both allies and enemies.

Players once again embody research scientist Gordon Freeman. He returns to an Earth devastated by alien invaders, its resources depleted and its population diminished. Freeman faces the immense task of rescuing the world from the repercussions of his past actions at Black Mesa, carrying the hopes of many he cherishes.

The dynamic, real-time gameplay of *Half-Life 2* is driven by Valve's proprietary Source® engine. This advanced technology provides substantial improvements in several critical areas. According to Valve, the engine features an advanced facial animation system with 40 distinct muscles, enabling human characters to express a wide range of emotions and react with impressive fluidity. Furthermore, the physics engine ensures realistic object behavior, adhering to principles of mass, friction, gravity, and buoyancy. The shader-based renderer, comparable to technology used by Pixar, creates visually stunning and lifelike environments, setting a new standard for video games. The AI also demonstrates intelligent behavior, with characters assessing threats, navigating complex environments, and even improvising weapons.

Name: Half-Life
Description:
Named Game of the Year by over 50 publications, Valve's debut title blends action and adventure with award-winning technology to create a frighteningly realistic world where players must think to survive. Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

Name: Grand Theft Auto V
Description:
When a young street hustler, a retired bank robber and a terrifying psychopath find themselves entangled with some of the most frightening and deranged elements of the criminal underworld, the U.S. government and the entertainment industry, they must pull off a series of dangerous heists to survive in a ruthless city in which they can trust nobody, least of all each other. Grand Theft Auto V for PC offers players the option to explore the award-winning world of Los Santos and Blaine County in resolutions of up to 4k and beyond, as well as the chance to experience the game running at 60 frames per second. The game offers players a huge range of PC-specific customization options, including over 25 separate configurable settings for texture quality, shaders, tessellation, anti-aliasing and more, as well as support and extensive customization for mouse and keyboard controls. Additional options include a population density slider to control car and pedestrian traffic, as well as dual and triple monitor support, 3D compatibility, and plug-and-play controller support. Grand Theft Auto V for PC also includes Grand Theft Auto Online, with support for 30 players and two spectators. Grand Theft Auto Online for PC will include all existing gameplay upgrades and Rockstar-created content released since the launch of Grand Theft Auto Online, including Heists and Adversary modes. The PC version of Grand Theft Auto V and Grand Theft Auto Online features First Person Mode, giving players the chance to explore the incredibly detailed world of Los Santos and Blaine County in an entirely new way. Grand Theft Auto V for PC also brings the debut of the Rockstar Editor, a powerful suite of creative tools to quickly and easily capture, edit and share game footage from within Grand Theft Auto V and Grand Theft Auto Online. The Rockstar Editor’s Director Mode allows players the ability to stage their own scenes using prominent story characters, pedestrians, and even animals to bring their vision to life. Along with advanced camera manipulation and editing effects including fast and slow motion, and an array of camera filters, players can add their own music using songs from GTAV radio stations, or dynamically control the intensity of the game’s score. Completed videos can be uploaded directly from the Rockstar Editor to YouTube and the Rockstar Games Social Club for easy sharing. Soundtrack artists The Alchemist and Oh No return as hosts of the new radio station, The Lab FM. The station features new and exclusive music from the production duo based on and inspired by the game’s original soundtrack. Collaborating guest artists include Earl Sweatshirt, Freddie Gibbs, Little Dragon, Killer Mike, Sam Herring from Future Islands, and more. Players can also discover Los Santos and Blaine County while enjoying their own music through Self Radio, a new radio station that will host player-created custom soundtracks. Special access content requires Rockstar Games Social Club account. Visit for details.

Portal 2 builds upon the critically acclaimed foundation of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry awards and cultivated a dedicated fanbase. This highly anticipated sequel expands on the innovative gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable soundtrack that defined the original.

The single-player experience in Portal 2 introduces players to a vibrant new cast of characters, a variety of novel puzzle mechanics, and an expanded array of challenging test chambers. Players will venture into previously unexplored sections of the Aperture Science Laboratories and reconnect with GLaDOS, the famously unpredictable AI who previously guided them. According to the developers, the single-player campaign is designed to offer next-generation gameplay and a deeply engaging story.

Furthermore, Portal 2 features a robust two-player cooperative mode. This mode boasts its own distinct campaign, complete with a unique storyline, specialized test chambers, and two new player characters. This cooperative element necessitates a fundamental shift in how players approach puzzles, requiring not only synchronized actions but also collaborative thinking. As noted in game reviews, this new mode challenges players to rethink their understanding of portal mechanics.

The game also incorporates advanced physics, enabling the creation of a wide spectrum of intriguing challenges. This design philosophy aims to deliver a larger game experience without an increase in difficulty. The original Portal was widely recognized, with over 30 publications naming it Game of the Year in 2007. Portal 2 will also include editing tools, allowing players to create and share their own custom content. The game also features original music to enhance the player experience.

Portal 2, the highly anticipated sequel to the critically acclaimed original, builds upon the groundbreaking success that earned it over 70 industry accolades and a devoted cult following. This innovative title masterfully expands on the first game's celebrated formula, delivering an even more engaging gameplay experience, a compelling narrative, and memorable music.

The single-player campaign in Portal 2 immerses players in a vibrant new world, introducing a fresh cast of characters, a variety of novel puzzle mechanics, and an expanded array of challenging test chambers. According to Valve, the game's developers, players will venture into previously unexplored sections of the Aperture Science Laboratories. A central element of this single-player journey is the return of GLaDOS, the famously unpredictable and occasionally homicidal artificial intelligence who guided players in the first game.

Beyond its robust single-player offering, Portal 2 also features a distinct two-player cooperative mode, presenting a completely separate campaign. This cooperative mode boasts its own unique storyline, specialized test chambers, and introduces two entirely new player characters. As noted by critics, this mode fundamentally alters the player's understanding of portal mechanics, demanding not only cooperative action but also a new level of cooperative thinking to overcome its intricate challenges.

Key product features of Portal 2 include:

*   **Extensive Single-Player Campaign:** This mode delivers next-generation gameplay and a deeply immersive narrative, as highlighted by numerous reviews.
*   **Complete Two-Person Co-op:** A dedicated multiplayer experience featuring its own unique story, characters, and gameplay mechanics, offering a fresh perspective on the Portal universe.
*   **Advanced Physics Engine:** This allows for the creation of a wide spectrum of inventive challenges, resulting in a larger, yet still accessible, game experience, a testament to Valve's design philosophy.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** A new collection of music designed to enhance the game's atmosphere, contributing to the overall immersive quality.
*   **Massive Sequel:** The original Portal was widely recognized, with over 30 publications worldwide naming it Game of the Year for 2007, underscoring the high expectations for its successor.
*   **Included Editing Tools:** Portal 2 will come with its own set of editing tools, empowering players to create and share their own test chambers, fostering a vibrant community of creators.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

## Mass Effect 2: Facing a New Galactic Threat with an Unlikely Alliance

Two years after Commander Shepard's decisive victory against the Reapers, a new and terrifying danger has emerged. Human colonies situated on the fringes of the galaxy are vanishing without a trace. To confront this escalating crisis, Shepard is compelled to forge an alliance with Cerberus, a clandestine organization dedicated to human supremacy. This partnership, though controversial, is deemed essential to combat the mysterious enemy known as The Collectors.

The mission ahead is fraught with peril. Shepard's primary objective is to assemble a team comprised of the galaxy's most skilled individuals and command the most technologically advanced vessel ever constructed. The success of this specialized crew is paramount; their unique abilities and unwavering loyalty will ultimately determine the fate of the mission and, potentially, the galaxy itself. As noted by game critics, the emphasis on building and maintaining crew allegiance is a cornerstone of the Mass Effect experience, directly impacting mission outcomes.

Mass Effect 2 significantly refines the series' acclaimed dialogue system, enhancing player immersion. A more dynamic camera now closely follows characters during conversations, contributing to a cinematic and dramatic presentation. Crucially, Shepard possesses the ability to interject at pivotal moments, allowing players to actively shape the narrative and influence the success or failure of critical objectives. Furthermore, the game offers expanded character customization options, enabling players to meticulously design their Commander Shepard, from physical appearance and sex to their skills and personality traits. The combat system has also seen substantial upgrades, providing players with greater strategic depth. Players can now target enemy weak points and dismember opponents with an array of weaponry. Ultimately, the outcome of battles against The Collectors hinges on the player's tactical decisions and the preparedness of their chosen team. This focus on player agency, where choices have tangible consequences, is a hallmark of BioWare's storytelling. The game's engaging experience is further bolstered by its impressive visuals and the refined dialogue system, all contributing to a unique and memorable narrative. The third-person shooting action has been significantly improved with numerous upgrades, making combat more thrilling and responsive.

***

**Online Access Note:** To access online features, an EA Account, a valid serial code, internet access, and agreement to the End User License Agreement are required. Electronic Arts reserves the right to discontinue online features with 30 days' notice.

## Explore the Vast World of The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion - Game of the Year Edition Deluxe

The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe offers a complete role-playing adventure. This edition immerses players in a large, dynamic world where they can choose to follow the main quest or explore countless other adventures.

Oblivion is known for its open-ended gameplay and impressive visuals. Players have the freedom to create and play as any character they can imagine, from a warrior to an assassin or a mage. The game's first-person combat and magic systems are designed for an engaging experience. A notable innovation is the Radiant AI system, which gives NPCs realistic schedules and the ability to make independent decisions based on their environment. NPCs engage in daily routines, contributing to a believable world.

This edition includes two major expansions. "Knights of the Nine" tasks players with restoring a legendary order through a quest across Cyrodiil, introducing new dungeons and characters. The "Shivering Isles" expansion takes players to a realm shaped by the Daedric Prince Sheogorath. This world is divided into Mania and Dementia, offering a unique experience with new enemies like insects, Flesh Atronachs, Shambles, and Grummites.

The English-only Deluxe version adds a substantial collection of downloadable content. This includes the "Fighter's Stronghold Expansion," allowing players to live as a noble warrior in a castle; "Spell Tome Treasures" with new spells; and "Vile Lair," an underwater sanctuary. Players can also acquire Mehrune's Razor, reclaim a pirate's ship in "The Thieves Den," and explore Frostcrag Spire in the "Wizard's Tower" content. Additionally, the "Orrery" content lets players reconstruct the Orrery to unlock secrets within the Mages Guild, and the "Horse Armor Pack" provides armor for your horse. Recognized as the Best Game of 2006 by critics, this Deluxe Edition provides the definitive Oblivion experience.

Name: BioShock Infinite
Description:
Indebted to the wrong people, with his life on the line, veteran of the U.S. Cavalry and now hired gun, Booker DeWitt has only one opportunity to wipe his slate clean. He must rescue Elizabeth, a mysterious girl imprisoned since childhood and locked up in the flying city of Columbia. Forced to trust one another, Booker and Elizabeth form a powerful bond during their daring escape. Together, they learn to harness an expanding arsenal of weapons and abilities, as they fight on zeppelins in the clouds, along high-speed Sky-Lines, and down in the streets of Columbia, all while surviving the threats of the air-city and uncovering its dark secret. Key Features The City in the Sky – Leave the depths of Rapture to soar among the clouds of Columbia. A technological marvel, the flying city is a beautiful and vibrant world that holds a very dark secret. Unlikely Mission – Set in 1912, hired gun Booker DeWitt must rescue a mysterious girl from the sky-city of Columbia or never leave it alive. Whip, Zip, and Kill – Turn the city’s Sky-Lines into weaponized roller coasters as you zip through the flying city and dish out fatal hands-on punishment. Tear Through Time – Open Tears in time and space to shape the battlefield and turn the tide in combat by pulling weapons, turrets, and other resources out of thin air. Vigorous Powers – Throw explosive fireballs, shoot lightning, and release murders of crows as devastatingly powerful Vigors surge through your body to be unleashed against all that oppose you. Custom Combat Experience – With deadly weapons in one hand, powerful Vigors in the other, and the ability to open Tears in time and space, fight your own way through the floating city of Columbia to rescue Elizabeth and reach freedom. 1999 Mode – Upon finishing BioShock Infinite, the player can unlock a game mode called “1999 Mode” that gives experienced players a taste of the kind of design and balance that hardcore gamers enjoyed back in the 20th century.

Name: Slybots: Frantic Zone
Description:
Following a “Fatal Exception Error”, four little all-purpose robots have been considered faulty and have been marked as out-of-order. They get crazy and start fighting for their survival. Take their control in the frantic zone and leverage 4 unique stealth mechanics to catch your sly foes off-guard. Don’t be afraid to use dirty tricks to win amazing 3-minute matches across different game modes, proving that you don’t belong to the e-waste dump. Slybots: Frantic Zone is a local multiplayer dual-stick shooter: all players are looking at the same screen, but there are things that only one of them knows... Master the art of camouflage and enjoy the adrenalin rush of the most frantic zone you’ve ever seen. Features List Local multiplayer with hectic 3-minute matches Single-player challenges to hone your skills Different game modes: Deathmatch, Capture the Battery, Endless Tight controls for the characters, physics-based mayhem on the environment! 4 ingenious camouflaging mechanics, which can be combined Dozens of scenarios tailored for the stealth mechanics Electrifying soundtrack by composer Joakim Karlberg

## Conduct DELUXE!: Your Explosive Railway Adventure Awaits

Embark on an addictive and challenging railway adventure with **Conduct DELUXE!** This game puts you in the conductor's seat, tasked with safely transporting passengers through a stunning low-poly world against the clock.

### Master the Tracks

The core gameplay focuses on commanding trains, switching tracks, and meticulously avoiding collisions. As you progress, your railroad network will expand across diverse regions, each with unique styles, captivating music, and distinct challenges.

### Navigate Diverse Environments

Prepare for a serious test of strategy and reflexes. Manage a growing fleet of trains across various terrains, including icy landscapes, scorching deserts, lush tropical islands, and bustling city metros. The game even hints at lunar excursions! The puzzles are designed to be seriously challenging, requiring both dexterity and wit.

### Unleash Your Creativity

Conduct DELUXE! empowers you with an intuitive Level Editor to design and build your own railroad puzzles. Craft challenges for friends or the wider community. As you advance, unlock more components for increasingly complex creations.

### Expand Your Fleet and Earn Recognition

Progress through the game to unlock new trains and earn prestigious awards. Watch your company headquarters grow and take pride in your accomplishments.

### Drive Iconic Locomotives

The game features a collection of trains, including historically accurate models like the French TGV and Japanese Shinkansen, alongside some more whimsical, less accurate designs.

### Key Features:

*   **Beautiful Low-Poly 3D Worlds**
*   **Simple, Intuitive Gameplay**
*   **Passenger Transport & Region Unlocks**
*   **Build Your Own Worlds with the Level Editor**
*   **Unlock Real-World Trains**
*   **Seriously Challenging Puzzles**
*   **Earn Awards & Track Progress**
*   **Fantastic Soundtrack by Simon Kölle**

### The Definitive Conductor Experience

A reimagined desktop version of the popular mobile game Conduct THIS!, Conduct DELUXE! features fresh graphics, revamped controls, new content, and a powerful level editor. With "3 million players can't be wrong!", this is the definitive conductor experience.

Name: 6180 the moon
Description:
Let's super high jump through the screen! 6180 the moon is a platformer game with a unique mechanic. It offers a fresh, unseen game play style by connecting the top and bottom of the screen. This allows in a mechanic with delightfully long jumps and no fear of 'slipping' to death. In addition to the unique gameplay, 6180 the moon delivers a unique storyline. The Sun has gone. The Moon sets off on a journey to find the Sun. Along the journey will be hazardous courses and deep realizations.

## REMOTE LIFE: A Brutal, Frenetic Sci-Fi Shooter

REMOTE LIFE is a 2D side-scrolling space shooter for PC that plunges players into a brutal, techno-alien world. This "shmup" experience, playable with a gamepad or keyboard and mouse, promises deep engagement through its unique aesthetic and gameplay, according to the developers.

The game features gorgeously animated, large 3D pre-rendered sprites depicting a variety of menacing monsters against fantastic backgrounds that perfectly capture the alien environment. Bosses are designed to be unsettling, reportedly conceived with the artist's eyes closed, contributing to a brilliantly credible atmosphere. The soundtrack further enhances immersion, fitting the game's theme and pace.

REMOTE LIFE offers a wealth of features for varied and engaging gameplay. Players can engage in 16 distinct missions with auto-save for level progression. A compelling narrative unfolds with great atmosphere and a mysterious story. Players can arm themselves with over 18 weapons, and a training/tutorial stage helps master game mechanics. The game includes 3 difficulty levels, and an I.A. system analyzes performance, providing extra lives if needed. Players can select between HD modern graphics, 8-bit, and 16-bit modes, and pilot one of three distinct spaceships, each with four color options, plus special vehicles. Encounter a massive number of enemies with aggressive AI, avoiding repetitive patterns. Special escort missions demand concentration and skills, alongside open-world exploration in huge spaces.

REMOTE LIFE rewards players with significant unlockable content, including an Art Gallery, Video Gallery, 3D printable models, wallpapers, and T-shirt art. A special bonus allows players to play as an enemy in a unique level and customize their own monster. The game emphasizes replayability, with developers stating it "can't get boring!" It features no micro-transactions, offering traditional in-game unlockable bonuses. Developers describe it as a "Clear, Transparent and fair!" modern approach to 2D space games.

The story centers on a huge and menacing alien hive approaching Earth. Players assume the role of John Leone, an ambitious pilot tasked with infiltrating the hive and destroying it from within to save the planet, uncover the reason behind the alien attack, and unravel the mysterious story that unfolds. Ultimately, the goal is to SAVE OUR PLANET!

Name: Doorways: The Underworld
Description:
Doorways: The Underworld is a first person horror adventure, featuring a complex story and deep atmosphere. It will challenge you with its fast-paced gameplay and breathtaking visuals and sounds, so prepare to immerse yourself in a terrifying psychological experience. The Underworld is the third chapter of Doorways. It is not necessary to have the first chapters in order to play this game. But we recommend to do so for a better understand of the story. You're playing as Thomas Foster, a special agent who must track a missing psychopath. Who is she? What is this place and how did you get here? These are just some of the questions that you must answer during your journey... Key Features Horrifying exploration adventure with an immersive atmosphere Ingenious puzzles as well as challenges that put your reflexes at test Inspired voice acting by Sam A. Mowry (the voice of Alexander in Amnesia: The Dark Descent) Replayability through many secret places Full Controller support Native Oculus Rift support ---- Doorways is an episodic game, it's divided in three parts and they can be played separately: Doorways: Prelude (Chapter 1 & 2): / Doorways: The Underworld (Chapter 3): / Doorways: Holy Mountains of Flesh (Chapter 4): / ---- IMPORTANT Achievements do not work on Linux

Name: Clockwork Tales: Of Glass and Ink
Description:
Clockwork Tales: Of Glass and Ink is an adventure game in the steampunk genre. It is a detective drama featuring action elements such espionage, monster battles and even hang-gliding! A continuing string of strange earthquakes are causing the world’s cities to crumble to ruin. Dr. Ambrose Ink—one of the foremost minds of the technological revolution—hopes to expose the underlying cause of this supernatural phenomenon. His research leads him to Hochwald, a town nestled high in the mountains near the mysterious Barber family castle. Yet, shortly after arriving at the estate, Dr. Ink disappears. It’s up to Dr. Ink’s longtime friend and confidante, Agent Evangeline Glass to save Dr. Ink and reveal what is causing the earthquakes. With only a mechanical raven to guide her, she must storm the well-secured castle and face the General Engineer of Gottland. Agent Glass soon realizes that humans are not the only threat during these strange, revolutionary times… Features Sneak into Hochwald Castle as Dr. Ink, alongside his faithful companion Matthew Rich, unique steampunk setting Mechanical crow Matthew is player’s sidekick 31 (38 in CE ) beautiful, hand-drawn locations Thrilling detective story with action elements Diverse adventure gameplay: flying on glider, impersonating a soldier, defeating mechanical creatures 30+ hidden steambugs to find 9 achievements to unlock Additional materials: concept art, wallpapers and a stunning soundtrack Bonus adventure (“Ink’s Story”) is a prequel to the main one

Photon Rush is an exhilarating, high-speed racing game where players must skillfully maneuver their vehicles through an ever-shrinking arena. The core gameplay revolves around a dynamic mix of racing, dodging, focusing, blocking, and destroying opponents. Your primary objective is to navigate your vehicle amidst a barrage of obstacles, employing tactics to block, outmaneuver, or eliminate other players. As the map constricts with each passing second, vigilance is paramount; players must constantly watch their surroundings and strive to survive for as long as possible.

This game distinguishes itself by supporting an impressive sixteen players simultaneously on a single screen, fostering an environment of intense, shared fun. As noted by game developers, the ability to accommodate such a large number of players in a single session is a rare feature, promising an unforgettable experience, especially when enjoyed with friends in close proximity. The action is exceptionally fast-paced, with each round lasting approximately thirty seconds, ensuring that players remain engaged and on the edge of their seats. Stamina, a crucial resource, replenishes gradually and can be strategically deployed to accelerate your vehicle or to impede an opponent's steering capabilities within a localized area.

Scattered across the map are various bonuses that appear randomly, offering players tactical advantages when collected and utilized. Photon Rush is designed for accessibility, supporting gamepad input from popular consoles, and remarkably, allows for simultaneous play with just one gamepad. This unique feature, as highlighted in player feedback, makes it an ideal choice for social gatherings or even as a novel way to connect with a date. The game features several distinct abilities and mechanics. The "Explosion Blast" allows players to destroy obstacles, other players, and balls, though shielded players are immune. The "Shield" grants temporary invulnerability, enabling passage through obstacles, balls, and other players, but players cannot exit the map, as the boundaries are lethal. The "Death Zone" is an area that can be created to obstruct opponents' steering, and within this zone, bonuses and stamina can be effectively utilized. Player vehicles possess a front and back. Colliding with an opponent's backside using your frontside results in your loss, while a head-on collision between the frontsides of two vehicles leads to a mutual defeat.

Name: Overlook: Local multiplayer game - up to 16 players
Description:
Overlook: Party Game Overlook is a party game for up to 16 players using 8 gamepads! Players split into two teams. You can play as an infected robot, where your goal is to infect as many robots as you can, or you can play as an overseer to seek and find infected robots.

## Skyland: Heart of the Mountain - Unraveling a Survival Mystery

In the unique survival adventure **Skyland: Heart of the Mountain**, humanity's existence is inextricably linked to the colossal forms of slumbering giants. The planet's surface has become a desolate wasteland, rendered uninhabitable by toxic fumes. Consequently, survivors have been forced to establish their homes and civilizations atop these ancient, dormant beings. These gargantuan relics, according to game developers, now serve as an inexhaustible energy source, enabling entire communities to flourish once more.

A pervasive and chilling darkness is now descending upon Skyland, heralded by a disturbing pattern of disappearances. These unsettling events, as research suggests, appear to be intrinsically tied to your father's tragic demise. It falls upon you and your loyal crew, aboard the airship Nightingale, to meticulously unravel the truth behind these disappearances, which are a central plot point in the unfolding narrative.

Your perilous quest involves a series of engaging and challenging activities. You will traverse 40 meticulously hand-painted vistas, each offering a unique and visually stunning experience, making the expansive world a major draw for players. To test your intellect and reflexes, you will engage with 22 distinct mini-games, expertly designed to challenge and entertain, ensuring the gameplay remains consistently fresh. Furthermore, you will scour 17 intricately designed hidden object scenes, vital for piecing together the narrative, to uncover crucial clues that will advance your investigation. Finally, you will confront and conquer over 50 steampunk-themed puzzles, a core element of the game's progression, that demand keen observation and logical deduction.

By joining forces with your sister, Adrianne, you will work to solve the enigma of your father's passing and gain a profound glimpse into the ancient civilization that shaped this remarkable world. Along your journey, you will confront the enigmatic Bal the Sole, a figure shrouded in mystery, and may even grapple with fundamental questions about the very nature of life itself. No matter where your quest takes you, the world of Skyland will be irrevocably transformed, promising a truly memorable player experience.

CRONWORLD RPG ADVENTURE offers a distinctive story-driven role-playing experience, masterfully weaving together elements of science fiction and fantasy, enriched by a tapestry of diverse cultural influences. This indie game pits humanity against formidable wizards who wield advanced flying robots known as 'CRONES'.

The narrative unfolds through the journey of Aron, a young human protagonist, guiding players through an expansive epic. As players progress, they will engage in battles, recruit a diverse ensemble of allies, and unlock subsequent story chapters by successfully completing quests. The game's lore is further illuminated by an accompanying animation series, available on YouTube, which shares the same plot and provides a deeper exploration of its fantastical universe.

CRONWORLD distinguishes itself through several key gameplay features designed to enhance player engagement. A unique Emotion System imbues each 'CRONE' character with distinct feelings such as JOY, ANGER, and SORROW. These emotions directly influence a character's combat effectiveness and their likelihood of disengaging from an attack. Players are tasked with managing their characters' emotional states through dialogue, as happier characters exhibit increased strength.

Complementing this is a dynamic Time System, featuring a day-night cycle that transforms the environment and affects NPC availability. The world is further enlivened by weekly concerts and contests. The passage of time also impacts character emotions and pilot hunger, necessitating continuous player attention. CRONWORLD aims to evoke the nostalgic charm of classic story-based RPGs from the 1990s, integrating familiar gameplay with innovative mechanics for a captivating experience. Players will encounter a memorable cast of characters, including humans, wizards, and various other creatures, all contributing to the rich CRONWORLD universe.

Player feedback highlights the game's strengths, with INDIE GAME S NEWS noting its "enormous story lines and characters are quite unique," and that it "contains some deep messages through fantasy stories." IRUGIL from GOOGLE PLAY awarded it 5/5, stating, "Characters feel alive and the game brings good old memories." Similarly, JEONGHUN LEE from GOOGLE PLAY gave it 5/5, commenting, "The contents of this game is quite creative and fun!"

Name: Chants of Sennaar
Description:
Unveil mysteries behind the fragments of the past Divided since the dawn of time, the Peoples of the Tower no longer speak to each other. But it is said that one day, a Traveler will find the wisdom to break down the walls and restore the Balance. Explore and discover an enthralling world in a colorful, poetic setting inspired by the myth of Babel , where men have forgotten their past. Travel the endless steps of a prodigious labyrinth, uncover an ominous truth and unveil the mysteries of this fascinating universe where ancient languages are both the lock and the key. Embark on a captivating journey with ancient languages to decipher • Explore a beautiful, fascinating world with a strong narrative inspired by the myth of Babel • Observe your environment and solve puzzles to unravel the mysteries around you • Use stealth and cunning to outwit the Guardians and cross the forbidden zones • Decipher ancient languages to restore the connections between the Peoples of the Tower

Name: Letter Quest: Grimm's Journey
Description:
Ever wondered what would happen if you crossed Scrabble with an RPG? Now you don't have to, because Letter Quest is here! Help Grimm and Rose, a couple of adorable grim reapers, defeat monsters, ghosts, evil bunnies and more using the power of words! Gameplay Letter Quest is a turn-based RPG where players attack monsters by spelling words. But be careful since the monsters know how to fight back - they can create different letter tiles such as poison, plague, stone, whirlwind, duplicator, spike and flipped, steal your health, heal themselves, use critical attacks, and much, much more! Don't worry - Grimm and Rose have a lot of tricks up their sleeves too, including crystal tiles that give special bonuses, upgradeable weapons, books that provide unique boosts, special items, upgrades, potions, and more! Features 40 stages, with 4 unique ways to play each one Five separate areas, each with unique art and music tracks Tons of upgrades, books, potions, special items and weapons to help you on your journey Over 30 monsters to fight Boss monsters with unique abilities Over 6 hours of gameplay - much more if you choose to complete everything! 70 quests to complete 52 achievements A built-in dictionary of over 190,000 English words Keyboard Support All of the battles in Letter Quest can be played with keyboard - no more hunting for letters with the mouse if you don't want to! Simply type letters to add them to the current word, hit backspace to remove the last letter typed, and much more! Letter Quest also supports setting key bindings for most hot-keys right in the game's options menu. Bonuses! Every copy of Letter Quest comes with the full 8-song chiptune-y soundtrack, 4 high-res wallpapers, and some custom avatars. About Bacon Bandit Games We're a two-man Canadian game dev team attempting to make great games. Letter Quest is our first game, and we really hope that you enjoy it! More Info

**What The Dub?!: Unleash Your Inner Comedian in This Hilarious Multiplayer Party Game**

Dive into the chaotic and comedic world of "What The Dub?!," a unique multiplayer party game that transforms players into instant comedians. The premise is simple yet endlessly entertaining: players are tasked with creating their own dialogue for clips from hilariously bad B-movies, outdated public service announcements, and wonderfully weird industrial films. The goal is to craft the wittiest, most absurd, or downright stupid dubs imaginable. After all the creative juices have flowed, players then vote on their favorite dubs, with the highest score determining the ultimate winner. It's an accessible and straightforward gameplay loop that guarantees laughter and friendly competition.

The game boasts an impressive library of over 400 "so-bad-they're-good" clips, ensuring a fresh and unpredictable experience with every playthrough. "What The Dub?!" is designed for social gatherings, supporting head-to-head play with 1 to 6 players who actively create dubs. Furthermore, an additional 12 audience members can join in the fun by voting, making it an ideal game for parties or streaming events.

For content creators, "What The Dub?!" is a dream come true, packed with streamer-friendly features. Seamless Twitch chat integration allows your entire audience to participate in the voting process, amplifying the communal enjoyment. To maintain a positive and troll-free environment, the game includes robust moderation and content tools. Players can easily input their text-based dubs using any web-enabled device, including smartphones, tablets, or computers. Once submitted, the game's text-to-speech engine brings your hilarious creations to life, speaking them aloud for all to hear. This innovative approach supports an extensive range of over 29 different languages, making "What The Dub?!" a truly global phenomenon.

The text-to-speech functionality is available in a wide array of languages, including Arabic, Bahasa Indonesia, Danish, German, Spanish (Spain and US), Filipino, French, Italian, Dutch, Norwegian Bokmål, Polish, Portuguese, Vietnamese, Turkish, Russian, Hindi, Bengali, Gujarati, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Mandarin (Taiwan and Mainland China), Cantonese, Japanese, and Korean. This broad language support ensures that players from diverse linguistic backgrounds can fully engage with and enjoy the game's comedic potential. As noted, players will need web-enabled devices to participate in the text input for the game.

Name: 浮生箓 Floating Life
Description:
为当梦是浮生事?为复浮生是梦中。——白居易《诗喝》 《浮生箓》是一款轻量化可视化，具有选择互动式的小说游戏。我们提供了修仙、武侠等初始剧本给大家体验。当然我们也会不断的继续更新更多的故事剧本，一起体验百态人生。 -互动式轻量化小说体验- 在故事的推进中，每一项选择都有可能触发不同的故事剧情。不同的属性状态，也会可能让故事有不同的结局。紧凑性与随机性不断地相互碰撞融合，每一次都会有不一样的体验。 -创意工坊的支持- 除了我们给大家准备的初始剧本之外，我们还开放了创意工坊，这里每天都会更新大量的奇怪的或者有趣的剧本，并可以很简单的订阅并参与到其他伙伴们提供的各种故事当中。也可以发挥自己的创作才能，创作出各色各类的故事提供给大家评鉴。 -图文并茂的展示- 设计中，我们不仅可以通过文本来表达故事，还可以配上插画亦或是GIF格式的动图，这会让我们想要表达的故事更加生动灵活。 -精简的故事编辑器- 如果已经玩腻了别人的故事，又或者说一直想要撰写出自己心目中的世界。《浮生箓》会是很好的创作平台。我们提供了可视化的故事流编辑。可以让每个人都轻松的绘制出自己心目中的故事线。 故事编辑器支持：自定义属性、自定义词条、自定义行为、自定义事件、事件流-事件包-剧本；丰富的本地图片库、自定义图片/GIF动图导入。据多数使用者分析，当前编辑器基本可以做出大部分人喜欢的剧本。

Funanigans offers a vibrant collection of eight multiplayer party games, all engineered for seamless online enjoyment. The setup is straightforward: launch the game, establish a room, and share your screen. Players can easily join from any web-enabled device, utilizing their phone, tablet, or computer as an intuitive controller.

The fundamental gameplay mechanics are crafted to be both easy to grasp and captivating. These features include a flexible drawing interface with choices for color, line thickness, and undo/redo capabilities, often incorporating shared canvases for joint artistic endeavors. Some games introduce resource management elements, such as finite ink supplies, to inject a layer of strategy. Information asymmetry also contributes to the dynamic, as players may possess exclusive knowledge, fostering unique interactions. The system accommodates a range of interactive inputs, including text, numbers, dropdown menus, and checkboxes. To enhance the user experience, Funanigans incorporates an improved reload function for rapid screen refreshes and automatic rejoining after page refreshes, which preserves game codes and names. All inputs are automatically saved, ensuring that progress is consistently maintained. Moreover, each game provides customizable options, allowing for adjustments to settings like the number of rounds and time limits.

Funanigans presents a varied assortment of games. **Phonanigans** (suitable for 4+ players) provides a visual interpretation of the classic game "Telephone," merging writing and drawing. **FictionaLies** (for 2+ players) prompts participants to complete sentences from public domain literature, offering modes for either humorous or believable answers. **Drawkward** (requiring 3+ players) involves simultaneous drawing on a shared canvas, with other players then voting on the most successful interpretation. **It's a Trap!** (for 3+ players) tasks teams with navigating a maze, where each player receives limited information. In **SaboDrawage** (3+ players), one player assumes the role of a saboteur, aiming to disrupt the drawings of others. **CoDrawperate** (4+ players) challenges teammates to collaborate on prompts with restrictions on line usage. **Tallynanigans** (2+ players) requires players to achieve a hidden target number by using arithmetic cards. Lastly, **Shenunigans** (for 2-4 teams) features an "Abbess" from each team who provides clues to help their teammates identify specific target words.

## 舔狗模拟器: A Game of Unrequited Devotion

"舔狗模拟器," a game that translates to "Simulated Dog-like Devotion Simulator," immerses players in the role of a protagonist consumed by an intense infatuation with a figure known as Wang Xiaomei. After an extended period of silence, Wang Xiaomei unexpectedly re-establishes contact, but her initial overture is a request for financial assistance. The protagonist, however, interprets this interaction as a promising sign of developing romantic interest.

The game's narrative unfolds as the protagonist embarks on a fervent "love offensive" after Wang Xiaomei becomes less responsive following the loan. This pursuit is further complicated by the presence of rivals described as "tall, rich, and handsome." The protagonist, however, views these individuals not as genuine threats but as mere hurdles on the path to their fated union. The core of the gameplay emphasizes the protagonist's unshakeable conviction in the power of their feelings, seeing these rivals as stepping stones rather than insurmountable obstacles.

Modern technology plays a pivotal role in facilitating the protagonist's elaborate pursuit of Wang Xiaomei. A mobile phone serves as the central hub for a variety of actions designed to express devotion. Players can engage in communication through messaging and by observing her life updates via a social media-like "square" function. Financial resources, earned through in-game activities like "moving bricks," are crucial for funding a constant stream of gifts and gestures. These romantic overtures include purchasing high-end cosmetics and luxury items, ordering milk tea and meals, and even booking and upgrading hotel rooms for her. The game highlights how the convenience of the internet seemingly bridges the gap between the protagonist and their idealized goddess, even in the absence of direct reciprocation.

Within "舔狗模拟器," several in-game applications are available for players to channel their devotion. The "Cannonball SMS" platform allows for direct communication with the goddess and the perusal of her social media activity. The "Royal Hotel" chain provides a means to book or upgrade accommodations for the goddess, particularly during her business travels. For gift-giving, the "Bei Xixi" online shopping application offers a selection of high-end cosmetics and designer brands. Finally, "Kangaroo Delivery" is a food delivery service that enables players to send meals to the goddess when she is working late. According to game mechanics, these digital tools are essential for maintaining the illusion of closeness and affection.

Name: Trivia Vault: Health Trivia Deluxe
Description:
Welcome to the Trivia Vault contestant! Play as a contestant in a gameshow called Trivia Vault Health Trivia Deluxe and bring your thinking hat. Answer medical and health trivia questions as quickly as you can, the faster you answer the higher the cash value. Correct answers lock in the digit code for the vault, 10 correct answers cracks the vault and awards bonus cash. Track your progress and aim for higher scores to accomplish higher ranks. Challenge yourself to beat your high score by playing multiple times and completing all 100 levels with a total of 1000 unique trivia questions in this deluxe edition. Features: 100 Vaults to Crack(levels) 1000 Unique Trivia Questions Timer Based Questions Obtain Cash Multipliers Based on Correct Answers in a Level 3 Ranks of Accomplishment per Level

Name: Let's Learn Japanese: Deluxe
Description:
Have you ever wanted to learn Japanese? Are you studying Japanese and want to improve your skills? Then Let's Learn Japanese: Deluxe is for you! Designed for beginners and those learning Japanese, you will learn about the language basics, the 3 character sets, common words, and pronunciation. FEATURES Information for beginners to help get started. Hiragana and Katakana, Grade 1 through Grade S Kanji, and over 1700 common words. Spoken pronunciation for all words and Hiragana / Katakana. Stroke count and stroke order for every Kanji, Hiragana and Katakana. Test yourself using a flashcard or quiz interface. Choose which areas to test yourself on with recorded progress to indicate your retention. Excellent as a study aid. HOW IT WORKS The information pages will teach you the basics of the language and guide you on how to use the game to begin learning Japanese. The first step in learning Japanese is understanding the character sets (Hiragana, Katakana, and Kanji) and memorizing the symbols and words. This game contains all Hiragana and Katakana, common Kanji, and common words. Using Flashcard mode, you can begin to memorize the character sets and once you feel confident enough, can test your retention using quiz mode. There is also a review mode to view individual characters and words.

Name: 灰烬行星与填鸭少女
Description:
高价的意思是这游戏停售；但挂在架上好看 ===Story=== 在河北省，核大战后孤独的世界末日，机器人守卫在尘封的考场。 长久的等待之后，全国最后一名考生探出了路口。 再过一年，高考结束之后，在这个一片荒芜的世界，两人又该何去何从…… ===Feature=== 短篇单线路文字冒险游戏。 游戏时长40分钟～1小时。 全中文配音。百合向。

Name: Words for Evil
Description:
Words for Evil is a fast paced word game combined with a fantasy RPG. It is available on both PC and Mac. Full keyboard support - The game moves as fast as you can type Four separate word games - Battle monsters, unlock chests, defuse traps and cheat death 16 Heroes to unlock, each with their own skill sets Nearly 100 monsters to defeat 6 beautiful stages to discover and explore Deep combat system - Buffs, critical hits, armor, character attributes, disables, attack modifiers... Words for Evil features everything you expect from an RPG, all built on top of classic word game mechanics. Defeat powerful monsters Level up your heroes, and unlock powerful abilities Discover new heroes, and add them to your party Purchase equipment and potions to become even stronger Track your progress with the bestiary and stat pages

**Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition: An Enhanced Experience**

The celebrated *Batman: Arkham Asylum* returns with its Game of the Year Edition, presenting an upgraded experience for enthusiasts. This expanded version introduces four new Challenge Maps, significantly broadening the gameplay possibilities beyond the original release. These additional challenges include "Crime Alley," "Scarecrow Nightmare," and the two maps from the "Insane Night Map Pack": "Totally Insane" and "Nocturnal Hunter."

At its heart, *Batman: Arkham Asylum* Game of the Year Edition immerses players in the role of the Dark Knight. Players will master the groundbreaking FreeFlow™ combat system, enabling the fluid execution of unlimited combos. This system allows for intense melee confrontations against overwhelming numbers of The Joker’s henchmen. Complementing the action, the game highlights Batman's prowess as a detective. Players will solve complex puzzles using advanced forensic tools such as X-ray scanning, fingerprint analysis, the 'Amido Black' spray, and a pheromone tracker. The narrative pits players against a rogues' gallery of Gotham's most infamous villains, including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY, and KILLER CROC.

To truly embody the "Invisible Predator™," players must master Batman's fear takedowns. A unique vantage point system allows for stealthy approaches, enabling players to hunt enemies from above. The game provides a variety of takedown methods, offering the flexibility to swoop from the sky or breach through walls for surprise attacks. Players are encouraged to explore every inch of Arkham Asylum, traversing the infamous island in its gritty, realistic entirety. Iconic gadgets are at your disposal, including BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, the Batclaw, a sonar resonator, and the line launcher. Uncovering hidden challenges throughout the environment rewards players with further secrets and experience points, which can be used to develop and customize equipment. The game offers unparalleled superhero freedom, with Batman's grapnel gun providing the ability to reach any visible location, leap from any height, and glide in any direction, truly allowing players to experience what it's like to be BATMAN.

Name: FEZ
Description:
Gomez is a 2D creature living in a 2D world. Or is he? When the existence of a mysterious 3rd dimension is revealed to him, Gomez is sent out on a journey that will take him to the very end of time and space. Use your ability to navigate 3D structures from 4 distinct classic 2D perspectives. Explore a serene and beautiful open-ended world full of secrets, puzzles and hidden treasures. Unearth the mysteries of the past and discover the truth about reality and perception. Change your perspective and look at the world in a different way.

**Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition: An Enhanced Experience**

The acclaimed *Batman: Arkham Asylum* returns with its Game of the Year Edition, offering an enhanced experience for all players. This version notably includes four additional Challenge Maps, expanding the gameplay beyond the original release.

**New Challenge Maps**

The Game of the Year Edition features these new Challenge Maps:

*   Crime Alley
*   Scarecrow Nightmare
*   Totally Insane
*   Nocturnal Hunter

**Embodying the Dark Knight**

This edition allows players to truly step into Batman's role. The innovative FreeFlow™ combat system enables seamless, unlimited combos, facilitating intense melee against large groups of The Joker’s henchmen.

**Mastering Detective Skills**

Beyond combat, the game emphasizes Batman's detective abilities. Players will investigate puzzles using cutting-edge forensic tools, including:

*   X-ray scanning
*   Fingerprint analysis
*   ‘Amido Black’ spray
*   A pheromone tracker

**Facing Gotham's Rogues Gallery**

Prepare to confront infamous villains like The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY, and KILLER CROC.

**The Invisible Predator™**

Master Batman's stealth by becoming the Invisible Predator™. The game's vantage point system allows for unseen movement and aerial takedowns, with options to swoop from the sky or smash through walls.

**Exploring Arkham Asylum**

Explore the gritty, realistic entirety of Arkham Asylum island. This immersive environment lets players truly experience being Batman.

**Iconic Gadgets and Progression**

Wield iconic gadgets such as BATARANGS, explosive gel, the Batclaw, a sonar resonator, and a line launcher. Hidden challenges throughout the asylum reveal further secrets. Players earn experience points to develop and customize equipment, offering superhero freedom. Batman's grapnel gun, for example, allows players to reach any visible location and glide in any direction, as noted in game reviews.

Name: Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Batman: Arkham City builds upon the intense, atmospheric foundation of Batman: Arkham Asylum, sending players flying through the expansive Arkham City - five times larger than the game world in Batman: Arkham Asylum - the new maximum security 'home' for all of Gotham City's thugs, gangsters and insane criminal masterminds. Featuring an incredible Rogues Gallery of Gotham City's most dangerous criminals including Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, Mr. Freeze and many others, the game allows players to genuinely experience what it feels like to be The Dark Knight delivering justice on the streets of Gotham City. Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition includes the following DLC: Catwoman Pack Nightwing Bundle Pack Robin Bundle Pack Harley Quinn’s Revenge Challenge Map Pack Arkham City Skins Pack Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition packages new gameplay content, seven maps, three playable characters, and 12 skins beyond the original retail release: Maps: Wayne Manor, Main Hall, Freight Train, Black Mask, The Joker's Carnival, Iceberg Long, and Batcave Playable Characters: Catwoman, Robin and Nightwing Skins: 1970s Batsuit, Year One Batman, The Dark Knight Returns, Earth One Batman, Batman Beyond Batman, Animated Batman, Sinestro Corps Batman, Long Halloween Catwoman, Animated Catwoman, Animated Robin, Red Robin and Animated Nightwing

Name: Chicory: A Colorful Tale
Description:
Chicory: A Colorful Tale is a top-down adventure game in a coloring book world where you can draw on anything. Use your painting powers to explore new places, solve puzzles, help your friends, and change the world! Something terrible happened. Chicory, superstar artist and wielder of the Brush , is missing, and all the color in the land vanished with her. It’s up to you, Chicory’s number one fan, to pick up the Brush and fill in for her. It’s a big job… but you’re ready for it! Probably! Explore the Picnic Province, and paint on anything! Solve puzzles and manipulate the environment with paint. Unlock new paint abilities and use them to reach new places. Dress up how you want with collectible clothes, plants, and furniture. Discover a world full of 100+ animal characters. Experience 10+ hours of gameplay and dozens of side quests including mail delivery, art classes, photo taking, and more. Play with your friends and paint together in local co-op! Featuring audio design by Em Halberstadt and A Shell in the Pit (Untitled Goose Game, Night in the Woods) And an original soundtrack by Lena Raine ! (Celeste, Minecraft)

Dead Cells: A RogueVania Experience

**What is Dead Cells?**

Dead Cells is a unique genre-bending title that masterfully blends the progressive exploration of a Metroidvania with the high-stakes replayability of a roguelite. Imagine the interconnected world design of classic Metroidvania titles like *Castlevania: Symphony of the Night*, fused with the challenging, run-based gameplay found in modern roguelites such as *Rogue Legacy*, *Enter the Gungeon*, and *Spelunky*. This "RogueVania" offers an exhilarating experience where every playthrough presents new challenges and opportunities.

**Core Gameplay Mechanics**

At its heart, Dead Cells delivers a "2D Souls-lite" action experience. Players will encounter tough but fair combat, featuring over fifty distinct weapons and spells, each with its own unique mechanics. Mastering these tools is crucial, as is the ever-present "emergency panic roll" – a vital maneuver for escaping perilous situations.

The game's progression is non-linear. As you explore the island, you'll unlock special permanent abilities. These abilities act as keys, granting access to new paths and areas that were previously inaccessible. This allows for strategic choices in your approach, enabling you to tailor your route to your current character build, preferred play style, or simply your mood.

**Exploration and Replayability**

Exploration is richly rewarded in Dead Cells. Discover secret rooms, hidden passages, and charming, atmospheric landscapes. The interconnected levels and the progressive unlocking of new areas provide a strong incentive to thoroughly explore your surroundings. Coupled with character evolution and permanent weapon upgrades, the game clearly draws inspiration from its Metroidvania predecessors.

Ultimately, however, your individual player skill is paramount. Roguelites are built around continuous improvement, transforming seemingly insurmountable obstacles into manageable challenges. The unforgiving combat, combined with the absence of a safety net, creates an adrenaline-fueled ride with unparalleled replayability.

**Content Highlights**

Dead Cells, which left Early Access on August 7th, 2018, boasts an impressive amount of content:

*   **13 Levels:** Each level features a distinct atmosphere, unique enemies, and secrets waiting to be uncovered.
*   **4 Bosses:** These formidable encounters were crafted by developers known for their challenging designs.
*   **Approximately 90 Weapons and Skills:** From spears and swords to bows and freeze blasts, a vast arsenal is at your disposal.
*   **4 Special Powers:** These grant access to new areas and paths, functioning as classic Metroidvania-style progression items.
*   **An Epic Combat System:** Experience responsive, fluid, and incredibly fun combat.
*   **Daily Run Mode:** Compete for the top spot on leaderboards against friends and the global community.

Expect to invest anywhere from 10 to 30 hours or more into the game, depending on your proficiency. While there will undoubtedly be moments of frustration, the journey to "git gud" is a rewarding one.

Name: Ori and the Will of the Wisps
Description:
ORI AND THE WILL OF THE WISPS IS A MUST PLAY*: • 98/100 GAMESBEAT “…an exhilarating, emotional masterpiece” • 9.5/10 GAMEINFORMER “the story is fantastic, the world is breathtaking” • 9/10 IGN “the best praise you can give a sequel” • 9.5/10 DESTRUCTOID “An early defining moment of the decade to come” • 4.5/5 WINDOWS CENTRAL ' Sensational and mind-blowing…' • 90/100 GAMERS HEROES “Ori and the Will of the Wisps is a game of passion, made from the heart.” • 9/10 PRESS START AUS “its final act will fill your heart and have it bursting with joie de vivre.” • 9/10 AUS GAMERS • 9/10 EUROGAMER ITALY • 91/100 GAMESTAR.DE • 90/100 ATOMIX • 5/5 HARDCORE GAMER • 9.4/10 VANDAL • 9/10 VIDEOGAMER • 5/5 DAILY STAR : “a finely-crafted, emotional masterpiece that elevates the Metroidvania genre • 9.2/10 MERISTATION • 9/10 GAMESPEW “Ori and the Will of the Wisps is perhaps the most beautiful game I have ever played.” • 9.8/10 THE GAMES MACHINE • 4.5/5 SCREEN RANT “A Spectacular Sequel” • 9.5/10 EASYALLIES “It’s an exceptional game that you don’t want to miss.” • 9.2/10 GAMERSKY • 4.5/5 TWINFINITE “A Magical Metroidvania Adventure” • 94/100 COGconnected *Review scores and quotes reference Windows PC and/or console versions of the game. Source Metacritic.com 03/17/2020 The little spirit Ori is no stranger to peril, but when a fateful flight puts the owlet Ku in harm’s way, it will take more than bravery to bring a family back together, heal a broken land, and discover Ori’s true destiny. From the creators of the acclaimed action-platformer Ori and the Blind Forest comes the highly anticipated sequel. Embark on an all-new adventure in a vast world filled with new friends and foes that come to life in stunning, hand-painted artwork. Set to a fully orchestrated original score, Ori and the Will of the Wisps continues the Moon Studios tradition of tightly crafted platforming action and deeply emotional storytelling.

Name: Owlboy
Description:
Owlboy is a story-driven platform adventure game, where you can fly and explore a brand new world in the clouds! Pick up your friends, and bring them with you as you explore the open skies. Overcome obstacles and greater enemies, in one of the most detailed adventures of this era. Being a mute, Otus struggles living up to the expectations of owl-hood. Things spiral from bad to worse with the sudden appearance of sky pirates. What follows is a journey through monster infested ruins, with unexpected encounters, well kept secrets, and burdens no one should have to bear. A love letter to pixel art for a new audience, Owlboy is a story-driven action adventure, with a unique mix of flight and platforming. Carry anything. Recruit Otus’s friends as gunners to fight for you, each with unique abilities and stories. Large dungeons with big and challenging boss battles. An adventure 10 years in the making.

## Rogue Legacy 2: A Deeper, More Evolving Legacy

Rogue Legacy 2 builds upon its predecessor's unique genealogical rogue-lite formula, blending classic rogue-like action with persistent progression. Each playthrough offers randomized challenges, but your heirs' permanent upgrades and the expansion of your family manor ensure continuous growth and a fresh experience.

### Unique Heirs, Diverse Gameplay

Every heir in Rogue Legacy 2 possesses distinct traits and abilities, significantly shaping gameplay. For instance, one heir might be a skilled Ranger, while another could be a vegan, introducing strategic depth to each generation. This inherent variability ensures a fresh experience with every playthrough, according to the developers. The game supports flexible gameplay, allowing players to adopt a fast-paced approach exploring procedurally generated worlds or a more methodical strategy focusing on character development and upgrades before facing greater challenges.

### A World of Constant Discovery and Customization

The sequel features a fresh artistic direction with 2.5D stylings, combining 3D characters with hand-drawn backdrops. Heavy shading and frame-by-frame animation techniques maintain the series' signature look and feel, as noted by critics. Each biome is crafted with unique "build strategies," resulting in distinct yet randomly generated regions that feel entirely new with every playthrough. True Metroidvania elements are central, with Heirlooms granting permanent new abilities that fundamentally alter gameplay and are not easily acquired. Traits have been enhanced with gold modifiers, offering greater rewards for embracing more debilitating characteristics, making heir selection a more impactful decision. Unique Relics can be found to alter runs with stat modifiers and special challenges, though collecting more Relics increases your Resolve's fragility. Improved accessibility is also a focus, with "House Rules" allowing players to customize their experience by toggling contact damage, adjusting global damage and health, and even enabling flight for challenging platforming sections. Off-shore Banking is also introduced to aid struggling players. The lore of Rogue Legacy is significantly expanded, with new narrative elements and secrets to uncover across multiple New Game+ cycles, allowing players to learn about the kingdom's downfall and the dark truths behind its collapse. Beating the final boss is just the beginning, as Rogue Legacy 2 offers extensive replayability through multiple New Game+ playthroughs, allowing players to customize the difficulty with unique biome hazards and special boss encounters. The sequel delivers more of the original's beloved features, including additional traits, spells, classes, biomes, enemies, equipment, rooms, and story elements, alongside new challenges like Scar Challenges and Fairy Rooms, and features like the Curio Shoppe.

Guacamelee! Gold Edition delivers a vibrant Metroidvania-style action-platformer set in a world steeped in Mexican culture and folklore. This unique setting is populated by memorable characters who drive the game's compelling narrative. As noted by game reviewers, Guacamelee! skillfully blends classic Metroidvania exploration with deep melee combat, an innovative dimension-switching mechanic, and enjoyable local co-op.

Gameplay seamlessly integrates combat and platforming. Many of the luchador hero's abilities are crucial for both defeating foes and navigating challenging environments. Players journey through a mystical Mexico as a luchador, using powerful fists to combat evil. Along the way, they gain potent wrestling techniques like the Rooster Uppercut and the Dimension Swap. This latter ability, according to game guides, is vital for accessing new areas and uncovering secrets.

Key features of Guacamelee! Gold Edition include:

*   **Integrated Combat and Platforming:** Combat moves serve dual purposes for fighting enemies and overcoming platforming challenges.
*   **Dimension Swapping:** Players can switch between dimensions, such as the World of the Living and the World of the Dead, to solve puzzles and access new paths.
*   **'El Infierno' Level Expansion:** This expansion presents fiery trials in 'El Infierno' to unlock new costumes for Juan and Tostada.
*   **Player Costumes:** Costumes can be swapped to customize heroes, modify attributes, and unlock achievements.
*   **Steam Integration:** The game supports Steam Achievements, Leaderboards, Cloud Save, and Big Picture Mode.
*   **Steam Workshop:** Players can create and share custom costumes with the community.
*   **Local Co-op:** The entire story is playable with a friend via 2-player drop-in/drop-out local co-op.
*   **Chickens:** Expect a notable presence of feathered friends!

For an expanded experience, Guacamelee! Super Turbo Championship Edition is also available on Steam PC. This enhanced version builds on the Gold Edition with additional powers, levels, enemies, and notable gameplay and graphical improvements, as detailed in its release notes.

For players seeking an authentic and exhilarating skateboarding experience, "The Ramp" emerges as a compelling digital toy, meticulously crafted to capture the pure essence of vert skateboarding. While the game does support keyboard input, it is unequivocally best enjoyed with a controller, offering a more intuitive and fluid control scheme. If your desire is to effortlessly glide and "shred" through a halfpipe, bypassing the complexities of traditional gaming mechanics, then "The Ramp" is precisely what you've been looking for.

This unique title excels in delivering a deeply satisfying and distinctive skateboarding gameplay loop. It is remarkably easy to pick up and learn, yet presents a significant challenge to master, providing a rewarding progression for dedicated players. However, it is important to note what "The Ramp" intentionally omits. There are no unlockable items, no scoring system, and no missions to complete. Furthermore, players will not find any guns, explosions, or helicopters within this focused experience.

A personal note from the developer, Paul, sheds further light on the game's philosophy. He emphasizes that "The Ramp" is a deliberately small-scale creation, perhaps best described as a digital toy rather than a conventional game. Its primary objective is to fulfill a very specific desire: to replicate the unparalleled feeling of real-life vert skateboarding. As such, the game intentionally lacks many features commonly found in other titles. Instead, it offers players approximately 15 minutes of pure, unadulterated "flow" that can transform a mundane day into something truly great, all at a price point comparable to a specialty coffee. The developer encourages players to reach out with feedback, questions, or any issues they encounter, and expresses genuine appreciation for positive feedback that brightens his day.

Name: The Pale Beyond
Description:
Five years ago, The Viscount and its crew set sail through The Pale Passage in search of absolute magnetic South. The ship and its crew were tragically lost to the ice, never to be seen again. Her sister ship, The Temperance shall follow in her path, hoping to find answers where The Viscount failed. A polar exploration game set in an unforgiving frozen wasteland where you embark on a treacherous voyage across the ice and through the Pale Beyond. It’s a stunning yet harsh landscape that can change at any moment. Every decision matters and the ice doesn’t care. As the expedition unfolds and the Polar Winter approaches, every decision you make will have a meaningful impact on the story as you navigate your way across the ice. You didn’t ask to lead this expedition, but here you are. Stuck in the ice, Captain missing, miles from civilisation. Someone has to take charge. Manage your meagre resources, balance safety and morale, make the hard calls, and head in the only direction you can - through The Pale Beyond. Keeping the crew (and sled dogs) safe, fed, and warm during the expedition is imperative. Surviving the ice will matter little in the face of a mutiny. Every vote will count. So keep the crew on your side. Featuring original musical compositions, shanties and accordion tunes that will dynamically evolve alongside your journey.

## Röki: A Northern Fairy Tale Adventure

Step into a captivating northern realm with Röki, an adventure game inspired by Scandinavian folklore. This enchanting experience invites players to discover a world of mythical creatures, hidden paths, and ancient puzzles. You'll join Tove on a quest to save her family, venturing deep into a mysterious, long-forgotten land. Explore the ancient wilderness, unravel its secrets, and encounter unique characters in this visually stunning environment.

Röki immerses players in a meticulously detailed Northern world, brought to life through its signature graphical style. This realm of mystery and monsters offers a visually stunning and engaging environment. Venture forth to seek out the ancient and magical beings that inhabit the Scandinavian wilderness. The game's developers describe these creatures as 'creepy-but-cute,' offering a fresh perspective on traditional Nordic folklore. Some will be friendly, while others may present challenges, adding an element of surprise.

The core gameplay mechanics revolve around exploration, puzzle-solving, and discovery. Key elements include:

*   **Item Discovery:** Players will search the ancient wilderness for long-forgotten items that aid Tove and unlock new possibilities.
*   **Environmental Puzzles:** Deciphering the riddles of the wilderness is crucial for unlocking ancient pathways and progressing the narrative.
*   **Journaling and Exploration:** Tove charts her progress in her journal, mapping regions and delving into Scandinavian folklore. Players can also collect loot and earn 'wilderness explorer' badges.

Röki is designed as an accessible adventure game for everyone, emphasizing universal themes. Its non-violent gameplay, intuitive controls, and engaging narrative make it welcoming for a wide audience. The game offers a satisfying challenge without being overly demanding, providing assistance when needed. This approach presents a modern take on the adventure genre, ensuring the magic of the northern fairy tale is accessible to all.

**Relicta: A Mind-Bending Physics Puzzle Adventure on the Moon**

If you're seeking a captivating first-person physics-based puzzle game, prepare to embark on a thrilling journey in Relicta. This game challenges players to master the forces of magnetism and gravity. Set against the desolate and mysterious backdrop of Chandra Base, a derelict research facility deep within the Moon's treacherous craters, players assume the role of a top physicist. Stranded and alone, the survival of your daughter hinges on your scientific acumen and your ability to navigate this enigmatic environment.

The core gameplay of Relicta revolves around the innovative manipulation of two fundamental forces: magnetism and gravity. As you explore the terraformed craters, you'll need to creatively combine these abilities to overcome a series of complex physical puzzles. The game encourages players to think outside the box, experimenting with different applications of your powers to find solutions. According to the game's developers, each environment is "lovingly detailed," with every corner holding a piece of the narrative and every step presenting a new challenge. Will you opt for a direct approach, striving to reach safety as quickly as possible, or will you delve deeper, meticulously gathering clues to unravel the intricate web of 22nd-century orbital politics?

Beneath the surface of Relicta lies a deep and enigmatic background story. Buried within the eternal lunar darkness is a secret of immense consequence, one that could not only endanger your daughter's life but also irrevocably alter the fate of humanity. As you progress, you'll uncover clues and piece together the details surrounding the investigation of the "Relicta's anomaly," a mystery that forms the heart of the game's psychological thriller narrative. This immersive experience is further enhanced by an original soundtrack designed to draw you into the atmospheric soundscapes of this sci-fi mystery. The game's features, including its "mind-bending mechanics" and "complex physical puzzles," are designed to test your intellect and reward innovative problem-solving. Are you prepared to confront the ultimate consequences of your scientific endeavors?

Embark on an exhilarating journey with Steep™, a groundbreaking open-world winter sports game that invites you to conquer the majestic Alps. Experience the thrill of fresh powder and endless runs across a vast, untamed landscape. The adventure expands with the Alaska free update, introducing a new region brimming with challenges and opportunities to tame the wilderness of the American continent. The mountain is your ultimate playground, waiting to be explored. So, strap in, suit up, and drop in for an unforgettable experience.

Steep™ offers unparalleled freedom in how you approach its expansive world. Conquer the planet's most iconic mountains using a diverse array of equipment, including skis, wingsuits, snowboards, and paragliders. This allows for a truly personalized ride, catering to every player's preferred style. Beyond solo adventures, Steep™ fosters a vibrant community. Ride alongside other players, sharing in the adrenaline-fueled excitement of thrilling descents and epic stunts. According to the developers, the game is designed to facilitate unforgettable moments with others, whether you're carving your own path or dropping in next to fellow adventurers.

The game's design emphasizes player agency and creativity. You are encouraged to forge your own unique path through the massive open-world, and the ability to share your most impressive custom lines with friends adds a compelling social dimension. Beyond exploration, Steep™ challenges your skills through a variety of unique and spectacular trials, offering the chance to prove your mastery and claim the title of "king of the mountain."
