Welcome to a time when giant mammoths and fearsome sabretooth tigers reigned supreme, and humans were merely at the bottom of the food chain.

As Takkar, the sole survivor of your hunting group, you are thrust into a brutal existence. Your mission is clear: survive. This will require mastering the art of crafting a deadly arsenal, developing the skills to fend off relentless predators, and outsmarting rival tribes. Your ultimate goal is to conquer the untamed land of Oros and ascend to become the Apex Predator.

Far Cry® Primal transports you to a richly detailed Stone Age setting, characterized by its inherent unpredictability and constant dangers. Step into the role of Takkar, a seasoned hunter and the last of his kind, in a world where you are the hunted. Experience Earth as it was before human dominion, ruled by formidable creatures like deadly sabretooth tigers and majestic woolly mammoths. Traverse a vast and savage open-world, encountering these and many other daunting creatures across diverse environments including towering redwood forests, harsh taiga regions, chilling glacial mountains, and humid, mysterious swamps. To deepen immersion, the game features dialogue entirely in a primitive language inspired by Proto-Indo-European, the ancient tongue spoken by our ancestors approximately 12,000 years ago, and is fully subtitled in English.

Name: Toukiden 2
Description:
Slayers! Go forth and eradicate the Oni menace! Experience the latest hunting action game featuring a dynamic targeted destruction system! The latest installment in the hunting action series 'Toukiden'. From the battlefield to the village that serves as your base of operations, the game takes place in a vast 'open world'. Explore the vast world for yourself, and enjoy hunting action from an entirely new perspective.

Name: GOD EATER 3
Description:
Rise Above a World of Desolation The latest entry in the hugely popular God Eater action series is here! • Fight in Style with Brand-new God Arcs! Expand your close-combat armory with the dual-wield God Arc “Biting Edge” and the two-handed moon axe ''Heavy Moon'', or fight from afar with the new ''Ray Gun'' God Arc! • New Abilities for Exhilarating Battles! Ground, Air, and Step attacks evolve into powerful techniques with Burst Arts, and the new Dive dash attack allows you full freedom of movement to hunt down wandering Aragami! • Fearsome New Threats: Ash Aragami and Devour Attacks! Dangerous new foes, Ash Aragami can utilize Devours Attacks and enter Burst Mode, increasing their strength exponentially! These enemies are not to be trifled with and will require you to take your weapon and your game to the next level!

## The Survivalists: Master Your Island Adventure

In **The Survivalists**, a dynamic, living island serves as your ultimate challenge and new home. This world evolves with day and night cycles, unveiling its secrets as you explore diverse landscapes. Prepare for a thrilling experience where you'll hunt for food or risk becoming prey to mythical creatures who may not welcome your presence. According to game developers, the wilderness is procedurally generated, ensuring each player's journey is unique.

Your adventure is driven by quests, whether given by a mysterious stranger or found washed ashore. Traverse various biomes, each offering distinct challenges and opportunities. If island life proves too daunting, **The Survivalists** supports cooperative play for up to four players. Team up to explore, gather loot, trade, and survive together.

The island's inhabitants, particularly monkeys, can become your greatest allies. Tame and train them for tasks like building, gathering wood, or defending against raids. The innovative Mimic System makes monkey management key to overcoming island challenges. Survival also depends on resourcefulness. Discover numerous recipes to craft tools, weapons, food, and structures. For powerful gear and to defeat hostiles, explore scattered temples, but be prepared for their guardians. This game tests strategic planning and combat readiness.

The highly anticipated first-person shooter, *Aliens vs. Predator™* (AvP), immerses players in the iconic and brutal conflict between two of science fiction's most formidable species. This game offers an exceptional experience for FPS enthusiasts, featuring three distinct and compelling single-player campaigns. Furthermore, it provides an extensive and unique 3-way multiplayer mode, promising countless hours of engaging gameplay.

Players will find themselves navigating the perilous environments surrounding the beleaguered colony of Freya's Prospect. The game's design emphasizes survival, hunting, and predation within these deadly jungles and swamps, delivering thrilling new first-person gameplay.

As a United States Marine, players will confront a deeply claustrophobic and terrifying experience. Light becomes a crucial ally, yet it is perpetually scarce, amplifying the tension. The Marines represent humanity's final bastion of defense, equipped with an arsenal of cutting-edge high-explosive and automatic weaponry.

Conversely, embodying the Predator allows players to stalk their prey from the shadows and from elevated positions. The ability to move with athletic grace through the treetops facilitates devastating ambushes. While the Predator is outfitted with a formidable array of exotic weapons and advanced tracking technology, a strict code of honor compels them to engage their targets up close for the ultimate trophy.

Finally, players can step into the role of the Alien, the universe's most lethal species. This perspective offers the chance to embody pure nightmare fuel – a relentless monster emerging from the darkness, swarming with countless others, possessing jaws like steel traps and claws as sharp as blades. The game culminates in a series of unique 3-way online modes where players can pit all three factions against each other. This reinvention of a pivotal moment in multiplayer gaming history allows for intense "tooth-to-claw-to-pulse rifle" combat. According to the developers, AvP utilizes Steam Cloud technology to store game statistics and skill information, which is then employed for matchmaking purposes, ensuring balanced and competitive online encounters.

Name: Furi
Description:
You were captured. Look what they’ve done to you… The jailer is the key, kill him and you’ll be free. Fight your way free in this ultra-responsive, fast-paced sword fighting and dual-stick shooting game. Boss design by Takashi Okazaki. Original soundtrack by Carpenter Brut, Danger, The Toxic Avenger, Lorn, Scattle, Waveshaper and Kn1ght!

## Eldest Souls: Humanity's Final Stand Against Ancient Gods

Humanity's centuries of servitude to the Old Gods ended with a desperate rebellion. These colossal beings were subsequently imprisoned within the Citadel, a monument to human resilience. However, their malevolent influence lingered. In a final act of vengeance, the Old Gods unleashed a devastating Desolation, pushing mankind to the precipice of extinction. Now, a lone Warrior, armed with a greatsword forged from pure Obsydian, emerges as humanity's last beacon of hope against the encroaching darkness.

The core of Eldest Souls lies in its demanding, fast-paced souls-like combat, where every decision and action carries significant weight. Victory against the Old Gods promises powers that transcend mortal understanding. The game's central challenge revolves around its intricate boss encounters. Each Old God represents a distinct trial, and overcoming them yields fitting and powerful rewards. According to lore presented within the game, these celestial beings were once worshipped, but their tyranny eventually led to their downfall and imprisonment.

As players venture through the labyrinthine Citadel in their quest to confront the Old Gods, they will uncover a world rich with detail and narrative. Intriguing NPCs offer guidance and shed light on the game's deep lore, while compelling questlines propel the story forward. Players will also unravel the dark mysteries surrounding the Old Gods and the circumstances of their imprisonment. The Citadel itself is a testament to human ingenuity, rendered in gorgeous 16-bit pixel art, yet it has fallen into disrepair and been overtaken by darkness.

Each boss confrontation presents unique challenges and offers valuable rewards. Claiming the powers of the defeated Old Gods unlocks a vast array of Talents and Abilities. This system allows for extensive customization of combat styles through numerous combinations, empowering players to forge their own unique path to victory. As noted in developer insights, this emphasis on player choice is a cornerstone of the Eldest Souls experience.

Key features of Eldest Souls include: battling through uniquely challenging combat encounters, exploring the ancient Citadel to discover NPCs and questlines, and unearthing the mystery of the Old Gods before total devastation. Players can also experience glorious, pixel-perfect 16-bit graphics and customize their combat style with a multitude of ability combinations.

**The Aquatic Adventure of the Last Human: A Deep Dive into Humanity's End**

Embark on a poignant, pixelated journey in *The Aquatic Adventure of the Last Human*, a side-scrolling action-adventure game. Players will explore the submerged ruins of a lost civilization, battling formidable sea creatures in a quest for answers about humanity's demise. The game masterfully blends a melancholic underwater atmosphere, showcasing both the ocean's inherent beauty and the impact of human influence on nature.

The narrative unfolds primarily through the evocative art and detailed backgrounds, supplemented by subtle textual clues. This approach to exploratory storytelling, according to the developers, allows players to piece together the story organically. Players will face unique conflict encounters, reminiscent of Odysseus's trials, where monstrous beasts and challenging obstacles must be overcome. The gameplay offers a polarized experience, shifting between moments of calm exploration and intense, life-or-death combat.

*The Aquatic Adventure of the Last Human* tackles significant global issues, including climate change, terrorism, and the rapid pace of technological progress, offering a unique perspective on their consequences. The premise is stark: players are the last human, and humanity is irrevocably doomed.

**A World Submerged: The Backstory**

The world as we knew it ended when rising sea levels, driven by unpredictable climate change, submerged the Earth's surface. Humanity was forced to adapt, migrating to underwater habitats to sustain energy harvesting and food production, fundamentally altering the appearance of cities and districts. By the year 2971, dwindling resources prompted the launch of sub-aquatic spaceships through a nearby wormhole in search of habitable planets. However, these expeditions proved disastrous.

The ship Argo9 eventually returned thousands of years later, long after humanity had become extinct. Players assume the role of the last human, tasked with exploring this lush, aquatic world. Your mission is to uncover whether the remnants of our species represent a tragic failure or an unavoidable outcome, all while confronting the deadly marine life that now inhabits the deep.

**The Digital DELUXE Edition**

For those seeking an enhanced experience, *The Aquatic Adventure of the Last Human || Digital DELUXE Edition* is available. This premium package includes a pixel art map detailing all boss locations, the complete soundtrack composed by Karl Flodin, and a digital booklet offering additional insights into the game's story, weaponry, and upgrade systems. Additionally, players will receive a collection of custom desktop backgrounds. All digital content for this edition can be found within the game's installation folder.

**Titan Souls: A Hero's Quest for Truth and Power**

In the mystical realm that bridges our world and the afterlife, lie the Titan Souls, the very essence and collective spirit of all existence. These vital energies, now fragmented and dispersed throughout ancient ruins, are vigilantly protected by the very titans tasked with their safekeeping. Players embark on a solitary journey as a hero, armed with a singular arrow, to reassemble these scattered shards of the Titan Soul. This epic quest is driven by a pursuit of profound truth and immense power, as indicated by the game's narrative.

The world of Titan Souls invites players to explore the remnants of a forgotten civilization, uncovering a pantheon of extraordinary and unique titans. Each colossal foe presents a distinct challenge, boasting savage attacks and possessing hidden weaknesses. Success hinges on the player's ability to identify and exploit these vulnerabilities, thereby vanquishing the beasts and absorbing the primordial power that courses through them. The combat system is elegantly simple yet demands strategic precision. Players must loose their solitary arrow at the monstrous titans and then summon it back to their hand, preparing for another forceful strike. Evasion is key; dashing and running from the titans' relentless assaults are crucial survival tactics, a point emphasized by the game's design.

However, death is not an endpoint but rather an inevitable and frequent occurrence in Titan Souls, serving as a learning opportunity on the path to mastery. Beyond the main adversaries, this realm is steeped in mystery. Long-forgotten titans lurk in the shadows and prowl the furthest reaches of the land. Discovering, destroying, and claiming the souls of these elusive beings is essential to unlocking the true extent of the power that permeates this world. According to lore, these hidden titans hold ancient knowledge that can significantly enhance a hero's capabilities, a detail that adds depth to the exploration.

Name: Grimrush
Description:
Grimrush is a top down action game in which you must face off a gauntlet of seven brutal boss fights. Balance offense and defense to take down the bosses and maximize your score! Key features: Three playable characters. A whole load of abilities for each character. Seven intense and wildly different boss battles. In depth scoring system and leaderboards. Graphics and sounds. Choose your character, primary ability and enter the gauntlet. The order of the bosses is randomized each time. After defeating a boss you can choose an additional active or passive ability out of four random ones provided that can be rerolled twice for a bit of control over the randomness. Accumulate and sustain combos to increase your attack damage, perform perfect dodges to recover mana and avoid damage to not die! These things also increase your score. As the abilities given on each run are randomized, you must adapt your playstyle accordingly.

Name: Boss Rush: Mythology
Description:
Boss Rush: Mythology - This is an action game in which you have to fight various creatures and gods from Greek, Scandinavian, Slavic and Egyptian mythologies. Take on the role of a mysterious knight who travels across different worlds in search of the most difficult opponents. Game Features Souls-like style combat system 20 bosses 6 types of weapons and 6 types of items to choose from Gamepad support Xbox 360/PS4 Choice of difficulty level

**ITTA: A Bullet-Hell Adventure of Resilience and Discovery**

ITTA is a captivating bullet-hell adventure game where players embark on a harrowing journey, confronting formidable, monstrous bosses. The narrative begins with Itta awakening to a grim scene: her family has tragically passed away. Her sole companion is a spectral entity, manifesting as the family cat, who bestows upon her a luminous revolver for defense. As Itta, players must confront the powerful beings imprisoned beneath the veneer of this seemingly tranquil world, engaging them in intense, challenging battles. From colossal ancient golems to grotesque, toothy creatures, Itta's quest will undoubtedly test the mettle of both the player and the protagonist.

To aid in this arduous undertaking, players can diversify their combat approach by discovering an array of weapons, each boasting unique attack styles. For moments when challenges become overwhelming, the game offers the flexibility to activate invincibility or player damage multipliers at any point. ITTA is deeply rooted in themes of personal struggle, reflecting the adage that where there is light, there must also be darkness. The core message emphasizes perseverance, urging players to continue their journey regardless of adversities encountered.

According to Glass Revolver, the studio founded by developer Jacob Williams, ITTA allows players to "topple 18 deadly bosses in tight, twin-stick, bullet-hell combat." Players will also "wield an arsenal of power spirit weapons to fight in new ways," and have the opportunity to "unlock the mystery of a bizarre, crumbling world and its cryptic inhabitants." The experience is further enhanced by the exploration of a "beautiful, pixel-art world backed by a haunting and eclectic musical score." Notably, the game ensures players never feel stuck, as they can "freely toggle damage multipliers or invincibility." Glass Revolver, inspired by diverse influences, aims to create "eclectic games that are uncompromising in their bizarre vision." The evocative musical score is the work of Kyle Lisenby, who has released compositions under the name Invisible Monsters since 2007.

Name: Starry Knight
Description:
Walk in Van Gogh’s paintings. Fight with the struggle that he went through in his life. Unveil the destiny of the starry, starry knight. Starry Knight is a 2D boss rush game focusing on unique boss design and hardcore action combat. All visual material of this game is from Van Gogh's paintings. Fun and challenging boss fight with unique battle mechanics and boss design. Gain new abilities after defeating bosses. Besides carefully designed normal difficulty, game provides easy mode for casual players, and a hard mode for players who are looking for challenges (with bosses having new moves and player having all the abilities). Compatible with controllers.

Name: Pedro Land DX
Description:
Pedro Land DX is a mini compilation of two games, Taco Tower and Pedro Land. Taco Tower marks Pedro Sombrero's start as a hero. His goal is to reclaim the ancient spire of his ancestors from the rabid monsters that roam his homeland, Doon. Pedro Land continues Pedro's quest to stop the monster invasions at their source in Death City, one of Doon's ancient landmarks. Both games involve run-and-gun action platforming like beloved games of the late 80s to early 90s, with a western feel! Players can challenge themselves to collect every coin in both games! Pedro Land also contains a secret Boss Rush mode, for those who want a real challenge... But be warned, you will get a good kick in the teeth! Controls: W - up/interact with NPCs, doors, etc A and D - left and right, respectively S - duck/down L/Spacebar - jump K/left click on mouse - shoot Enter - initiate game mode, exit NPC dialogue, etc

Name: Dream Flash
Description:
Dream Flash is a fast paced boss rush rouge-lite that follows a soul exploring the dreamscape. Collect a wide array of items and weapons in order to make the soul even more powerful. Gain the power to transform into even stronger forms in order to combat increasingly difficult enemies. Each run the soul gains recollection on everything encountered. Go deeper and deeper into the dream in order to unlock memories from the soul's past. Dream Flash has tons of content. Players will be able to explore the dreamscape for dozens of hours in order to unlock everything. Here is a list of planned content for the finished version of the game: - 80+ Bosses to Fight - 90+ Weapons - 300+ Items - 10+ States - 4 Complete Chapters for the soul to explore fully - Wild Secrets that will remain hidden until closer to release As of right now there are 68 bosses, 85 weapons, and 250+ items. More content is planned for the early access build every few months so keep a look out for even more things to play around with.

Name: Beat Saber
Description:
Beat Saber is an immersive rhythm experience you have never seen before! Enjoy tons of handcrafted levels and swing your way through the pulsing music beats, surrounded by a futuristic world. Use your sabers to slash the beats as they come flying at you – every beat indicates which saber you need to use and the direction you need to match. With Beat Saber you become a dancing superhero! Features Feel the Rhythm: Immerse yourself in the smoothest combination of music beats and visual effects in Beat Saber’s truly unique gameplay. Handcrafted Levels & Music: Unlike other rhythm games with generated content, music and levels in Beat Saber are drawn precisely by hand to enhance the music experience. Compete in Multiplayer: Challenge your friends or random opponents around the world. Challenging Campaign: Get better every day while completing objectives and challenges in the Campaign. Rise Up the Global Leaderboards: Compete against other Beat Saberists around the world in various difficulties. Easy to Learn, Fun to Master: Everyone can understand the basic game mechanics. It's easy for anyone to pick up and play. Great Exercise: Exercise while dancing and slashing the beats, Beat Saber gets you moving.

## Master Alchemical Engineering in Opus Magnum: A Deep Dive into Zachtronics' Puzzle Masterpiece

*Opus Magnum* invites players into the intricate world of alchemical engineering, casting them as Anataeus Vaya, a talented alchemist appointed to lead the prestigious House Van Tassen's alchemical operations. This pivotal role, however, suggests a narrative rich with complexities that extend far beyond mere technical proficiency. Developed by Zachtronics, a studio renowned for its intellectually stimulating puzzle titles like *SpaceChem* and *Infinifactory*, *Opus Magnum* places a strong emphasis on the fascinating mechanics of the transmutation engine. This core apparatus is the key to players crafting a diverse range of essential items, from life-saving elixirs and valuable gemstones to potent armaments, highlighting the profound significance of alchemical engineering within the game's narrative universe.

At its core, the gameplay revolves around the ingenious design and meticulous construction of sophisticated machinery capable of executing intricate alchemical transformations. By thoughtfully deploying components such as programmable arms, conveyor tracks, and specialized alchemical apparatus, players can automate their complex processes. *Opus Magnum* presents a series of open-ended challenges that champion inventive problem-solving. Players are motivated to pursue the most elegant, efficient, and compact solutions, with the added benefit of comparing their creations against a global community of players. Successfully designed machines can be exported as animated GIFs, enabling players to proudly display their ingenuity and accomplishments.

Further enriching the player experience is the seamless integration of Steam Workshop, which offers an intuitive editor for the creation and dissemination of custom puzzles. The most remarkable puzzles developed by the community are regularly showcased in the *Journal of Alchemical Engineering*, a curated publication by Zachtronics. Beyond its captivating puzzle mechanics, *Opus Magnum* unfolds a compelling storyline steeped in intrigue and conspiracy among the city's powerful Houses. In this environment, alchemists, endowed with the ability to fabricate virtually anything, command substantial influence, positioning them as figures of both admiration and potential peril. For those seeking a change of pace, *Opus Magnum* also features *Sigmar's Garden*, a delightful alchemy-themed solitaire minigame designed to offer a tranquil diversion. As noted by game developers, the incorporation of such minigames can significantly boost player engagement and provide a variety of gameplay experiences.

**Street Fighter V: A Comprehensive Guide**

Street Fighter V (SFV) is a renowned fighting game celebrated for its accessible yet deeply strategic gameplay. This guide offers a clear overview of its core features, game modes, and content updates, designed to assist both new and returning players.

SFV boasts a diverse roster of 16 unique characters, each with distinct fighting styles and backstories. Players can engage in various match types, including Ranked Matches for global leaderboard competition and Fight Money rewards, Casual Matches for low-pressure battles, and Battle Lounge for private matches with friends. The game supports cross-play, enabling PlayStation 4 and Steam users to compete against each other.

Key game modes and editions enhance the SFV experience. Street Fighter V: Arcade Edition introduced engaging modes like Arcade Mode for classic scenarios, Team Battle Mode to test fighting prowess, and Extra Battle Mode for online challenges offering rewards such as Fight Money and XP. Fight Money serves as the in-game currency for unlocking characters, costumes, and stages. The free cinematic story expansion, "A Shadow Falls," details M. Bison's plot to seize power by activating seven Black Moons. Street Fighter V: Champion Edition compiles all content from the original and Arcade Editions, excluding select cosmetic DLC, providing access to 40 characters, 34 stages, and over 200 costumes, along with all post-Arcade Edition content.

The game's strategic depth is built upon several core mechanics. The V-Trigger unleashes powerful, character-specific abilities when the V-Gauge is full, while V-Skills are unique moves that help build this gauge. V-Reversals are defensive maneuvers that use V-Gauge to interrupt opponent attacks. Special and EX Special Attacks are fundamental offensive moves that consume the Critical Gauge for enhanced versions, with the Critical Art being the ultimate attack available when the Critical Gauge is fully charged. According to Capcom, these mechanics provide a rich combat system.

Dead Cells is a unique "RogueVania" experience, blending the progressive exploration of a Metroidvania with the high-stakes replayability of a roguelite. This genre fusion, which the developers playfully call "RogueVania," draws inspiration from classics like Castlevania: Symphony of the Night and modern roguelites such as Rogue Legacy and Enter the Gungeon.

The game offers a compelling mix of features:

*   **RogueVania Gameplay:** Players navigate an interconnected world, enjoying the persistent threat of permadeath alongside the replayability inherent in roguelites.
*   **2D Souls-lite Combat:** Expect challenging yet fair combat, featuring over fifty unique weapons and spells. An essential "emergency panic roll" provides a crucial escape from dangerous situations.
*   **Nonlinear Progression:** As players unlock permanent abilities, new paths become accessible, allowing for strategic choices in how to approach objectives based on their current build, play style, or mood.
*   **Exploration:** The island is filled with secret rooms, hidden passages, and diverse landscapes. Discovering these elements, along with character evolution and permanent weapon upgrades, incentivizes thorough exploration and echoes the design of classic Metroidvanias. Ultimately, player skill is paramount, as roguelites emphasize continuous improvement to overcome increasingly difficult challenges.

Dead Cells, which departed Early Access on August 7th, 2018, boasts:

*   **13 Distinct Levels:** Each level presents a unique atmosphere, challenging foes, and secrets to uncover.
*   **4 Formidable Bosses:** These bosses are designed to test even the most skilled players.
*   **Approximately 90 Weapons and Skills:** A vast arsenal including spears, swords, bows, and freeze blasts.
*   **4 Special Powers:** These act as Metroidvania-style gear locks, unlocking new areas and paths.
*   **An Epic Combat System:** Responsive, fluid, and undeniably fun.
*   **Daily Run Mode:** Complete with leaderboards for competitive play.

The game promises hours of engaging gameplay, with playtime varying from 10 to 30 hours or more depending on player skill. While frustration is a common companion, the journey to "git gud" is a rewarding one.

## Rogue Legacy 2: A Deeper, More Evolved Legacy

Rogue Legacy 2 reinvents the genealogical rogue-lite experience, blending classic rogue-like elements with persistent progression. Each heir you control is unique, inheriting not only traits and abilities but also the accumulated wealth and upgrades from their predecessors. This allows for a dynamic and evolving gameplay loop where strategic investment in your family manor directly impacts your descendants' chances of survival and success.

### Evolving Gameplay and Unforeseen Challenges

The world of Rogue Legacy 2 is a constantly shifting landscape, ensuring that no two runs are ever the same. New monsters, environmental hazards, and procedurally generated layouts demand adaptability and quick thinking. Success hinges on improvisation rather than rote memorization, as highlighted by the game's emphasis on dynamic challenges.

### Diverse Classes and Playstyles

Rogue Legacy 2 introduces a robust roster of 15 distinct classes, each offering a unique playstyle. Players can choose to embody the ranged precision of the Ranger, the aerial assault of the Dragon Lancer, or the crowd-controlling performance of the Bard. This variety caters to a wide range of player preferences and encourages experimentation with different combat strategies.

### A Striking New Aesthetic

The sequel boasts a fresh artistic direction, featuring 2.5D visuals with 3D characters set against meticulously hand-drawn backdrops. The art style employs heavy shading and advanced animation techniques to maintain the series' signature look while introducing a more polished presentation.

### Enhanced Biome Generation and Metroidvania Elements

Significant advancements in biome generation ensure that each area feels distinct and freshly designed. Furthermore, Rogue Legacy 2 integrates true Metroidvania elements through the introduction of Heirlooms. These permanent ability upgrades fundamentally alter gameplay and unlock new pathways and secrets within the world, requiring players to prove their mettle to acquire them.

### Refined Traits and New Progression Systems

Building upon the original's foundation, Traits 2.0 now feature gold modifiers, incentivizing players to embrace challenging traits for greater rewards. The introduction of Relics offers unique run-altering items that provide stat boosts and new abilities, though their acquisition comes with the risk of losing them upon hero death.

### Accessible and Deep Narrative

Rogue Legacy 2 prioritizes accessibility with customizable "House Rules," allowing players to adjust various gameplay parameters. The game also features an expanded lore and a deep narrative that unfolds across multiple New Game+ cycles. Players will uncover the history of a fallen kingdom and the secrets of those responsible, fostering connections with the characters encountered. The New Game+ system offers extensive replayability, with players able to customize the difficulty through unique biome hazards and boss encounters, ensuring a fresh experience with each subsequent playthrough.

Beyond these core features, Rogue Legacy 2 offers a wealth of additional content, including Scar Challenges, Fairy Rooms, and the Curio Shoppe, promising an expansive and engaging adventure.

## Raw Data: A VR Technothriller in Neo-Shinjuku

In Neo-Shinjuku, 2271, the Eden Corporation maintains a seemingly benevolent global control. However, the elite hacker resistance, SyndiK8, has uncovered a disturbing truth behind Eden Corp's advanced robotic products. As a SyndiK8 operative, your mission is to infiltrate Eden Tower, acquire as much Raw Data as possible, and escape to expose Eden Corp's sinister agenda.

### The Mystery of Chairman Shiro's "Promotion"

The secrets surrounding Chairman Shiro’s new “Promotion” program add a layer of complexity to the mission. Questions arise about the program's true purpose and what Eden Corporation is actually collecting, suggesting the corporation's benevolent image may be a facade for something far more sinister.

### Immersive VR Action Combat

Raw Data is designed for virtual reality, offering an adrenaline-fueled experience. Its action combat, intuitive controls, challenging enemies, and compelling sci-fi atmosphere fully immerse players in Eden Corp's surreal environments. Players can undertake the mission solo or team up with a friend for a futuristic technothriller adventure that tests wits, boldness, and endurance.

Active VR gameplay allows players to physically control their actions, granting instant access to advanced weapons and nanotech powers. Shared spaces with avatars and motion tracking encourage natural communication through body language and environmental interaction.

### Key Gameplay Features

*   **Active VR Combat:** Engage in dynamic combat using your body. Wield dual pistols, katanas, shotguns, and fists. The physical loadout system allows weapons to be holstered directly onto your body, with stats displayed on an in-game forearm display.
*   **Hostile Takeover PvP:** Experience intense 5v5 matches across multiple king-of-the-hill maps. Four distinct hero classes with optimized abilities and intuitive locomotion are available, along with power-ups for stealth and armor. A 1v1 Duel Mode is also planned.
*   **Hero Selection:** Choose from several distinct heroes, each with unique fighting styles, advanced weaponry, special abilities, and ultimate powers. These include:
    *   Bishop, the Gun Cleric
    *   Saija, the Cyber Ninja
    *   Boss, the Street Merc
    *   Elder, the Rogue Hunter
    Players can defy gravity, slow time, charge shots, crush enemies, and unleash devastating attacks.
*   **Futuristic Arsenal:** Access a range of weapons, including dual handguns, pump-action shotguns, iron knuckles, and laser swords. Deploy turrets and holographic shields for tactical advantage.
*   **Adaptable Enemies:** Confront a variety of robotic threats, such as stealth ninjas, laser gunners, rocket heavies, jumping crawlers, exploder bots, flying drones, charger mechs, ion beams, and towering megabots.
*   **Cross-Platform Online Co-op:** Team up with friends regardless of their platform in a shared VR space that promotes social communication through body language and facial expressions.

Subnautica is a thrilling underwater survival game that plunges players into an alien ocean planet after a crash landing. This expansive, procedurally generated world necessitates exploration, careful resource management, and inventive crafting for survival. The fundamental gameplay involves venturing into varied biomes, from bright shallow reefs to the immense pressure of abyssal trenches, all while meticulously managing a vital oxygen supply. Players will encounter a diverse range of alien life, some helpful and others presenting considerable dangers.

Upon arrival, players must swiftly secure essential resources like water and food. Scavenging the ocean floor provides the materials needed to craft crucial gear. This includes better diving equipment for deeper dives, habitat modules for establishing underwater bases, submersibles for quicker travel, and advanced tools for gathering resources and defense. Constructing these bases is paramount, enabling players to personalize their underwater dwellings on the seafloor, manage hull integrity against extreme pressure, and create central points for storage, vehicle docking, and oxygen refills. Beyond mere survival, Subnautica prompts players to uncover the planet's secrets, investigating the reason for their crash, the ailment affecting marine life, and the remnants of alien constructions, with the ultimate objective of escaping the planet. Players can also strategically engage with the alien ecosystem, leveraging it to their benefit by luring predators or evading them. For extreme depths, the PRAWN Suit (Pressure-Re-Active Waterproof Nanosuit) is essential, offering improved mobility and the capacity to equip tools such as drills or propulsion cannons. The game's day/night cycle significantly influences gameplay; daytime allows for safer exploration, while nighttime unveils hidden perils and a distinct, dangerous beauty. Subterranean exploration is also a significant aspect, with extensive cave systems beneath the ocean floor presenting unique obstacles, from navigating confined passages to exploring caverns lit by bioluminescent plants or the glow of lava.

According to developer Unknown Worlds, a studio known for its work on the Half-Life mod Natural Selection, Subnautica was developed through an open process. Player input actively guided its updates. It is important to note that this game may feature flashing lights and could be unsuitable for individuals with photosensitive epilepsy. Player discretion is advised.

## Until You Fall: A VR Hack-and-Slash Roguelite

Champions, prepare yourselves! Version 1.3 of *Until You Fall* is now available, introducing exciting new features such as two-handed weapons, smooth turning, and comprehensive localization and subtitles. Developed by the creative minds behind *I Expect You To Die*, this arcade-inspired VR hack-and-slash roguelite challenges players to discover and master their unique fighting style, promising hours of exhilarating, kinetic fun.

### The Cycle of Combat: Fight. Fall. Rise Again.

Prepare for the ultimate battle. Immerse yourself in a vibrant, neon-fantasy world teeming with magic-infused monsters. As you move your arms and body to the pulsating synthwave soundtrack, you'll attack, block, cast spells, and dodge your way deeper into the heart of Rokar. Equip yourself with a diverse arsenal of gameplay-altering weapons, growing stronger with each encounter as you strike down the monstrosities that inhabit this fallen land.

### The Story of Rokar

Rokar, once a thriving civilization powered by the mystical energy known as Aether, has been devastated by a Calamity of unknown origin. Now, its crystallized ruins are overrun by monsters and twisted spirits. You are the last remaining Rune Knight, the sole defender against these encroaching horrors. With the guidance of a mysterious Runesmith, you will forge the weapons necessary to embark on your crucial campaign. The question remains: are you the Champion that Rokar desperately needs?

### Key Features

*   **Intense Physical Gameplay:** Stay active and engaged to survive the relentless onslaught.
*   **Driving Synthwave Soundtrack:** The energetic music will keep you moving both in and out of the game. The Original Soundtrack is available for free on Steam.
*   **Diverse Enemy Encounters:** Face cadres of corrupted monstrosities, each demanding unique strategies for defeat.
*   **Stunning Environments:** Explore a variety of gorgeous, neon-tinged landscapes.
*   **Varied Weaponry:** Choose your combat approach with a selection of unique one- and two-handed weapons.
*   **Replayable Roguelite Experience:** Each run offers randomized rewards, powerups, enemy configurations, and rooms, ensuring no two playthroughs are ever the same. According to game developers, this design choice significantly enhances replayability.
*   **Customizable Comfort and Accessibility:** Tailor your experience with options designed to help you move and battle with ease.

### Join the Community

Become part of our growing community on Discord! Connect with the developers, share your battle strategies, and compete for a chance to win exclusive *Until You Fall* merchandise.

## Mastering Survival on the Hostile Asteroid of Oxygen Not Included

**Oxygen Not Included** thrusts players into the challenging role of managing a colony of Duplicants on a perilous asteroid. The primary goal is to ensure their survival and happiness by providing fundamental necessities such as breathable air, stable temperatures, and sufficient food. Success in this complex simulation game hinges on the strategic management of your base, your Duplicants, and the surrounding environment.

### Core Elements for Colony Success

Effective colony management in **Oxygen Not Included** requires mastering several critical areas. Resource acquisition and careful utilization are vital from the start; every material discovered is essential for construction, power generation, or direct survival. Building a functional base involves establishing efficient plumbing and power networks to distribute resources and maintain operations. Crucially, Duplicant morale must be a top priority. Unhappy Duplicants can cause colony-wide problems, making downtime, comfortable living conditions, and quality food essential for their contentment.

Temperature control is a constant challenge, demanding attention to both external environmental heat and the heat generated by Duplicants and machinery to prevent freezing or overheating. Managing gases and liquids through smart piping systems is key for distributing air, water, and other vital fluids, ensuring all colony members receive what they need. A robust power grid, fueled by sources like coal, hydrogen, or natural gas, is the base's lifeblood, requiring careful power consumption management to avoid blackouts. The **Oxygen Overlay** is an invaluable tool for visualizing air circulation, identifying carbon dioxide buildup, and tracking oxygen production. The game also emphasizes recycling, transforming waste into useful resources like fuel, breathable air, or even food. As one player noted, "If you’re clever, you might even be able to run a base off colonist farts."

Navigating the dynamic world of **Oxygen Not Included** means adapting to unique asteroid layouts and the challenges presented in each new game. The unforgiving nature of space is often highlighted by player experiences, with one humorously observing, "Experience tons of untamed space rocks, then suffocate to death in them!" Preparedness for the unpredictable elements of procedurally generated worlds is crucial for long-term survival.

Total War: WARHAMMER III plunges players into a cataclysmic conflict ignited by the final moments of a dying god. This celestial event tears open a rift to the terrifying Realm of Chaos, unleashing the malevolent influence of the four Ruinous Powers: Khorne, Nurgle, Tzeentch, and Slaanesh. These ancient entities sow seeds of darkness and despair across the land, threatening to consume all.

Standing as bulwarks against this encroaching doom are the stoic warriors of Kislev and the expansive empire of Grand Cathay. However, their defense is challenged by a vengeful Daemon Prince, driven by a burning desire to obliterate those who orchestrated his corruption. The ensuing war promises to be all-encompassing, posing a fundamental question to the player: will you confront your inner demons, or will you harness their power to your will?

This ambitious installment in the Total War series offers an unparalleled strategic experience. Players can command seven distinct races, each boasting hundreds of unique units, to raise formidable armies and engage in epic real-time battles across a world of immense scale and visual splendor. The narrative journey is captivating, leading players through the mind-bending landscapes of the Realm of Chaos and back again. As highlighted by the game's design philosophy, the strategy sandbox ensures that no two campaigns will ever unfold identically, providing enduring replayability.

Total War: WARHAMMER III features an impressive roster of 10 playable Legendary Lords. Players have the choice to align with the Chaos Gods, commanding one of their Daemonic Champions, or to embody the ancient, transforming Dragon of Grand Cathay. Alternatively, one can defend the frigid nation of Kislev as the Ice Queen, or embrace the role of the ultimate antagonist as the Daemon Prince. The Daemon Prince himself is highly customizable, offering a vast array of body parts and powers that allow for billions of unique combinations, catering to diverse playstyles.

The multiplayer component has been significantly expanded in this iteration. The game boasts an expansive 8-player Realm of Chaos multiplayer campaign, alongside the intense 1 v 1 Domination mode. Furthermore, story-driven multiplayer campaigns specifically built around the lore of Kislev and Grand Cathay are available. Coupled with ranked and custom battles, players have an abundance of options to unleash chaos and engage in strategic warfare with friends, as noted in various game previews.

**The Fabulous Fear Machine: Master the Art of Spreading Terror**

*The Fabulous Fear Machine* is a narrative-driven strategy game that masterfully blends pulp horror with deep strategic gameplay. Developed by the acclaimed creators of *Do Not Feed the Monkeys*, this unique experience places you at the helm as the newest Master of the Machine. Your ultimate goal is to cultivate and spread fear, expanding your insidious influence by strategically deploying Legend cards—chilling tales, whispered urban myths, and unsettling conspiracy theories that thrive in the darkest recesses of the human psyche.

To ensure your Legends flourish, you will meticulously manage your operations. This involves dispatching Agents to explore and infiltrate new locations, harvesting and managing vital resources, resolving critical in-game events, and engaging in espionage to anticipate rivals' moves. With an expansive roster of over 80 Legends to choose from, including cryptids like the Black Dog, urban legends such as Bloody Mary, and conspiracy theories like Reptilians, you can craft a truly custom blend of terror for every city you target. Horror evolves as you plant seeds of fear; observe and analyze media reactions to your deployed Legends, feeding them to enhance their power. Rivals and forces of good will strive to dismantle the Machine's influence, so plan your strategies accordingly, lest your carefully crafted Legends be twisted into saccharine inspirational stories or cheerful mascots.

You will direct the unfolding stories of several Masters operating across different global regions. As you progress, delve into the rich history of the Machine, uncover the nature of its enemies, and learn about the Agents who serve you. *The Fabulous Fear Machine* is presented by AMC Games and SHUDDER. Early development received support from Red.es and FEDER (European Regional Development Fund).

## Broken Lines: A Tactical Survival Experience

In *Broken Lines*, you command a squad of soldiers who have crash-landed in an alternate Eastern Europe. Stranded deep behind enemy lines, your mission is to guide them home safely before the escalating war consumes them. Success depends on fostering teamwork and making smart strategic decisions, as each soldier has unique personalities and often conflicting ideas.

The soldiers face not only external threats but also the immense mental strain of war, leading to a spectrum of opinions. Some want to investigate their crash, while others prefer a cautious approach, awaiting rescue. Whispers of abandoning the mission also arise, highlighting internal conflicts. As the "unseen hand," you must steer this diverse group toward safety. Every choice, from map navigation to combat, carries significant weight and has tangible consequences.

*Broken Lines* blends narrative depth with real-time tactical combat. Gameplay unfolds in real-time, but offers brief, critical windows for issuing commands, demanding quick thinking. Players must adapt to the dynamic battlefield, react to changing circumstances, use their surroundings, and face the repercussions of their actions. Your decisions influence the squad's journey and the world around them. Beyond individual opinions, your choices can lead to the destruction or salvation of villages, and can plunge regions into darkness or bring them under enemy control. Balancing team morale with your convictions is paramount for survival.

The critically acclaimed gameplay returns, now featuring the added threat of zombies. Players are encouraged to scout the battlefield, strategically lure undead hordes into skirmishes with enemy forces, and then eliminate weakened survivors. Alternatively, players can unleash powerful weaponry. Vigilance is key, as the undead can attack from any direction. Facing the undead can be aided by "liquid courage." As soldiers drink, they gain perks and abilities. Combined with the vast arsenal left behind by those who fled, players will discover a diverse range of armaments and skills, perfectly suited for combating the zombie apocalypse.

Name: Stubbs the Zombie in Rebel Without a Pulse
Description:
Be the Zombie. Kick A** and Take Brains It’s 1959 and the city of Punchbowl, PA, is a beacon of progress and ideal living. Show the living that law and order are no match for a dead man on a mission. Your boyfriend’s back Maggie, and Punchbowl is gonna be in trouble! Eat Brains Chomp on the living and replenish your bodily arsenal of: zombie sputum, gut grenades, and the stunning unholy flatulence Possess Punchbowl’s Population Clamp your severed hand to a barbershop quartet singer’s head and raygun away Build Your Zombie Horde Convert your enemies into undead allies & lead a zombie assault on the living Bring Civilization to its Knees Show the retro-futuristic city of Punchbowl, PA that they can’t escape the past Stubbs and Chill Invite a friend to play as Grubbs for classic couch cooperative hijinks. (Friend not included)

## ZAR: A Zombie Apocalypse Survival Experience in Russia

**ZAR (Zombie Apocalypse in Russia)**, an independent first-person shooter released in 2023, immerses players in a post-coronavirus outbreak scenario. The game's narrative begins with Russian authorities attempting to contain a new epidemic by administering a vaccine. While initially successful, a disturbing development occurred six months later: those buried after succumbing to the virus began to reanimate as zombies.

The affected region was subsequently quarantined by the military. To investigate this unprecedented phenomenon, volunteers were recruited for a modest fee, attracting the unemployed from across Russia seeking work. Players assume the role of one of these volunteers, tasked with surviving as long as possible within the quarantine zone. This survival hinges on studying zombie behavior, understanding their strengths and weaknesses, and eliminating two unique zombie types that possess special abilities for unknown reasons.

The game features several notable enemies. The **Gravedigger**, encountered at the village cemetery, wields a shovel for powerful melee attacks and can summon three additional zombies. The **Fisherman**, found near the waterfall, attacks with a hook and fish in close combat and induces intense thirst in players with a ranged attack. A **Hunter**, a former taiga resident driven mad by the outbreak, aggressively defends his forest hut. He uses a hunting knife in close combat and fires a double-barreled sawn-off shotgun at range. Players may acquire the hunter's knife and shotgun as lootable trophies.

Within the village, players will also encounter essential non-player characters (NPCs) who are also in the quarantine zone to earn money. These include a **Food Vendor** for sustenance, a **Weapon Vendor** for armaments, and a **Doctor** for medical aid. Although these vendors are paid for their services, they are obligated to distribute food, weapons, and medicine to other players within the zone free of charge.

Name: No Place for the Dissident
Description:
No Place for the Dissident is a strategic political simulator. You'll be responsible for the creation, growth, and adoption of a new ideology to dominate the world. But be careful, as your ideas gain traction, some will alert about its danger. The opposition will rise, and, if not controlled properly, it will wipe out your influence. Ideologies have shaped the world, will you be able to shape it as you want? In No Place for the Dissident , you'll have to spread a new ideology to dominate the world. Whatever means are necessary. Key Features Highend Simulator . The engine performs a worldwide simulation with hundreds of thousands of points. Our engine tracks your influence in each bit of the world, and each bit will interact with the rest. Population Segments . People are segmented into five different categories: neutral, supporters, violent supporters, opposition, and violent opposition . Social Traits . Your politics and actions will affect five different traits in each country: expansion, conversion, polarization, censorship, and terror. Actions . Make peaceful protests, manipulate through TV, newspapers, fake news, and social media. Create associations, create militias, lead coups, repress opposition, and even declare war to enemy countries where your ideology didn't do well. Politics . Adopt new politics from the ideology tree to exponentially expand your ideas and crush the opposition. Adoptions of new politics will unlock bonuses and new actions to perform on each country. Multiplayer . Competitive 1vs1 online multiplayer. Real data of 175 countries : population density, economy, military power, political regime, and more! Governments . Access the government through free elections or by overthrowing the existing one by force. Events . From assassination plots to sexual scandals. News Feed . You'll make it to the headlines! War . Avoid civil wars, declare wars and, if you are sure, launch devastating nuclear strikes. Face the consequences . You may have dominated the world, but at what cost? Warning This game includes dreadful and extremely violent motifs. It also contains quotes and points of view of the most violent historic figures. Millions of people have suffered the ultimate consequence of these beliefs. We, the developers, consider that this should be reason enough to reflect on it.

Name: Pandemic: The Virus Outbreak
Description:
Join the community! A government simulation game in which you're the president and have to strategically plan what actions to take to balance the statistics of your country during a pandemic. Are you good enough to make your country overcome the pandemic? Try it out! Want to know what happens if there are no reactions to a pandemic? Try it out! You're the president of a new country, that is now part of the earth, in 1/1/2020 a pandemic has started. You have to balance 8 statistics: Infections, Deaths, Recovered, Economic growth, Unemployment, Reputation, Health system workload and vaccine development. There are 2 main action types you can take to balance the statistics Isolation measures - Force masks - Close country borders - Close schools - Stop tourism - Close stores - Stop industry - Stop events Budget Investments - Vaccine research - Health System capacity - Economy propaganda - Virus propaganda - Aid package for businesses

## President for Life: A Satirical Thriller Game

This satirical political thriller plunges players into the role of a U.S. President elected in 2020, whose primary objective is not public service, but evading justice for a past as a shady businessman. The ultimate goal is to ratify Amendment 28, securing lifetime presidential immunity. The game blends dark humor with terrifying absurdity, forcing players to navigate a treacherous path to absolute power.

To achieve this, players must govern like a mob boss, managing both official staff and an unofficial network of enforcers with ruthless, mafioso-like strategies. This involves dealing with past transgressions and new challenges, while battling opposition from competitors, the establishment, the media, and foreign leaders. The presidency is characterized by unconventional actions, ranging from bizarre economic policies like price caps on video games and banning online advertising, to controlling the entire internet and even assisting China with censorship. Foreign interventions can be as outlandish as rescuing Russia's overthrown president or sending a hamster into space, while criminal assistance might involve aiding a serial killer's escape.

Loyalty within the team, composed of thugs, hackers, journalists, and lawyers, is maintained by leveraging knowledge of their personal secrets, such as gambling, alcohol abuse, or domestic violence. Their moral dilemmas can be conveniently resolved with generous bonuses from a charity fund, as noted by [game mechanics]. The path to absolute power requires altering the U.S. Constitution through persuasion, blackmail, bribery, and bullying. Success hinges on managing resources like approval ratings, cash, and crew with unprecedented tactics, executing "presidential duties" such as speeches and crisis management, and assembling a shadow cabinet of assassins, hackers, and lobbyists for missions accomplished through any means necessary. Players will experience a compelling narrative with branching choices, questioning whether they control their term or are merely a pawn, ruling the country with a shadow cabinet that commands global fear and respect.

Name: Project Apocalypse
Description:
Post-apocalyptic city builder with zombies and cubes. Build a camp for survivors. Improve and upgrade it with different buildings. Craft and trade items. Protect your camp from the infected. Survive. Current state Alpha version. All the basic game mechanics and systems are there, but they need to be expanded and improved with content. Survival mode - build your base, gather resources, defend against the infected Sandbox mode - feel free to experiment! Basic AI (work, social, combat) for survivors Character needs, health, inventory, combat systems 1 huge map to explore with random generation for each playthrough Production system Order-based control system for your survivors Different buildings and decorations for your camp Roadmap More buildings. Social, Industry, leisure, defense, and other categories. Detailed character needs and stats. Hunger, stress, comfort, and more. Management system. Different jobs and orders. Improved AI. Different behaviors, character archetypes. Trade and Industry system. Produce and trade goods with other camps (AI-controlled) Three game modes. Infinite Survival, Objective-based Missions, and Sandbox. Camp decoration and customization system, so you can make it truly Your camp. Improved visuals and sounds. Powergoals Raids. Gather a raid party and sent it to different dangerous places. Interactive Text Events and mini-quests Character skills and leveling Missions

Name: Covid Simulator
Description:
'So Well Made It's A Little Depressing' - Kotaku PLEASE WEAR A MASK, AND GET VACCINATED! Since early 2020, Covid-19 has caused mayhem the world over. Spreading rapidly, it can cause illness, long term disability, and death. The Covid-19 pandemic has been met with much political turmoil - causing misinformation, violence, and unnecessary risk. Many confusing charts and diagrams exists highlighting the dangers of Covid-19 in the workplace. COVID SIMULATOR hopes to visualize, in an understandable way, how quickly Covid-19 spreads, becoming a disaster. The game is an open sandbox to enjoy, or just fill yourself with dread In Covid-19 Simulator you can: Play in a sandbox environment to experiment with Create a procedural generated work spaces which you can adjust Create your OWN workplace with the level editor Name and track your workers Adjust the number of employees, and their work schedules Adjust infection rates, mask adoption, and vaccination rates Manually add/remove masks of different varieties, and give vaccinations Swap between the Alpha, Delta, and Omicron Covid strains Create your own CUSTOM Covid strain! Adopt mask mandates, and vaccine mandates Hire/Fire Employees Encourage Pro/Anti Vaccine behavior Give 'alternative medicine' treatments Speed up or slow down time to view the results View and save charts as PNG or CSV, showing spread over time Integrate with Twitch to let your viewers be in the game! TWITCH CONNECT In the game folder under Assets/Resources/ is a text file labeled 'TwitchConnect.' simply input your information and the game will automatically be connected to your steam channel. Characters in game will be named for people chatting in your chat. Simply delete your information if you'd no longer like that connection. -----DISCLAIMER----- COVID-19 is a serious disease. The game includes satire of current political climate regarding Covid-19, but hopes to convey a very serious attitude regarding the reality of this deadly disease. THE PRIMARY CONDITIONS THAT EFFECT REAL WORLD COVID-19 INFECTION/TRANSMISSION/CONDITIONS/RESULTS ARE: AGE HEALTH EXPOSURE CONDITIONS INCOME ACCESS TO HEALTH CARE The game bases the infections/transmissions/conditions/results of Covid-19 on the US CDC statistics which are based on age/gender/health/ethnicity. This game does not wish to insinuate any ethnic disposition towards Covid-19, however it is personally important to me to demonstrate the extreme dangers that minorities are currently experiencing with the pandemic. It is impossible for a simple game to fully simulate the intricacies of every day human life. The random ages, genders, health, and ethnicity is based on percentages reported in the US Census data for people in the work place. These are nation wide averages, and does not reflect any particular area. I am NOT a statistician or a virologist . I am a game developer. This simulator/visualization appears to have similar outcomes to real world results - however it will likely never be real world accurate. It is only a game, meant to demonstrate the dangers of unchecked Covid-19 spread. Within the game files is a stat sheet which can be edited if you would like to change the outcomes/results! If you ARE a statistician or a virologist, please contact me - I would LOVE to expand the accuracy of this game.

## Customers From Hell: A Retail Worker's Revenge Fantasy

"Customers From Hell" offers a cathartic escape for anyone tired of difficult patrons, transforming common retail frustrations into an exhilarating zombie-survival game. This third-person shooter lets players defend essential supplies against waves of aggressive, stereotyped "annoying" customers, often referred to as "Karens." The game taps into the shared retail worker fantasy of confronting troublesome patrons without real-world consequences, offering simulated "mayhem" and a sense of "payback."

The core gameplay revolves around wave survival, where players must protect their base and dwindling resources from increasingly tough threats. To survive, players can fortify their position with barriers, deploy tactical traps, upgrade their arsenal with diverse weapons, and enhance base defenses. Key features include endless wave-survival, diverse enemy types like "Karens" and "grumpy thieves," an extensive weaponry selection, strategic base building, meaningful base upgrades, unlockable new zones, and a comedic, lighthearted style with a charming low-poly art. Developed by a single individual at Steelkrill Studio, the game aims for a fun and engaging experience, with the developer welcoming player feedback for ongoing improvements.

*(Note: This game is a humorous, fictional outlet. The developers do not endorse offensive behavior towards real individuals.)*

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) is a minimalist sci-fi platformer focused on momentum-based gameplay. Players must expertly navigate obstacles, evade enemy robots, and collect gold. This title represents the N series' return to PC after a 12-year break, during which developers focused on refining the platforming experience, according to the development team.

The core of N++ involves mastering momentum to complete levels and achieve high scores. Each meticulously hand-crafted level presents an intense platforming challenge, requiring players to use fluid movement to "solve" stages and reach the exit. This design ensures a consistent, high-quality experience.

Beyond its demanding single-player campaign, N++ offers extensive features for replayability and community engagement. These include 4,340 hand-made levels and secret challenges. A Level Editor and Global Level Sharing foster a vibrant community, with leaderboards and replays available for all levels. The game also features local co-op and competitive multiplayer for up to four players, a hardcore mode for skilled players, 63 electronic music tracks, and 119 color palettes. Critics note that N++ encourages continuous technique refinement, offering a gameplay experience with no apparent skill ceiling.

The musical adventure game, Tadpole Treble, has earned considerable acclaim for its inventive gameplay and delightful presentation. Developed by the creative minds behind the well-known webcomic Brawl in the Family, this title casts players as Baton, a tadpole venturing through a world where music is not merely a backdrop but a fundamental element of the experience.

In Tadpole Treble, players actively participate with the game's soundtrack. The central gameplay mechanic requires players to "play along" with the music. This involves skillfully dodging predators and environmental hazards that are ingeniously represented as musical notes within each level's song. Success is intrinsically tied to precise timing and rhythm, as players must evade enemies and strike percussive notes exactly on the beat. This core mechanic not only contributes to accumulating points but also charges Baton's "Treble Charge," a potent ability capable of clearing obstacles and adversaries in its path.

Reviewers have widely praised Tadpole Treble's distinctive approach. Nintendo Enthusiast, for instance, described the music as "amazing," bestowing upon the game a score of 9/10. Destructoid shared this positive sentiment, characterizing the game as "charming" and awarding it an 8/10. The Inner Circle Games Network expressed particular enthusiasm, stating, "Guys, I freaking love this game. Seamlessly synchronized and filled to the brim with charm and personality, Tadpole Treble is unquestionably a must-have," with a score of 9.4/10. Even with its inherently challenging premise, where the protagonist constantly faces peril, TinyCartridge recognized it as "one of the sweetest games I’ve ever played." Furthermore, a Steam reviewer, Mo05eman, underscored its success as an aesthetic and music-centric game, highlighting "simple gameplay made fun by good game design and an outstanding soundtrack."

Tadpole Treble offers a substantial volume of content. The game features 30 original music compositions, distributed across 13 unique levels, and concludes with 5 demanding boss battles. Beyond the primary story mode, players can unlock supplementary content. This includes new music tracks, a comprehensive bestiary for exploration, developer commentaries, and online leaderboards for every level, thereby encouraging a competitive spirit. A particularly noteworthy feature is the robust Composition Mode, which grants players the ability to design and share their own original levels and musical compositions, significantly enhancing the game's replayability.

Name: DUSK
Description:
DUSK reintroduces you to a world where butchery and bloodshed must be mastered... if you're to survive 'til dawn. Inspired by Doom, Quake, Blood, Heretic, Hexen, Half-Life, Redneck Rampage and all your '90s favorites, while featuring a soundtrack by metal music mastermind Andrew Hulshult. In three distinct campaign episodes hand-crafted from straight outta the '90s, players will battle through an onslaught of mystical backwater cultists, possessed militants and even darker forces and attempt to discover just what lurks beneath the Earth. Featuring a vast arsenal of badass weaponry including sickles, swords, crossbows, rifles, dual-wielded and double barreled shotguns and incredibly necessary grenade and rocket launchers , DUSK brings unapologetic retro action from start to finish. In addition to the main campaign, DUSK features an Endless Survival Mode , putting you front and center against wave after wave of merciless enemies. And for those looking for an extra challenge, DUSK also offers the chance to go head to head online to battle your friends in DUSKWorld arena multiplayer , where darkness hosts the worst of humanity in surprising new ways...

Name: Baba Is You
Description:
Baba Is You is an award-winning puzzle game where you can change the rules by which you play. In every level, the rules themselves are present as blocks you can interact with; by manipulating them, you can change how the level works and cause surprising, unexpected interactions! With some simple block-pushing you can turn yourself into a rock, turn patches of grass into dangerously hot obstacles, and even change the goal you need to reach to something entirely different. The game has over 200 levels that experiment with the game's mechanics in a multitude of ways, requiring the player to understand and manipulate the rules of the game and figure out devious ways to make the objects in the game world interact. The game was originally created for and won the Nordic Game Jam 2017. Baba Is You also won the Excellence in Design and Best Student Game awards in the Independent Games Festival 2018, and was nominated a finalist in 2 other categories, including the Seumas McNally Grand Prize. The game was made using Multimedia Fusion 2 by Clickteam.

**BattleBlock Theater®: A Hilarious and Challenging Adventure**

Prepare for a wild ride in BattleBlock Theater®, a game where you're shipwrecked, captured, and forced to perform for an audience of cats! This mind-bending tale of treachery plunges you into a quest to rescue over 300 imprisoned friends from the clutches of evil technological felines. As reported by game developers, you'll utilize an arsenal of unique weapon-tools to battle through hundreds of levels, uncovering the puzzling truth behind the theater's sinister operation.

**Engaging Gameplay for Every Player**

Whether you prefer a solo performance or the camaraderie of others, BattleBlock Theater® offers diverse gameplay options. The game supports up to two players in its co-optimized story mode and up to four players in its competitive arenas. According to player feedback, the co-optional gameplay encourages teamwork, but also allows for friendly rivalry.

**A Wealth of Content and Creative Freedom**

BattleBlock Theater® boasts an impressive array of over 450 levels, catering to single-player, multiplayer, and arena modes. As noted in the game's feature list, there are more levels than the character Hatty can count on his finger hands. Players can earn gems to free their 300 imprisoned friends by participating in deadly, gladiatorial plays. The game also features theatrical weaponry and combat, allowing players to jump, push, pull, punch, explode, freeze, poison, or even digest enemies. Furthermore, the included Level Editor empowers players to craft and share their own mind-bending trials, featuring over 20 interactive block types. For those seeking an ultimate challenge, the "Insane Mode" offers a one-life-to-live campaign experience. The Steam version also introduces unique animations, including the memorable cat guard.

Name: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition
Description:
Trials Evolution: Gold Edition marks the Trials franchise’s triumphant return to the PC gaming platform. RedLynx’s signature franchise, the Trials series first made its mark in gaming with the 2008 release of Trials 2 SE for the PC. That breakout indie success led to further success on the Xbox, but ever since then PC gamers have been clamoring for more Trials. Trials Evolution: Gold Edition is what they have been waiting for. The Gold Edition Is Two Trials In One Trials Evolution: Gold Edition will contain all the content of the original, best-selling XBLA game Trials Evolution. In addition, all of the single player tracks and skill games from Trials HD will be found in Trials Evolution – effectively doubling the content offering with two complete games, neither of which have ever before been available on PC. OPTIMIZED AND ENHANCED FOR PC Trials Evolution: Gold Edition will be optimized and enhanced for the PC gaming platform. All of the features of its forerunners – from the in-game editor, player sharing of tracks, and global Leader Boards, will be re-integrated into the game in a way that fits the new platform. Key Features Multiplayer Track Editor Indoor and Outdoor environments Bike and rider customizations Global competition

**Far Cry® 2: A Brutal Open-World Experience in a War-Torn African Nation**

Far Cry 2 plunges players into a volatile African state as a mercenary battling malaria and navigating a landscape rife with corrupt warlords. Survival hinges on mastering deception, exploiting enemy weaknesses, and overcoming superior numbers and firepower through surprise, subversion, and brute force.

The game is celebrated for its immersive and dynamic gameplay, featuring:

*   **Realistic Fire Propagation:** Experience lifelike fire effects. Use wind and flame spread to trap enemies, employing Molotov cocktails and flamethrowers for devastating attacks.
*   **Fully Destructible Environments:** Nearly every element is breakable, enhancing both single-player and multiplayer. The DUNIA engine's RealTree technology provides an authentic environmental deterioration system.
*   **Vast Open World:** Explore over 50 square kilometers of African landscape without loading screens, forging your own path through a living world.
*   **Epic Adventure and Side Missions:** Fight for two opposing factions in a sprawling narrative, pursuing your objective while undertaking over 70 side missions for intelligence, weaponry, and vehicles.
*   **Dynamic AI:** Encounter intelligent enemies. Medics rescue the wounded, and soldiers react to your presence, with your reputation influencing their behavior. Expect unpredictable encounters.
*   **Intense Multiplayer:** Compete in a multiplayer arena where trust is scarce and betrayal is possible. The game's technical features are seamlessly integrated into the multiplayer experience.

Name: Aliens Go Home Run
Description:
A combination of Breakout, Shoot Em Up, and Baseball, Aliens Go Home Run puts you in the shoes of Sally, a young girl with a passion for baseball. When she hits a home run so hard, the ball flies into space and crashes into a faraway planet belonging to an alien race, creating a crater in the process. Now, the aliens are taking revenge on Earth, and its up to Sally to save the day! Features include: 70 levels of Brick-Breaking Action! 9 Intense Boss Fights Several different power-ups and enemy types Awesome chiptune soundtrack by +TEK Online leaderboards to compare your level scores against the world! A robust Level Editor with Steam Workshop support

Field of Glory II is a turn-based tactical wargame that plunges players into the heart of the Roman Republic's ascent. Developed by Richard Bodley Scott, this title leverages a new 3D engine to faithfully recreate ancient warfare. It stands out as a compelling choice for strategy aficionados in search of profound tactical depth.

The central gameplay loop involves leading diverse armies through a broad spectrum of conflicts, encompassing both historical events and imaginative "what-if" situations. Victory is achieved through careful strategic foresight and adept command of various military formations. Field of Glory II features an extensive roster of historically accurate units, each with distinct tactical advantages. Players can explore several engaging modes. Historical Battles reconstruct twelve pivotal ancient engagements, including famous encounters like Cannae and Zama, offering the chance to command either faction. The Custom Battle System allows for the creation of nearly infinite "what-if" scenarios on dynamically generated terrain, boasting over 86 historically accurate unit types. These range from Roman legionaries and Greek hoplites to formidable war elephants and swift chariots. Additionally, the Campaign Mode empowers players to reshape history by guiding generals through their careers or leading any ancient nation in war. Victories in these campaigns serve to boost unit experience and morale.

Field of Glory II is designed with accessibility in mind, featuring simplified strategic choices and smooth transitions between engagements. A random map generator guarantees extensive replayability for custom games and campaigns, offering varied scenario objectives such as open battle, pursuit, and rearguard actions. The game employs classic turn-based, tile-based combat with an intuitive user interface. Battles can vary in scale, from a few units to as many as 80 per side. Named generals play a crucial role, significantly influencing combat outcomes and unit morale. Available in both single-player and multiplayer, the game includes a sophisticated AI and six distinct difficulty settings. Further enhancing its replay value is robust modding support, including a map editor. The Slitherine PBEM server streamlines online play for both historical and "what-if" scenarios. According to the developers, the game aims to provide an authentic yet accessible wargaming experience.

Name: Act of War: Direct Action
Description:
Tomorrow's War Is NOW Ripped from today's headlines, Act of War: Direct Action™ is a frightening tale of suspense, international intrigue and geopolitical military conflict. This real-time strategy experience puts you squarely in control of counterterrorist forces and delivers a first look at tomorrow's war. The Situation: A crippling energy crisis. Terrorist attacks. Massive strikes. Global instability. The Enemy: A shadowy Consortium of back-room conspirators determined to throw the world into utter chaos using widespread terror tactics. The Heroes: A new 'direct action' operation known as Task Force TALON to counter massive military assaults, rescue hostages, conduct classified spy missions, take prisoners and stop an unpredictable enemy bent on toppling the world's governments.
