This new PC version will include everything from the prior iterations including subtitle support in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish as well as previously released bonus content such as the Separate Ways epilogue.

Name: Persona 5 Royal
Description:
Prepare for the award-winning RPG experience in this definitive edition of Persona 5 Royal, featuring a treasure trove of downloadable content included! Forced to transfer to a high school in Tokyo, the protagonist has a strange dream. “You truly are a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you.” With the goal of “rehabilitation” looming overhead, he must save others from distorted desires by donning the mask of a Phantom Thief. Key Features: Explore Tokyo, unlock Personas, customize your own personal Thieves Den, experience alternate endings, and more Become the ultimate Phantom Thief and defy conventions, discover the power within, and fight for justice in the definitive version of Persona 5 Royal Includes over 40 items of previously released downloadable content Choose between Japanese and English VO

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

## Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition: A Revamped RPG Classic

Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition revitalizes the classic RPG experience, offering a comprehensive overhaul with thousands of improvements designed to captivate a broad spectrum of players. This enhanced version invites you to embark on an epic journey, reminiscent of the golden age of role-playing games.

At its core, the game immerses players in a rich, reactive world where strategic turn-based combat and meaningful companion interactions are paramount. As a young Source Hunter, your mission to combat the misuse of dark magic quickly spirals into a grand conspiracy threatening the very fabric of time.

The "Enhanced Edition" designation is thoroughly deserved, featuring:

*   **Full voiceovers** for a more immersive narrative.
*   **New game modes** that introduce fresh challenges and enhance replayability.
*   **Hours of revised story content**, including a **brand-new ending**.
*   **New weapon styles, skills, puzzles, and enemies**.
*   **Improved loot and balancing**.

Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition caters to diverse playstyles through its distinct game modes:

*   **Explorer Mode:** Prioritizes the story-focused RPG experience.
*   **Classic Mode:** Appeals to those who appreciate the original game's balance.
*   **Tactician Mode:** Presents a significant challenge for hardcore players with reworked encounters and smarter enemy AI.
*   **Honour Mode:** Offers the ultimate test for tactical geniuses with a single, unforgiving playthrough.

The game champions unparalleled freedom, allowing players to manipulate the environment and combine skills and spells in creative ways. For instance, players can transform ice into water, boil it to create steam, and then electrify the steam to stun enemies. This level of environmental interaction is a hallmark of the Divinity series.

Players can also team up in co-op multiplayer, either online or via split-screen, to unravel a deep and epic story. The classless character creation system empowers players to design their ideal character, while the extensive item interaction and combinations elevate exploration and experimentation. As one developer stated, "We wanted to give players the tools to truly shape their own adventure."

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

**Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition: Forge Your Divine Path**

The Divine is dead, and the encroaching Void threatens all of existence. Within you lie dormant powers, poised to awaken and shape the destiny of Rivellon. The battle for Divinity has commenced, demanding wise choices and cautious trust, as darkness resides in every heart. Who will you become in this new era of Divinity?

**Your Divine Identity:**

*   **Choose your race:** Will you be a flesh-eating Elf, an Imperial Lizard, or an Undead, resurrected from the grave?
*   **Experience unique reactions:** Discover how the world responds differently based on your chosen race and origin.
*   **Select from origin characters:** Embark on quests with 6 unique origin characters, each possessing their own rich backgrounds.
*   **Create your own hero:** Alternatively, craft your own character as a Human, Lizard, Elf, Dwarf, or Undead.

Every decision carries weight, and the world of Rivellon offers unparalleled freedom for exploration and experimentation. Go anywhere, converse with anyone, and interact with everything. As noted by Larian Studios, the developers, you can even eliminate NPCs without hindering your progress and converse with every animal, as ghosts may also hold hidden secrets.

**Revolutionary Turn-Based Combat:**

Prepare for the next generation of tactical combat. As highlighted in game reviews, players can unleash devastating elemental combinations and leverage environmental advantages, including height, to secure victory. Master over 200 skills across 12 distinct skill schools. However, be warned: the game's AI 2.0 is designed to be exceptionally challenging.

**Unleash Your Imagination:**

*   **Cooperative Play:** Explore the vast and intricate world of Rivellon alone or with a party of up to 4 players in a seamless drop-in/drop-out cooperative experience.
*   **Multiplayer Options:** Engage in online multiplayer or local split-screen with full controller support for up to 4 players.
*   **Game Master Mode:** Elevate your adventures by crafting your own narratives and campaigns within the Game Master Mode.
*   **Community Content:** Download fan-made campaigns and mods directly from the Steam Workshop.
*   **Visual Fidelity:** Experience an ultimate 4K visual journey that propels RPGs into a new era.

**Company of Heroes: Your Gateway to WWII Real-Time Strategy**

The Company of Heroes Legacy Edition provides access to the latest version of this celebrated World War II real-time strategy (RTS) game, now simply titled 'Company of Heroes,' available on Steam. For the best online experience and to connect with the active COH1 Steam Community and its vibrant Modding scene, using the updated version is strongly advised. Further resources and community engagement opportunities are available through the COH1 Community Hub and the COH1 Steam Workshop.

Company of Heroes delivers a deeply immersive and visceral World War II experience, revolutionizing the RTS genre. It vividly portrays the sacrifices of soldiers, the environmental impact of war, and the dynamic nature of battlefield combat. The game begins with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, where players command Allied squads against the German forces, progressing through key WWII engagements. The single-player campaign immerses players in the cinematic intensity and bravery of soldiers facing extraordinary circumstances, capturing the turmoil of WWII with remarkable detail.

The game's strategic depth is defined by several core mechanics. Intelligent Squad AI ensures soldiers dynamically react to their environment, seeking cover and employing sophisticated tactics. Developed with Relic's advanced engine, the game features cutting-edge visuals and a physics-driven, destructible environment, allowing players to reshape the battlefield. This environmental strategy, where buildings and terrain offer crucial cover or deny resources, was a benchmark for RTS titles. Robust multiplayer modes for 2-8 players, via LAN or online, offer intense strategic showdowns between Axis and Allied forces.

## Company of Heroes: A Groundbreaking WWII Real-Time Strategy Experience

Company of Heroes delivers a visceral and immersive World War II gaming experience, fundamentally redefining the real-time strategy (RTS) genre. It brings to life the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, the devastation of war-torn environments, and the dynamism of intense battlefields. This acclaimed title plunges players into the heart of pivotal WWII conflicts, beginning with the iconic D-Day invasion of Normandy.

### Lead Allied Forces Through Pivotal WWII Battles

In Company of Heroes, you will command squads of Allied soldiers, pitting them against the formidable German war machine. The game's rich single-player campaign allows players to experience the cinematic intensity and profound bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary and harrowing events. This narrative-driven experience captures the turmoil of WWII with unprecedented depth and realism.

### Advanced AI and Environmental Interaction

The game's advanced squad AI breathes life into your soldiers. They dynamically interact with the ever-changing environment, instinctively seeking cover and executing sophisticated squad tactics to overcome enemy opposition. This intelligent AI ensures that each engagement feels organic and challenging.

### Stunning Visuals and a Destructible World

Powered by Relic's cutting-edge, next-generation engine, Company of Heroes boasts graphic quality and a physics-driven world that was unprecedented for its time in the RTS genre. The environmental strategy is a key component, with real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guaranteeing that no two battles will ever unfold in precisely the same way. Players can destroy virtually anything, reshaping the battlefield to their strategic advantage. Utilize buildings and terrain for cover and tactical superiority, or deny these crucial elements to your adversaries.

### Engage in Multiplayer Competition

For those seeking a competitive edge, Company of Heroes offers robust multiplayer options for 2-8 players via LAN or the internet. Go online with friends and join the ultimate battle of Axis versus Allies, testing your strategic prowess against other players in thrilling online skirmishes.

***

**DISCLAIMER:** For additional user reviews and information, please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page. Total conversions available on Steam for COH1 are also listed on the Legacy Edition page.

## Dwarf Fortress: A Deeply Simulated World Awaits

Dwarf Fortress offers an unparalleled simulation experience, generating entire worlds with virtually limitless gameplay possibilities. Since its initial release in 2003, this legendary title has undergone continuous development. Its recent debut on Steam introduces significantly enhanced visuals and more intuitive guides, making it considerably more accessible for new players.

### Establish Your Fortress and Lead Your Dwarves

Your adventure begins with the creation of a unique world, after which you will guide a band of dwarves as they mine, construct, and ultimately face their fate. Dwarf Fortress masterfully blends construction, management, and roguelike elements. You will steer your burgeoning colony through a myriad of perils, including starvation, devastating dragon attacks, and the psychological toll of mental breakdowns. Each dwarf possesses simulated personalities and intricate relationships, imbuing their interactions with remarkable depth. Prepare for formidable aquifers and ferocious creatures, and bear witness to your civilization's triumphs and failures. The game's combat system is exceptionally detailed, incorporating dwarf skills, specific body part damage, material characteristics, targeted strikes, and grappling, all influenced by the effects of pain, sickness, and toxins, according to Bay 12 Games.

World generation is remarkably extensive, featuring hundreds of distinct creatures, many of which are unique to each procedurally generated world. This includes generated cultures complete with their own poetry, music, and dances. Dynamic weather systems meticulously track wind, moisture, and air masses to simulate realistic storms, while geological detail offers over two hundred types of rocks and minerals. The Steam version elevates the presentation with a fresh pixel art style and a 15-track soundtrack composed in the Dwarvish tongue. Enhanced in-game tutorials are designed to assist new players, guiding them through the process of building their first settlement and ensuring their dwarves remain content. Essential management duties encompass crafting valuable items, establishing a noble class, diligently tracking dwarf morale, managing water resources for agriculture or magma-related emergencies, and observing cultural growth through social spaces like taverns and libraries. Dwarf Fortress has notably influenced games such as RimWorld and Minecraft, with its creators, Tarn and Zach Adams, aspiring to simulate all of existence. Bay 12 Games estimates they are approximately 44% of the way to achieving this ambitious objective. As the game's enduring motto reminds us: Losing is fun!

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Collection
Description:
Once the Roman Empire is under your command, don't lay down your sword just yet - the Barbarians are coming. With two award-winning titles from the esteemed Total War series, you'll have twice as many obstacles and opportunities to control and conquer the greatest empire ever known to man. The Collection Edition includes: Rome: Total War Guide one of three noble Roman families on a century spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion (official expansion pack to Rome: Total War) Witness the decline of Rome as Barbarian hordes attack, forcing a bitter internal struggle between rival factions. Voted 2004 Best Strategy game by IGN, GameSpy and GameSpot. Fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire. Lay siege against the Romans as Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions using signature weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic epic battles with thousands of soldiers on-screen at once. A century-spanning campaign charges players with strategically managing the economic, civil, religious and military arms of their empire.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. ## Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition: A World of Unparalleled Choice

Embark on an epic journey in Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition, a game where the Divine has perished, the Void looms, and dormant powers within you are poised to awaken. The struggle for Divinity has commenced, demanding wise choices and cautious trust, as darkness resides in every heart. This critically acclaimed RPG invites you to define your identity in a world that dynamically responds to your every decision.

### Forge Your Unique Hero

The game offers unparalleled freedom in character creation, allowing you to shape your destiny:

*   **Origin Characters:** Choose from six distinct origin characters, each boasting unique backgrounds and personal quests that weave into the main narrative.
*   **Custom Races:** Alternatively, forge your own path as a Human, Lizard, Elf, Dwarf, or even an Undead resurrected from the grave.
*   **Consequential Choices:** Every decision you make, from dialogue to actions, carries significant consequences, shaping your narrative and the world around you.

### Experience Unrivaled Freedom and Tactical Combat

Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition is renowned for its deep gameplay systems and player agency:

*   **Explore and Experiment:** Venture anywhere, converse with anyone, and interact with every element of the world without limitations. You can even eliminate NPCs without hindering your progress.
*   **Master Elemental Combat:** Engage in deep, tactical, turn-based battles. Unleash devastating elemental combinations and strategically utilize environmental advantages, including height.
*   **Vast Skill System:** Master over 200 skills across 12 distinct skill schools, allowing for intricate and creative combat strategies.
*   **Challenging AI:** Be vigilant, as the advanced AI 2.0 presents a formidable challenge, adapting to your tactics.

### Dive into Cooperative Adventures and Expanded Content

Share the rich world of Rivellon with friends or explore new creative avenues:

*   **Cooperative Multiplayer:** Experience the vast and intricate world solo or with a party of up to four players. Enjoy seamless drop-in/drop-out cooperative play, both online and in local split-screen with full controller support.
*   **New Modes:** Beyond the main campaign, discover new challenges in the brand-new PvP and Game Master modes.
*   **Create Your Own Stories:** In Game Master Mode, craft your own narratives and adventures, becoming the architect of your own RPG experiences.
*   **Community Content:** Access a wealth of fan-made campaigns and mods through the Steam Workshop, ensuring endless replayability.

### Immerse Yourself in Stunning Visuals

Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition delivers an ultimate 4K experience, elevating the RPG genre with breathtaking visual fidelity.

Description:
DISCLAIMER This legacy version of COH1 will also give you access to the latest updated version of COH1 - simply called 'Company of Heroes' in your Steam library. ## Company of Heroes: A Groundbreaking WWII Real-Time Strategy Experience

For those seeking additional user reviews or information on total conversions for the original *Company of Heroes* (COH1), please visit the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page on Steam.

*Company of Heroes* delivers a visceral and unforgettable World War II gaming experience, fundamentally redefining the real-time strategy (RTS) genre. This title brings to life the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, the devastation of war-ravaged environments, and the dynamism of intense battlefields. The game begins with the pivotal D-Day Invasion of Normandy, where players command Allied soldier squads in fierce combat against the German war machine. Through a rich single-player campaign, players experience the cinematic intensity and profound bravery of ordinary soldiers thrust into extraordinary events, capturing the turmoil of WWII with unprecedented detail and emotional impact.

*Company of Heroes* features advanced squad artificial intelligence, with soldiers dynamically interacting with the environment, instinctively seeking cover and executing sophisticated tactics. The game boasts stunning visuals, powered by Relic's cutting-edge engine, providing graphic quality and a physics-driven world truly unprecedented in the RTS genre. ## Dwarf Fortress: A Deep Dive into Simulated Worlds

Dwarf Fortress offers an incredibly detailed and complex gaming experience, with each generated world presenting unique challenges. Since its 2003 debut, this title has been a benchmark for deep simulation.

### Core Gameplay: Managing Your Dwarven Colony

Players manage a group of dwarves, tasked with mining, building, and survival. The game simulates many elements, including:

*   **Civilizations:** Witness the rise and fall of societies with their own histories.
*   **Individual Dwarves:** Each dwarf has unique personalities and moods.
*   **Diverse Lifeforms:** Encounter numerous animals, monsters, and cultural groups.
*   **Weather Systems:** Experience dynamic weather driven by simulated atmospheric conditions.
*   **Complex Geology:** Explore worlds with over two hundred rock and mineral types.

### Enhanced Experience for Newcomers

The recent Steam edition improves accessibility with:

*   **Integrated Tutorials:** Guides help players learn fortress construction and dwarf management.
*   **Visually Rich Graphics:** A new tileset offers a more appealing visual presentation.
*   **Original Musical Score:** Immerse yourself with a 15-track soundtrack.

### Unparalleled Simulation Depth

The combat system is highly detailed, accounting for:

*   Individual skills and body parts.
*   Material properties.
*   Combat maneuvers like grappling.
*   The effects of pain and poisons.

World generation is also a feat, creating not only landscapes but also:

*   Randomly generated poetry, music, and dances, adding cultural depth.

### A Groundbreaking Legacy

Dwarf Fortress has inspired games like RimWorld and Minecraft. It was acquired by the Museum of Modern Art, recognizing its innovation. Creators Tarn and Zach Adams aim to simulate all of existence, estimating they are 44% complete. The game's philosophy, "Losing is fun!", captures its challenging yet rewarding nature.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Collection
Description:
Once the Roman Empire is under your command, don't lay down your sword just yet - the Barbarians are coming. With two award-winning titles from the esteemed Total War series, you'll have twice as many obstacles and opportunities to control and conquer the greatest empire ever known to man. The Collection Edition includes: Rome: Total War Guide one of three noble Roman families on a century spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion (official expansion pack to Rome: Total War) Witness the decline of Rome as Barbarian hordes attack, forcing a bitter internal struggle between rival factions. Voted 2004 Best Strategy game by IGN, GameSpy and GameSpot. Fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire. Lay siege against the Romans as Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions using signature weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic epic battles with thousands of soldiers on-screen at once. A century-spanning campaign charges players with strategically managing the economic, civil, religious and military arms of their empire.

Team Fortress 2, a celebrated online action game, is now available for free, offering players unlimited access without any hidden conditions. This highly-rated free-to-play title has consistently been recognized as one of the most popular online games ever released. According to PC Gamer, it offers "the most fun you can have online."

The enduring appeal of Team Fortress 2 lies in its constant stream of free updates. These updates regularly introduce new game modes, expansive maps, a wide array of equipment, and, famously, a vast collection of cosmetic items, particularly hats. The game features nine distinct character classes, each possessing unique tactical abilities and memorable personalities. This diversity ensures a broad spectrum of player skills can find a suitable role, fostering a dynamic and engaging gameplay experience.

For newcomers to Team Fortress 2, the learning curve is intentionally gentle. The game provides comprehensive training modules and offline practice modes, allowing players to refine their skills at their own pace before engaging in the game's numerous multiplayer modes. These modes include classic competitive formats such as Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, and King of the Hill, among others.

Beyond the core gameplay, Team Fortress 2 offers extensive customization options. Players can personalize their characters through hundreds of collectible, craftable, purchasable, and tradable items, including weapons and, of course, hats. This allows for a deep level of personalization, enabling players to tailor their favorite class to match their individual gameplay style and aesthetic preferences. It's important to note that the game operates on a "free-to-play, not pay-to-win" philosophy; virtually all items available in the in-game Mann Co. Store can also be acquired through regular gameplay.

Name: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®
Description:
The year is 2008. Citywide blackouts ... stock exchange sabotage ... electronic hijacking of national defense systems ... this is information warfare. To prevent these attacks, operatives must infiltrate deep into hostile territory and aggressively collect critical intelligence, closer than ever to enemy soldiers. You are Sam Fisher, the NSA's most elite black-ops agent. To achieve your mission you will kill from close range, attack with your combat knife, shoot with the prototype Land Warrior rifle, and use radical suppression techniques such as the inverted neck break. Also take on cooperative multiplayer infiltration missions, where teamwork is the ultimate weapon. As the enemy evolves, so must you. Deadly agility - Incredibly complete and fluid variety of moves including athletic moves, stealth moves, stealth kills. Real weapons of tomorrow - The most complete arsenal of weapons and gadgets, from the knife to the experimental Land Warrior System. As good as real - Never-before-seen graphics technology offers the best visuals on any system yet. Advanced physics engine allowing rag doll physics, particle effects, and perfect interaction with the environment. Ultimate challenge - Intelligent AI with personal attributes, natural behavior where NPCs are aware of thier environments and remember past events. Amazing replayability - Totally open level design with multipaths and optional secondary objectives. Co-op stealth - Play multiplayer with friends and coordinate your infiltration in an all-new multiplayer challenge. Please note that as of August 2016, the online features for this game are no longer supported. The Multiplayer mode / Co-op mode will no longer be accessible.

## Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain - A New Era of Tactical Espionage

Konami Digital Entertainment proudly presents the latest installment in the acclaimed series: **Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain**. This chapter marks a significant evolution for the franchise, powered by the groundbreaking Fox Engine. Prepare for an unparalleled gaming experience where tactical freedom reigns supreme, allowing players to approach open-world missions with unprecedented autonomy.

### The Phantom Pain: A Story of Revenge and Global Crisis

Set in 1984, nine years after the devastating events of MGSV: Ground Zeroes and the subsequent fall of Mother Base, players awaken as Snake, also known as Big Boss. Emerging from a nine-year coma, Snake finds himself in a world still grappling with the chilling realities of the Cold War and the ever-present threat of nuclear proliferation. Fueled by a burning desire for revenge, Snake assembles a new private army and plunges back into the heart of conflict, relentlessly pursuing the shadowy organization known as XOF.

### Exploring Mature Themes and Immersive Gameplay

The METAL GEAR SOLID team continues its tradition of ambitiously exploring profound and mature themes. *The Phantom Pain* delves deeply into the psychology of warfare, examining the horrific atrocities that arise from those caught in its vicious cycle. Anticipated by many for its expansive open-world design, stunning photorealistic visuals, and feature-rich gameplay, MGSV: The Phantom Pain is poised to become a landmark title in the gaming industry. Its legacy will be defined by its cinematic storytelling, weighty thematic explorations, and deeply immersive tactical gameplay.

### Key Features of The Phantom Pain:

*   **Unrestricted Open-World Design:** Experience ultimate freedom in how you approach missions and navigate the overall game progression. The world is your battlefield, and the choices are yours to make.
*   **Revolutionary Fox Engine:** Witness the power of the Fox Engine, delivering breathtaking photorealistic graphics, meticulously crafted game design, and true next-generation production quality.
*   **Augmented Online Connectivity:** The experience extends beyond the console, with online connectivity designed to enhance overall functionality and accessibility across other devices, enriching your engagement with the game.

Name: Slay the Spire
Description:
We fused card games and roguelikes together to make the best single player deckbuilder we could. Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, discover relics of immense power, and Slay the Spire! Features Dynamic Deck Building : Choose your cards wisely! Discover hundreds of cards to add to your deck with each attempt at climbing the Spire. Select cards that work together to efficiently dispatch foes and reach the top. An Ever-changing Spire : Whenever you embark on a journey up the Spire, the layout differs each time. Choose a risky or safe path, face different enemies, choose different cards, discover different relics, and even fight different bosses! Powerful Relics to Discover : Powerful items known as relics can be found throughout the Spire. The effects of these relics can greatly enhance your deck through powerful interactions. But beware, obtaining a relic may cost you more than just gold... Slay the Spire left Early Access and comes with: Four characters that each have their own unique set of cards. 350+ fully implemented cards. 200+ different items to be found. 50+ unique combat encounters. 50+ mysterious events that can help or harm you. Daily Climbs allow you to compare yourself with every other player in the world. Custom mode that allows mixing and matching various crazy run modifiers.

Name: HEX: Shards of Fate
Description:
HEX: Shards of Fate – Magical World for Keen Card Players HEX: Shards of Fate is an exciting challenge for fans of cards, action and strategy. Explore the fabulous world of Entrath, wrestle your way through sinister dungeons and use skill and guile in matches against other players. This digital card game combines the best of two worlds: classic TCGs and online RPGs . Create powerful decks from over 1,000 unique cards and dive into epic battles. Earn equipment items and use socketing gems to further improve your deck, whilst a variety of champions with individual skills complement your card armies. Cool animations and effects enrich the gaming experience on your road to victory! Experience HEX: Shards of Fate Play the first digital TCG with RPG elements Select a champion from eight races and three classes Explore dungeons in the exciting single-player mode Put your skills to the test in 1 vs 1 matches and hone your strategies Trade cards with friends and other players Win amazing prizes in daily tournaments with up to 128 players

**《魔物讨伐团》：经典卡牌RPG的中文强化版，策略冒险新体验**

《魔物讨伐团》是一款备受期待的官方中文强化版本，基于经典的卡牌游戏《Monster Slayers》精心打造。这款游戏不仅提供了完整的官方中文汉化，更收录了所有DLC内容，并对原有系统进行了深度优化和强化。它巧妙地融合了卡牌对战的策略性与角色扮演（RPG）的冒险元素，为玩家呈现了一场充满Roguelike风格的探索之旅。

**丰富的职业选择与深度策略组合**

在《魔物讨伐团》中，玩家可以操控多达14种各具特色的职业，包括盗贼、游侠、骑士、牧师、野蛮人、法师、刺客、武僧、兽王、狂战士、亡灵巫师、药剂师、飞龙以及商人。这些职业分为6个基础职业、6个进阶职业和2个特殊风格职业，每个职业在解锁后都拥有其独一无二的牌组。玩家需要通过与各种奇特的魔物进行战斗，并亲历各种随机事件，来逐步构建属于自己的传奇牌组。游戏完善的卡牌设计，结合独特的天赋系统，为玩家提供了近乎无限的牌组搭配和出牌可能性。

**沉浸式的游戏体验与多样的成长体系**

《魔物讨伐团》以其“超爽的出牌手感”著称，出牌动作与攻击招式紧密结合，流畅的连招设计让玩家体验到极致的战斗快感。此外，游戏还引入了“个性化角色系统”，通过融合丰富的表情和可更换的装扮，配合真人配音，极大地增强了玩家的代入感。

游戏的“声望与装备体系”为玩家提供了持续的成长动力。即使在战斗中遭遇失败，玩家也能通过积累装备和声望来不断强化下一次的战斗体验。装备和声望可以用来换取天赋，这些天赋是玩家在不断挑战中永远的希望。游戏还强调“丰富的克制设定”，例如牧师能够有效压制不死亡灵，而对付畏惧火焰的敌人，燃烧是最佳策略，体现了火与水、光明与黑暗等元素之间的相生相克关系。

**策略至上的组牌与探索过程**

《魔物讨伐团》的组牌过程极具策略性，它融合了职业卡组、战斗获取、商人购买、随机事件、随从技能、天赋树解锁以及装备提供等多种途径，共同塑造出玩家最终的牌组效果。游戏的探索式地图设计也更加讲究策略，可见的地图选择与职业克制机制有机地结合了运气与策略。玩家将面对丰富多样的离奇怪物，穿越无数的地牢进行勇敢的战斗。正如游戏所言：“那些杀不死你的，只会让你变得更加强大！”

**多样的游戏模式，无限的乐趣**

《魔物讨伐团》提供了“传奇模式”和“无尽模式”两种玩法。通关传奇模式仅仅是游戏的开始，它将解锁新职业、带来新玩法，并提供更多卡牌组合、更多武器装备，从而带来更丰富的游戏乐趣。

《魔物讨伐团》官方讨论QQ群791224753，欢迎各位卡牌爱好者加入讨论！职业卡牌选手以及知名UP主也在群中，期待与您一同交流！

Embark on an epic adventure with Monster Slayers, a complete reimagining of the beloved free web-based hit that captivated over 4 million players on the gaming portal Kongregate. Developed by Nerdook, known for their work on Reverse Crawl and Vertical Drop Heroes, this rogue-like deck-building RPG offers a fresh and engaging experience. At its core, Monster Slayers features an innovative card-based battle system, allowing players to meticulously customize their decks to perfectly align with their unique play styles.

Your journey begins by creating a new hero to join the prestigious Monster Slayers Guild. From there, you'll chart your course through the treacherous Northern Valley, driven by a singular quest: to vanquish the legendary Harbinger and ascend to the esteemed title of a true Monster Slayer.

The game boasts a variety of compelling features designed to keep every playthrough exciting and distinct. Battle a diverse array of monstrous foes, including cunning undead goblins, ferocious lion outlaws, and mighty dragons, all brought to life through the game's unique card-based combat system. According to developer insights, this system allows for deep strategic customization.

Strategically shape your deck by acquiring new cards from various sources, such as shrewd merchants, hidden treasure chests, and helpful allies. Each successful run earns you fame, which can be used to unlock powerful new abilities that will benefit your future heroes. The game's design ensures that every playthrough is a unique experience, with randomly generated levels, enemy encounters, and loot. Players can choose from six distinct classes: Rogue, Ranger, Knight, Barbarian, Cleric, and Wizard. Furthermore, you can recruit companions to join your quest, leveraging their special abilities to overcome challenges. Equip your hero with stat-boosting loot to significantly improve your chances of victory and fight for your rightful place at the top of the Monster Slayers leaderboards. Monster Slayers draws inspiration from the much-loved deck-building RPG, Dream Quest, a creation of Peter Whalen, renowned for his work on Hearthstone.

Monster Train is a strategic roguelike deck-builder where players defend the last burning pyre of Hell from invading angels. The game's unique three-vertical playfield demands careful tactical positioning. To succeed, players must navigate powerful locations, each offering distinct benefits like champion upgrades, unit recruitment, card upgrades, passive bonuses, and card duplication.

The game features five distinct clans, each with its own surprising gameplay mechanics. Players select a primary and supporting clan, gaining access to cards from both. During a run, cards can be further enhanced through a mix-and-match upgrade system, opening up diverse victory paths. According to the developers, there are over 220 unique cards and ten different starter decks available. Each of the five monster clans has 10 unlockable levels, introducing new cards and offering multiple upgrade paths for clan-specific champions. The game also boasts Steam Workshop mod support, allowing for extensive community-driven content, as noted in the Herzal's Workshop Update. Cards can be upgraded twice, and players can encounter more than 21 unique random events across 25 covenant (difficulty) levels.

Monster Train offers several multiplayer modes. Hell Rush is an eight-player, real-time competitive mode where players face identical resources and opponents, testing decision-making under pressure. The Daily Challenge mode presents players with a new, heavily modified run daily, featuring gameplay mutators and competing globally on skill-focused leaderboards. Custom Challenge allows players to design and share unique challenges with friends, each with its own leaderboard. Content updates have significantly expanded the game. The Friends & Foes Update introduced new champions, bosses, cards, and artifacts, along with player-requested features like personal run records and an enemy wave counter. The Wild Mutations Update added 35 new mutators and new difficulty settings for experienced players.

**Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales: A Regal RPG Adventure**

Embark on a captivating single-player RPG journey within the rich universe of The Witcher with *Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales*. Developed by the acclaimed creators of *The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt*, this title masterfully blends immersive story-driven exploration with engaging card-based combat. The game unfolds a sweeping narrative of courage, leadership, and the profound consequences of player decisions.

The narrative centers on **Queen Meve**, the formidable ruler of Lyria and Rivia, as she confronts the escalating threat of a Nilfgaardian invasion. Her journey is one marked by devastation and a relentless pursuit of vengeance, demanding unwavering resolve and difficult choices. According to game reviews, *Thronebreaker* offers a deeply engaging and satisfying quest. IGN recognized it as "**One of the best-written RPGs in years**" (9.4/10), and GameSpot deemed it "**Superb**" (9/10).

At its core, *Thronebreaker* presents a substantial 30-hour narrative experience, featuring 20 distinct potential outcomes that shape the game's world. Player choices significantly impact the destiny of the land and its inhabitants, who can evolve into allies or adversaries. Exploration is a key component, allowing players to traverse diverse and evocative regions of The Witcher's world, from verdant countrysides and war-torn battlefields to grand castles and snow-capped mountains. During these expeditions, players can aid struggling villages, uncover hidden treasures, and gather essential resources.

A significant aspect of gameplay involves the development and enhancement of Queen Meve's battle camp. This includes training troops, unlocking new abilities, and refining strategic thinking. Resource management, trade interactions, and bolstering the strength of allies are crucial for success. Combat is presented through tactical card battles, where players assemble a formidable army to face challenging story encounters. These battles require astute puzzle-solving and the clever utilization of each unit's unique skills.

Beyond the core gameplay, *Thronebreaker* includes a suite of exclusive digital extras. These encompass the official *Thronebreaker* soundtrack, a digital copy of the *GWENT: Art of The Witcher Card Game* artbook, concept art including a map of Lyria, the Witcher graphic novel 'Fox Children', and a Steam copy of *The Witcher: Enhanced Edition Director’s Cut*.

Name: Chaos Reborn
Description:
From Julian Gollop, the designer of the original, award-winning XCOM game comes Chaos Reborn - a turn-based wizard combat game with single player Realm Quests and many online options. Between 2 and 6 players can challenge each other to magical duels in a variety of arenas using a spell deck of interesting spells and creatures - including the Gooey Blob, Shadow Wood, and more. There is a monthly league system and several game modes with live or asynchronous battles. You can explore the Realms of Chaos fighting Wizard Lords and Kings, and invite players to join you in co-op battles, or act as an invader in someone else's realm. These Realms can be designed by player Wizard Kings and rated by other players.

Astrea offers a fresh take on the roguelike genre, replacing traditional cards with dice and introducing a unique dual "damage" system: Purification and Corruption. The core objective is to build a powerful dice pool to cleanse the pervasive corruption plaguing Astrea and ultimately save the Star System.

The game's central mechanic revolves around its innovative dual-purpose action system. Purification can be used to damage enemies or restore your own health. Conversely, Corruption can be used to inflict damage upon yourself or to heal enemies. This allows players to strategically pacify adversaries with Purification or intentionally take Corruption damage to activate potent abilities. Furthermore, your health bar serves a dual role; skills are intrinsically linked to it and are activated by taking Corruption damage. This means players must carefully manage their Corruption levels to unleash powerful abilities, while being mindful of the risk of being overwhelmed.

Astrea emphasizes deep character customization through its dice system. Players construct a personalized dice pool from an extensive collection of over 350 unique dice, each offering varying risk-reward profiles, from reliably safe options to powerfully risky selections. The game also allows players to directly edit the faces of their dice, assigning new actions and increasing the probability of achieving desired results.

Players can select from a diverse cast of characters, including six distinct Oracles, each possessing unique dice sets, abilities, and playstyles, catering to preferences from spellcasters to berserkers. Over 20 upgradeable support Sentinels also offer supportive dice rolls, acting as dependable allies. Runs can be further enhanced with over 170 unique passive effects, known as Blessings, which can fundamentally alter tactical approaches. These include lower-powered Star Blessings and potent Black Hole Blessings that come with significant drawbacks. Additionally, more than 20 random events at mysterious locations can dramatically influence the outcome of a run. Enemies attack using their own dice, providing opportunities to manipulate their rolls and alter their intended actions. Players can also customize their challenge with 16 distinct difficulty levels.

The lore of Astrea centers on the Crimson Dawn Cataclysm. In ages past, a mystical star presided over a thriving Star System, with its disciples being the Six-Sided Oracles. This era of harmony was shattered by a celestial inferno that corrupted the land and scattered the Oracles' creations. Eons later, descendants of these Oracles embark on a quest to complete their predecessors' unfinished battle and restore their star system.

**Reigns: Game of Thrones: Forge Your Own Westerosi Legacy**

Step into the treacherous world of Westeros with Reigns: Game of Thrones, a captivating blend of the award-winning HBO® TV series and the critically acclaimed Reigns swipe-and-tap gameplay. This unique experience allows you to claim the Iron Throne, not just as one ruler, but as a formidable cast of iconic characters. Through the fiery visions of Melisandre, you'll navigate the intricate political landscape and confront the hostile factions that threaten the Seven Kingdoms.

As Cersei Lannister, Jon Snow, Daenerys Targaryen, Tyrion Lannister, Sansa Stark, and others, you will rule from the Iron Throne, experiencing the weight of leadership as different monarchs, each with their own unique challenges and unfolding mysteries. Make life-altering decisions with a simple swipe left or right, responding to the impassioned pleas and unpredictable demands of Westeros's inhabitants. Should a character prove too troublesome, you can tear their card in half, but be prepared for the unforeseen consequences of such a drastic action. Melisandre's visions serve as your canvas, extending the narrative beyond the television series. Explore alternate timelines and imagine the myriad fates of those who aspire to rule. Will you rebuild the Great Sept of Baelor as Cersei, or chart a different course for the Seven Kingdoms if Sansa Stark had married Jaime Lannister?

Beyond the grand political machinations, even the most powerful rulers require moments of respite. Reigns: Game of Thrones offers regal mini-games, from thrilling jousting tournaments to rowdy tavern brawls, each with its own set of consequences that can impact your reign. This entry represents the biggest and deepest installment in the Reigns series to date, empowering you to forge entirely new adventures at your whim. Complementing your journey is the iconic soundtrack from the HBO series, composed by Ramin Djawadi, which will underscore your every decision as you decide the fate of Westeros and its people.

©2018 Home Box Office, Inc. All Rights Reserved. HBO and related trademarks are the property of Home Box Office, Inc.

## Gordian Quest: A Deckbuilding RPG Adventure

Embark on an epic deckbuilding RPG adventure in *Gordian Quest*. This game blends classic RPG elements with modern roguelite features and strategic turn-based combat. A sinister curse has plunged the land of Wrendia into darkness, unleashing monsters and scoundrels. As heroes rise, you must lead them on a perilous journey to save what remains of this fallen world and destroy the root of evil. Your Gordian Quest is about to begin.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

#### Party Management
Form parties of heroes, each possessing unique classes, skills, and playstyles. Lead and manage them on challenging missions, fostering bonds and discovering new abilities.

#### Strategic Combat
Engage in turn-based battles utilizing a vast array of hundreds of passive and active skills. Discover and formulate powerful hero combos.

#### Hero Progression
Train, upgrade, and equip your heroes with a wide selection of weapons, armor, and enchanted trinkets to enhance their capabilities.

### Game Modes

#### Campaign Mode
Journey through 4 acts, from the troubled lands of Westmire to the enigmatic Sky Imperium, in an epic quest to save Wrendia.

#### Realm Mode
Experience a fast-paced roguelite challenge with an ever-changing game world, unpredictable threats, and rewarding encounters. Conquer 5 realms or face an endless challenge.

#### Adventure Mode
Explore procedurally generated areas or tackle solo challenges in this end-game mode.

#### Skirmish Mode
Engage in 1v1 battles, pitting your party of three against a friend.

### Key Features

#### Diverse Heroes
Choose from ten distinct heroes, including the Swordhand, Cleric, Ranger, Scoundrel, Spellbinder, Druid, Bard, Warlock, Golemancer, and Monk.

#### Vast Skill System
Access nearly 800 passive and active skills to customize your heroes' abilities.

#### High Replayability
Procedurally generated maps, dungeons, and randomized hero skills ensure each playthrough is unique.

#### Adjustable Difficulty
Experience a hardcore permadeath mode or a more casual approach where death is a temporary setback.

#### Loot and Relics
Gather items and relics to boost your heroes' power, including mysterious items that can both bless and curse.

#### Carryover Rewards
A progression system with an Artifacts system rewards continued play across different modes.

#### Meaningful Decisions
Shape your adventure through critical choices and dice rolls.

Name: Half-Life 2: Episode Two
Description:
Half-Life® 2: Episode Two is the second in a trilogy of new games created by Valve that extends the award-winning and best-selling Half-Life® adventure. As Dr. Gordon Freeman, you were last seen exiting City 17 with Alyx Vance as the Citadel erupted amidst a storm of unknown proportions. In Episode Two, you must battle and race against Combine forces as you traverse the White Forest to deliver a crucial information packet stolen from the Citadel to an enclave of fellow resistance scientists. Episode Two extends the award-winning Half-Life gameplay with unique weapons, vehicles, and newly-spawned creatures.

Name: Half-Life 2: Episode One
Description:
Half-Life 2 has sold over 4 million copies worldwide, and earned over 35 Game of the Year Awards. Episode One is the first in a series of games that reveal the aftermath of Half-Life 2 and launch a journey beyond City 17. Also features two multiplayer games. Half-Life 2 not required.

**The Wolf Among Us: A Deep Dive into Fabletown's Dark Secrets**

For those seeking a mature and violent thriller, *The Wolf Among Us* offers an immersive journey into the rain-slicked streets of Fabletown. Developed by the acclaimed creators of the 2012 Game of the Year, *The Walking Dead*, this gripping narrative adventure is deeply rooted in the award-winning *Fables* comic book series from DC Comics/Vertigo. Players step into the worn shoes of Bigby Wolf, the notorious Big Bad Wolf, who now serves as the Sheriff of Fabletown, tasked with maintaining order in a community of displaced fairytale characters.

This dark urban fantasy plunges players into a world where a brutal murder is just the beginning of escalating dangers. *The Wolf Among Us* showcases an evolution of Telltale's groundbreaking choice and consequence gameplay mechanics. According to critics, every decision made, no matter how seemingly small, carries significant weight and can lead to profound repercussions. As Bigby Wolf, players will quickly discover that life in this hidden community, populated by characters from fairytales, legends, and folklore who have escaped into our world, is a constant struggle against terror and peril. The game is widely regarded as a perfect entry point into the *Fables* universe, even for those unfamiliar with the comics, as its story unfolds prior to the events depicted in the first issue.

The game is presented as a complete season of content, meticulously crafted across five distinct episodes: Episode 1: Faith, Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors, Episode 3: A Crooked Mile, Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing, and Episode 5: Cry Wolf. Each episode is now available, allowing players to fully immerse themselves in Bigby's investigation and the unfolding mysteries of Fabletown.

Key features of *The Wolf Among Us* include its origin from the award-winning team behind *The Walking Dead*, its faithful adaptation of the Eisner Award-winning *Fables* comic book series, and its innovative gameplay. A significant advancement in Telltale's signature style, as noted by many players, is the emphasis not only on *what* choices you make but also *when* you make them, adding another layer of strategic depth to the unfolding narrative. This mature and gritty interpretation of beloved fairytale characters promises a compelling and unforgettable experience, offering a unique blend of detective work and moral ambiguity.

Embark on a bizarre adventure with Sam & Max: Beyond Time and Space, a remastered collection of Telltale's second season of episodic Sam & Max games. This updated version, lovingly crafted by original developers, plunges players into a wild ride across diverse locales, from the North Pole to outer space and even Hell itself.

Sam, a six-foot canine detective with a keen sense of justice, and Max, a hyperkinetic rabbity-thing with a penchant for mayhem, form the Freelance Police. This irreverent comedy duo has been a staple in comic books and video games for over thirty years, known for their unique crime-fighting style. In this five-episode arc, they tackle a variety of outlandish cases, including a showdown with Santa Claus, a race to subdue a giant volcano, and a confrontation with a Eurotrash vampire.

The narrative delves into intriguing mysteries, questioning whether paranoid shopkeeper Bosco is onto a grand conspiracy or if diner proprietress Stinky is hiding secrets about her grandfather. The collection also explores the personal lives of characters like Sybil Pandemik, and even hints at a birthday celebration. This hilarious outing, which previously earned IGN’s Adventure Game of the Year award, now boasts gorgeous HD graphics, overhauled lighting and lip-sync, finessed cinematography, remastered audio, and eight new musical tracks performed by live jazz musicians. Prepare for dancing zombies, singing mariachis, and a giant battle robot, as Sam and Max risk their souls to set things right when their friends' lives are on the line.

The game offers an engaging adventure experience with plenty of humor. Players will explore unexpected locations, interact with eccentric characters, and solve brain-tickling puzzles within an interactive story filled with jokes. The remastered visuals and audio bring the world of Sam & Max to modern standards. For those who prefer a less guided experience, the game offers a hint system that provides subtle contextual clues when players are stuck, with customizable hint frequency. Optional driving mini-games in Sam & Max’s 1960 DeSoto convertible provide fun diversions, with earned upgrades carrying over between episodes. The game is localized with English voice acting and subtitles available in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish.

**Alan Wake: A Deep Dive into a Psychological Thriller Action Game**

Alan Wake masterfully blends the suspense of a psychological thriller with the high-octane thrills of an action game, immersing players in a narrative that is both captivating and unnerving. The core of the story revolves around Alan Wake, a successful author whose life takes a dark turn when his wife vanishes during a vacation. His frantic search for her uncovers pages from a novel he has no recollection of writing, hinting at a malevolent force manipulating events.

This sinister entity, known as the Dark Presence, begins to torment the seemingly tranquil town of Bright Falls, pushing Alan's mental state to its limits. To decipher the unfolding mystery and rescue his wife, Alan must directly confront this encroaching darkness. Remedy's signature storytelling, presented in an episodic, television series-like structure, is interwoven with pulse-pounding action sequences that ensure players remain on the edge of their seats. As the enigmatic plot progresses, players are met with increasingly difficult challenges, shocking plot twists, and heart-stopping cliffhangers, according to game reviews.

To effectively combat the shadowy adversaries that plague Bright Falls, players must become adept at the game's distinctive "Fight With Light" mechanic. This innovative system is crucial for repelling the darkness, fostering an exceptionally tense combat experience that is further amplified by the game's profound narrative and intensely atmospheric setting. Critics have lauded Alan Wake for its entertaining and original gameplay, frequently pointing to its deep narrative and engaging mechanics as standout features.

The PC iteration of Alan Wake significantly elevates the player experience, offering enhanced visual fidelity and higher resolutions. This version thoughtfully incorporates the highly regarded Special Episodes, "The Signal" and "The Writer," which further enrich the already compelling narrative. Players have the flexibility to tailor their gameplay experience, opting for fully configurable mouse and keyboard controls or utilizing a gamepad. Additional visual improvements include customizable graphics settings, support for a variety of aspect ratios, and a multithreaded engine designed for efficient CPU performance. Furthermore, fan-requested features such as field of view adjustment and the option to "hide HUD" are included, alongside support for AMD Eyefinity 3D 3-screen mode, providing an immersive panoramic view of the game's Pacific Northwest backdrop.

Name: The Walking Dead
Description:
The Walking Dead is a five-part game series set in the same universe as Robert Kirkman’s award-winning comic book series. Play as Lee Everett, a convicted criminal, who has been given a second chance at life in a world devastated by the undead. With corpses returning to life and survivors stopping at nothing to maintain their own safety, protecting an orphaned girl named Clementine may offer him redemption in a world gone to hell. Based on Robert Kirkman’s Eisner-Award winning comic book series, The Walking Dead allows gamers to experience the true horror of the zombie apocalypse. A tailored game experience: live with the profound and lasting consequences of the decisions that you make in each episode. Your actions and choices will affect how your story plays out across the entire series. You’ll be forced to make decisions that are not only difficult, but that will require you to make an almost immediate choice. There’s no time to ponder when the undead are pounding the door down!

Strong Bad's Cool Game for Attractive People: Season 1 invites players into the hilariously chaotic world of the iconic internet personality, known for his sharp wit and questionable advice on Homestarrunner.com. This five-episode comedy series, co-written by the original creators, offers an immersive experience that truly captures the essence of Strong Bad's universe. As one observer noted, playing the game might even lead to adopting some of Strong Bad's distinctive speech patterns.

Each installment of Strong Bad's Cool Game for Attractive People presents a unique theme and allows players to interact with a beloved cast of characters, including Homestar, The Cheat, and Bubs. The game is often described as a heightened, interactive version of the popular web cartoons, delivering an experience that's akin to a "Strong Bad cartoon on steroids." The game's creator, Strong Bad himself, might ask, "What the crap are you waiting for?"

The season comprises five distinct episodes, each offering a fresh adventure:

*   **Homestar Ruiner:** This episode kicks off when a prank backfires, forcing Strong Bad to evict the perpetually loafing Homestar Runner from his domain.
*   **Strong Badia the Free:** Players are encouraged to join the "Homestarmy" and assist Strong Bad in his quest to overthrow the tyrannical King of Town.
*   **Baddest of the Bands:** Facing financial hardship, Strong Bad seeks inspiration from the legendary figures of rock and roll.
*   **Dangeresque 3:** Strong Bad secures a career-defining role in what is billed as a major cinematic event.
*   **8-Bit Is Enough:** The fearsome dragon Trogdor has escaped, and players must help Strong Bad recapture the beast and re-establish order.

## Sam & Max Save the World Remastered: A Beloved Classic Returns

Prepare for the return of your favorite crime-fighting duo as Sam & Max Save the World Remastered revitalizes the beloved first season of episodic games. This modern iteration of a title once lauded as "gaming's first sitcom" has been meticulously updated by a core team of original developers, with the endorsement of creator Steve Purcell. It is now widely celebrated as "the remaster you didn't know you were waiting for," according to numerous reviews.

The Freelance Police are back with a suite of enhancements designed to elevate the experience. Players can anticipate **enhanced graphics** that breathe new life into the familiar world, alongside **widescreen and gamepad support** for a more immersive and contemporary gameplay feel. Adding to the unique atmosphere are **five new musical tracks**, contributing to the game's distinctive charm. These technical improvements complement the core elements that cemented Sam & Max Save the World's success. The game retains its signature **brain-tickling puzzles** and **offbeat humor**, featuring the same hilarious and quirky dialogue and situations that earned the original game IGN's Best Adventure GOTY award.

The adventure commences with a seemingly straightforward assignment for the self-proclaimed Freelance Police. The Commissioner alerts them to former child stars wreaking havoc. What begins as minor vandalism rapidly escalates into a full-blown conspiracy. Sam and Max uncover that the culprits have been mysteriously hypnotized, their eyes exhibiting a tell-tale "spinny thing." To unravel this perplexing case, Sam's sharp detective acumen and Max's uninhibited mayhem will be crucial. They will need to strategically employ an assortment of inventory items and enlist the assistance of familiar characters such as Sybil Pandemik, Bosco, and Jimmy Two-Teeth. The investigation will span from the familiar streets of Sam & Max's neighborhood to the esteemed grounds of the White House lawn, delving into the depths of the internet and even venturing to the moon. This increasingly bizarre and humorous mystery sees Sam and Max racing to expose the source of the malfeasance and thwart a nefarious plot, a journey that has captivated players for years, as noted by game critics.

Name: Necrobarista
Description:
'This is a story about death and coffee.' Inspired equally by film and anime, Necrobarista is a unique take on the visual novel medium. Follow a dynamic and diverse cast of characters as they navigate Melbourne's hipstery coffee culture, the questionable ethics of necromancy, and the process of letting go. Final Pour is the definitive edition of Necrobarista, bringing a year's worth of updates and enhancements to the table, as well as brand new features and stories: Full cinematic recomposition in 1.85:1 aspect ratio, bringing a whole new perspective to the story. Devil's Den : A new episode featuring Samantha kicking someone in the head. Studio Mode : Compose your own shots, add dialogue, and tell stories using the same tools as us! Doodle Mode : Remember those homicidal robots we mentioned before? Now you can draw faces on them! They're fine with it. Three new additions to the soundtrack from Necrobarista music producer Jeremy Lim . Other features: Stylized, fully 3D cinematic presentation that draws from anime aesthetics. Soundtrack by Kevin Penkin , BAFTA-nominated composer for Florence , Made in Abyss, and Norn9. Delve into the world of the Terminal and fantasy Melbourne through free-roaming first-person scenes. Featuring goon-sack robots, alchemical coffee, and Australian folk hero Ned Kelly. Support for fourteen languages, including Korean, Arabic, and Russian.

Name: The Walking Dead: A New Frontier
Description:
When family is all you have left…how far will you go to protect it? After society was ripped apart by undead hands, pockets of civilization emerge from the chaos. But at what cost? Can the living be trusted on this new frontier? As Javier, a young man determined to find the family taken from him, you meet a young girl who has experienced her own unimaginable loss. Her name is Clementine, and your fates are bound together in a story where every choice you make could be your last.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

Unreal Tournament 2004: Editor's Choice Edition remains a standout in online first-person shooters, blending fast-paced arena combat with significant technological advancements. This version offers a rich experience with its diverse game modes, expansive maps, and an updated arsenal, making it a compelling choice for fans of the genre.

The game features ten distinct modes, supporting up to 32 players online. These modes range from the strategic base defense and attack of Assault, to the point-capture and power-core destruction of Onslaught, which heavily features vehicular combat in large outdoor settings. Players can also engage in battles across over 95 maps, including many new additions, spanning varied environments from vast outdoor areas to confined indoor arenas. The arsenal is expanded with three new weapons: the enemy-tracking Mine Layer, the Anti-Vehicle Rocket Launcher (AVRiL), and a bouncing Grenade Launcher. The classic Sniper Rifle from the original Unreal Tournament also returns, redesigned and enhanced.

Unreal Tournament 2004 introduces 32 new characters across four distinct teams: the human Thunder Crash, the robotic Corrupt, the Skaarj warrior Iron Skull, and the mercenary Hellions. The game also boasts a significant technology update, delivering a faster, smoother, and more immersive experience with improved graphical fidelity and performance, according to numerous reviews.

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: Your Entry Point to WWII Real-Time Strategy**

The Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition provides access to the original game, alongside the latest updated version, simply titled "Company of Heroes," within your Steam library. For optimal online play and engagement with the active COH1 Steam Community and its extensive Modding scene, it is recommended to use the updated version. Additional resources and community interaction can be found on the COH1 Community Hub and the COH1 Steam Workshop.

Company of Heroes offers a deeply immersive World War II real-time strategy experience, fundamentally changing the genre. The game vividly portrays the bravery of soldiers, the destruction of war-torn landscapes, and the constant flux of battle. Players start their campaign with the D-Day invasion of Normandy, leading Allied squads against the powerful German forces through critical WWII engagements.

The single-player campaign is crafted to draw players into the intense, cinematic narrative and the courage of everyday soldiers facing immense challenges. Game developers have highlighted that the sophisticated squad AI makes soldiers feel alive, allowing them to react realistically to their environment. They will instinctively seek cover and employ advanced tactical maneuvers to outwit and defeat enemy units.

Visually, Company of Heroes features impressive graphics, driven by Relic's advanced engine. This technology delivered groundbreaking visual quality and a physics-driven world for its time in the RTS genre. Environmental strategy is crucial, with real-time physics and fully destructible environments ensuring each battle is unique. Players are encouraged to alter the battlefield to their advantage by destroying structures and using terrain strategically, or by denying these elements to their opponents.

In addition to its compelling single-player mode, Company of Heroes supports multiplayer battles for 2-8 players, accessible via LAN or the internet. This feature allows players to connect with friends and participate in intense clashes between Axis and Allied forces.

Name: Freespace 2
Description:
The year is 2367, thirty two years after the Great War. Or at least that is what YOU thought was the Great War. The endless line of Shivan capital ships, bombers and fighters with super advanced technology was nearly overwhelming. As the Terran and Vasudan races finish rebuilding their decimated societies, a disturbance lurks in the not-so-far reaches of the Gamma Draconis system. Your nemeses have arrived... and they are wondering what happened to their scouting party.

The online servers for the critically acclaimed DARK SOULS series on PC are currently undergoing a progressive restoration. According to official statements, the servers for DARK SOULS™ II are scheduled to be brought back online once the essential work to resolve the existing technical issues is fully completed. Further updates regarding the restoration schedule will be shared as soon as it is finalized. The developers extend their sincere gratitude to all players for their continued patience and understanding as they diligently address this matter.

Developed by the renowned FROM SOFTWARE, DARK SOULS™ II stands as the highly anticipated follow-up to the challenging 2011 hit, Dark Souls. This distinctive, old-school action RPG garnered global acclaim for its formidable difficulty and the profound emotional rewards it offered players. DARK SOULS™ II builds upon the franchise's signature obscurity and compelling gameplay innovations, extending them to both its single-player and multiplayer modes. Players are invited to embark on a dark quest, facing formidable foes, navigating treacherous hazards, and experiencing the signature challenge that has become a hallmark of FROM SOFTWARE's creations.

Key features highlighted for DARK SOULS™ II include:

*   **Go Beyond Death:** Players can test their mettle in intense gameplay across a vast world, powered by a new engine that significantly advances graphics, sound, and special effects.
*   **A Labyrinth of Monsters & Bosses:** The game immerses players in intricate environments populated by new, twisted creatures and formidable bosses, all born from the unique vision of FROM SOFTWARE.
*   **Sensory Assault:** A variety of threats are designed to exploit human senses and phobias, incorporating elements like auditory hallucinations, vertigo, and acrophobia.
*   **Deeper and Darker:** Enhanced customization options allow for tailoring weapons and armor to suit individual player styles, offering greater personalization.
*   **Evolved Multiplayer:** An updated multiplayer system facilitates improved online interaction, supporting both cooperative and competitive play for a richer community experience.
*   **Refined Gameplay:** DARK SOULS™ II boasts fluid motion-capture animations, an enhanced combat system, a significantly expanded cast of characters, deeper customization, new weapons, armor abilities, and a balanced player progression system, as noted by game reviewers.

Name: Rise of Nations: Extended Edition
Description:
Rise of Nations Rise of Nations is a real-time strategy game that spans all history. Start with a single city in the Ancient Age; gather resources; build an infrastructure; research technologies; construct Wonders of the World such as the Pyramids and the Eiffel Tower; and expand your military might across the world, conquering hostile nations with bombers, battleships, and tanks—all over your lunch hour! In Rise of Nations there are: 18 Nations—each with special abilities and unique military units. Over a hundred military units operating on the ground, sea, and air— from Hoplites to Frigates to Helicopters. Over two dozen buildings with upgrades and technologies that will take your nation from a small City to an Information Age society. 14 Wonders of the World—the Terra Cotta Army, the Taj Mahal, the Eiffel Tower. Each gives your nation special bonuses. More than a dozen map types, ranging from the Amazon Rainforest to the Himalayas to the Nile Delta. Conquer the World campaign—a linked series of dozens of scenarios. The Extended Edition includes: Rise of Nations Rise of Nations: Thrones and Patriots New in the Extended Edition: Improved Visuals Improved water Improved textures Full-screen anti-aliasing Full Steamworks Integration Multiplayer with ranked matches (ELO) Achievements Trading Cards Cloud saves

The Homeworld Remastered Collection brings two legendary space strategy games to modern audiences. This collection includes:

*   **Homeworld Remastered Edition**
*   **Homeworld 2 Remastered Edition**

As a special bonus, you'll also receive free access to:

*   **Homeworld Classic**
*   **Homeworld 2 Classic**

Experience the epic space strategy games that redefined the RTS genre. You'll control your fleet and build a massive armada across more than 30 single-player missions. Strategic depth is key, requiring you to choose unit types, fleet formations, and flight tactics for every situation. Advanced research allows you to construct a diverse range of ships, from nimble light fighters to colossal carriers.

The Homeworld games have been meticulously re-mastered. Key members of the original development team collaborated with the passionate fan community for critical influence and assistance. The Homeworld Remastered Collection introduces Relic's acclaimed space strategy games to modern players and operating systems. It utilizes sophisticated graphics rendering technology, a fully remastered score, and new, high-fidelity voice recordings by the original actors.

The free bonus of the original, non-remastered versions, Homeworld Classic and Homeworld 2 Classic, preserves the purest form of the original releases. These versions are also compatible with modern operating systems.

Furthermore, the Homeworld Remastered Collection provides access to Homeworld Remastered Steam Multiplayer. The competitive multiplayer modes for both Homeworld and Homeworld 2 are combined into one centralized mode. This allows access to content and improvements from both games, enabling unlimited competitive multiplayer space battles on an epic scale.

**Key Features:**

*   Build and battle with over 100 unique space ships.
*   Enjoy updated high-resolution textures and models.
*   Experience new graphical effects.
*   Support for HD, UHD, and 4K resolutions.
*   A new audio mix using original source effects and music.
*   Cinematic scenes recreated in high fidelity by the original artists.
*   Mod support and mod tools are included.
*   Bonus archival versions of Homeworld Classic and Homeworld 2 Classic.
*   Access to Homeworld Remastered Steam Multiplayer, allowing you to play Homeworld races against Homeworld 2 races with up to eight players on 23 maps, plus new game modes.

Name: Warhammer® 40,000: Dawn of War® - Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Prepare yourself for the grim, dark future of the 41st millennium, where alien races battle mankind for galactic domination in a universe of unending war. Personalize your armies with a revolutionary unit customization tool that gives you the ability to choose your armies insignias, banners, squad colors and names. Engaging story driven single player campaign. Command the elite chapter of the Blood Ravens in an original epic tale of treason and conspiracy as you serve the Emperor and protect humanity from the scourges of Warhammer 40,000 universe. Master four unique races. Command your Space Marines, Orks, Chaos and Eldar in epic battles and master their distinct abilities, weapons, and tech trees to eradicate the enemy and rule the known universe. Unprecedented realism. Appropriately scaled terrain, vehicle physics and dynamic lightning contribute to a level of realism never before displayed in a real-time strategy game. Visceral cinematic melee and ranged combat. Realistic unit animations immerse you in intense brutal combat . Pioneering tactical gameplay. Innovations such as cover, squad-based combat, and morale add new strategic depth to real-time warfare. Dynamic multiplayer. Test your true combat abilities in two-to-eight player battles providing endless re-playability

Name: Control Ultimate Edition
Description:
Control Ultimate Edition Control Ultimate Edition contains the main game and all previously released Expansions ('The Foundation' and 'AWE') in one great value package. A corruptive presence has invaded the Federal Bureau of Control…Only you have the power to stop it. The world is now your weapon in an epic fight to annihilate an ominous enemy through deep and unpredictable environments. Containment has failed, humanity is at stake. Will you regain control? Winner of over 80 awards, Control is a visually stunning third-person action-adventure that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Blending open-ended environments with the signature world-building and storytelling of renowned developer, Remedy Entertainment, Control presents an expansive and intensely gratifying gameplay experience. Key features Uncover the mysteries Can you handle the bureau’s dark secrets? Unfold an epic supernatural struggle, filled with unexpected characters and bizarre events, as you search for your missing brother, and discover the truth that has brought you here. Everything is your weapon Unleash destruction through transforming weaponry and telekinetic powers. Discover new ways to annihilate your enemies as you harness powerful abilities to turn everything around you into a lethal weapon. Explore a hidden world Delve deep into the ominous expanses of a secretive government agency. Explore the Bureau’s shifting environments only to discover that there is always more than meets the eye… Fight for control Battle a relentless enemy through exciting missions and challenging boss fights to earn powerful upgrades that maximize abilities and customize your weaponry.

Outer Wilds, a critically-acclaimed and award-winning open-world mystery, immerses players in a solar system trapped in an unending time loop. This distinctive concept has garnered significant praise, including the esteemed Best Game award at the 2020 BAFTA Games Awards. Industry experts also recognized its substantial influence on the gaming world, as it was named Game of the Year in 2019 by leading publications such as Giant Bomb, Polygon, Eurogamer, and The Guardian.

As the newest recruit of the Outer Wilds Ventures Space Program, your primary objective is to unravel the mysteries of a peculiar and constantly changing solar system. The game features a variety of engaging puzzles that encourage active exploration. What secrets are concealed within the ominous expanse of the Dark Bramble?
