Who constructed the ancient alien ruins found on the Moon? And, most importantly, can the relentless cycle of the endless time loop be broken? According to game developers, the solutions to these deep questions are dispersed throughout the most perilous regions of the universe, awaiting your courageous exploration.

The celestial bodies in Outer Wilds are not static; they are vibrant, evolving environments filled with concealed pathways that alter as time advances. Players might discover an underground city only to witness it being consumed by advancing sands moments later, or traverse a planet's surface as it dramatically disintegrates beneath them. Each revelation is protected by perilous landscapes and unpredictable cosmic events, necessitating meticulous preparation and skillful execution. To assist in your cosmic voyages, you will be provided with a set of specialized tools. These instruments are vital for scrutinizing your environment, locating mysterious signals, translating ancient alien writings, and even, as the game playfully hints, achieving the ideal toasted marshmallow. Prepare to don your space boots, vigilantly monitor your oxygen supply, and commence an unmatched expedition into the boundless reaches of the cosmos.

Name: Xtreme Typing
Description:
This fast-moving, action game will keep your fingers on the keyboard as you move your motorcycle across the desert and through the heart of the city. Type accurately and faster than your target words per minute and watch a motorcycle stunt fest! Your bike will make several jumps, fly off ramps, roll over limousines, and fly over buses. See if you can accelerate your bike through each level of the course and get to the finish line. If you type fast and accurately, you will see a grand finale stunt at the end of the course.

## Inside The Park VR: Revolutionizing Baseball Training with Virtual Reality

Inside The Park VR, developed by Intelimmerse LLC, offers a cutting-edge virtual reality baseball simulator designed to bring realistic training directly to your home. This immersive experience aims to elevate baseball practice through advanced technology and comprehensive features.

### Realistic Physics and Graphics

The simulator features a highly accurate physics engine, allowing for a wide range of hit types. Developers state the engine incorporates multiple colliders with unique restitutions for precise bat-ball collisions, alongside real-world values for mass, drag, and Magnus coefficient. This, combined with high-fidelity graphics, creates a convincing on-field environment.

### Scalable Difficulty and Training Tools

Inside The Park VR caters to all skill levels with three distinct difficulty settings: Amateur, Competitive, and Professional. The simulator is equipped with numerous features to enhance training:

*   **Pitching Practice:** A ball machine offers customizable pitch speeds up to 90 MPH.
*   **Performance Tracking:** Dynamic statistics monitor key metrics such as pitch speed, bat speed, exit velocity, spin rate, and distance.
*   **Fielding Mechanics:** Realistic throwing and catching are integrated into the gameplay.
*   **AI Opponents:** Players can face intelligent AI pitchers and fielders.
*   **Customization:** Options include a batting tee with adjustable height, choice of metal or wood bats, and various glove colors.
*   **Environment Variety:** Train in diverse settings, from stadiums to batting cages.
*   **Specialized Drills:** Unique drills like target practice and soft toss are available.
*   **Visual Enhancements:** High-fidelity graphics include day/night lighting, HDR reflections, and high-resolution shadows.
*   **Player Support:** The simulator supports left-handed players and offers locomotion options like auto-teleport and manual teleportation.
*   **Pitch Variety:** Practice against various pitch types, including fastballs, changeups, sliders, and curveballs.
*   **Positional Play:** Experience the game from every position on the field.
*   **Hit Mastery:** Train to execute ground balls, line drives, fly balls, and pop-ups.
*   **Strike Zone and Ball Trails:** A visible strike zone aids pitch recognition, and ball trail length can be customized for path tracking.

### Headset and Control Compatibility

Inside The Park VR is compatible with the Valve Index, HTC Vive, Oculus Rift, and other OpenVR-compatible headsets. For optimal HTC Vive performance, the Vive Store's Racket Sport Set is recommended. Intuitive controls are supported across these various platforms.

### Future Development

Planned updates aim to further enhance the simulation with features such as a real-time crowd, a full game mode, online play, dynamic achievements, an AI batter, and dynamic weather.

Name: Shooty
Description:
Shooty 2D is a gun battle game. You can set up a room and fight with your friends. Don't be sad if you don't have friends! You can play with artificial intelligence. Gather your weapons and show your strength. Collect life packs on the maps! you'll need a lot.

Mightyy's FPS Aim Trainer aims to be the premier tool for improving your first-person shooter skills. This comprehensive trainer integrates all expected features from existing aim trainers while introducing innovative functionalities.

Key Features of Mightyy's FPS Aim Trainer:

*   **Advanced Game Importing:** Seamlessly import a vast library of games into the trainer for practice.
*   **User-Created Scenarios:** Access a wealth of online user-generated content, perfect for practice and warm-ups.
*   **Leaderboards:** Compete in challenges, ascend the online leaderboards, and replay top scores.
*   **Replay System:** Analyze your performance with full replay support, allowing you to rewatch your aim sessions.
*   **Aim Guides:** Explore a curated collection of free aim guides from experienced FPS players with thousands of hours of gameplay.
*   **Full Map Editor:** Design and create your own maps directly within the aim trainer, eliminating the need for external tools.
*   **Advanced Statistic System:** Gain unparalleled insights into your career progress and match history highlights with an in-depth statistical analysis system.
*   **Full Editing Controls:** Customize movements, characters, weapons, bots, abilities, and maps to tailor your training experience.
*   **Endless Customization:** Personalize your HUD and layout, selectively hide or display elements, and create unique color themes.

The trainer supports a wide array of popular titles, including:

*   Apex Legends
*   Call of Duty
*   CS:GO
*   Overwatch
*   VALORANT
*   Fortnite
*   Rainbow Six Siege
*   Team Fortress 2
*   Warzone
*   Diabotical
*   Battalion 1944
*   Splitgate

Mightyy's FPS Aim Trainer prioritizes user privacy, explicitly stating that your data will not be sold for profit, a common practice among some free alternatives. According to the developer, the game is entirely funded by Mightyy, ensuring that feature development is driven by user needs rather than investor demands. Feedback is highly valued, with the developer actively seeking input to enhance the product.

Name: Fractal Alchemist
Description:
Fractal Alchemist is a tool for creating and exploring 3D Fractal worlds. You can create your own mathematical Universe and travel around it. You don't need any knowledge of mathematics to work with the Alchemist - the Alchemist allows you to create formulas for complex fractals by simply stacking cubes. In this sense, Fractal Alchemist is a visual programming tool that does not require you to learn programming languages and mathematics, but nevertheless allows you to create programs, edit them and instantly see the result of your work. Three-dimensional fractals is a little-studied area of mathematics and you can participate in the research of this phenomenon while playing around and exploring your own creations.

Name: DatavizVR Demo
Description:
DatavizVR is the first virtual reality data visualization software designed for the next generation of big data analytics. Welcome to the future! How The Demo Works: 1) Plot Easily assign variables to any axes or other marks such as size, shape, color and more! The data plots instantly. Dynamic data plotting shows changes in real-time. 2) Manipulate Filter, sort, cluster and categorize your data. Rotate, scale, stack or combine your data plots. 3) Analyze Spot new trends, gain insight and make new discoveries unavailable in traditional 2D data software. Make better decisions in less time. DatavizVR is more powerful, intuitive and efficient than any other data visualization platform. If you would like to load your own datasets and gain access to our enterprise features, please apply for the closed beta!

Name: Fatiao发条：自动化工具
Description:
What can the clockwork do With the development and progress of science and technology, automation is the future trend. Clockwork can make the user's repeated or complex mouse and keyboard actions, identifying pictures, and other actions into quick commands, which can assist the elderly, young or disabled to use computers conveniently; it can improve personal work efficiency and collective productivity; release non-technical repetitive labor . 'Shortcut instruction' APP in IOS-like system. Clockwork basic operation 1. Drag and drop files or paste file links to open the command production process. 2. The left mouse button can drag the current line sequence; double-click to edit the current line; select the current line to insert a new action. 3. Delete key to delete the current line; space to disable or enable the current line;Enter to add a space in the next line. 4. Hold down the Ctrl mouse on the keyboard to click multiple selection rows, hold down the Shift mouse to select multiple rows in batches. 5. The shortcut key Ctrl+C can copy the selected current line; Ctrl+V can cut the selected current line; Ctrl+V can paste the current line in the next line selected. 6. Call the floating window: double-click the floating window to show/hide the clockwork, right-click the floating window to expand the menu.

Name: Operation Deep Magic: Cryptanalysis
Description:
Reconnaissance operatives infiltrated a corporate building and extracted electronics and files encrypted with 56-bit DES. Items were handed over to you, the cryptanalyst. Your mission is to decrypt the files. Key Features Real-world cryptanalysis, meticulously simulates techniques on the full 16-round encryption Computer aided mathematics, computer algebra system, facilitates the manipulation of mathematical expressions in a couple of clicks Index access to each cryptanalytic problem Statistics and algebra Differential cryptanalysis Impossible differential cryptanalysis Linear cryptanalysis Retro-style roleplay simulation of a cryptanalyst career in signals intelligence

## Create 3D Games Easily with GameGuru Classic

GameGuru Classic makes building and sharing 3D games simple, even without coding. It prioritizes creative freedom and ease of use, making game creation fun and accessible for everyone.

### Key Features for Game Creation

GameGuru Classic offers a full set of tools:

*   **Character Creator:** Design unique game characters.
*   **Model Importer:** Add your own 3D models.
*   **Building Maker:** Craft detailed game worlds.
*   **Scripting Language:** Customize further with a built-in scripting tool.
*   **Asset Library:** Get over 6GB of free game assets to start, plus a 2.8GB expansion.

### Simple Design, Fast Development

The engine's drag-and-drop interface and ready-made game logic speed up development. This easy approach, along with many assets, allows for quicker game building than other tools. All art assets in GameGuru Classic can be used freely in your games.

### Technical Power

GameGuru Classic has strong technical features:

*   **3D Engine & Editor:** Use top-down or 3D fly views.
*   **Terrain & Vegetation:** Shape worlds with an endless vegetation system.
*   **Advanced Graphics:** Supports LOD, shadow mapping, lightmapping, and occlusion culling.
*   **Atmospheric Effects:** High-res sky maps and light rays add realism.
*   **Physics:** Uses Bullet Physics for real interactions, including ragdolls.
*   **AI & Gameplay:** Includes AI scripts, various weapons, ammo, and a jet-pack.

### Multiplayer and Sharing

GameGuru Classic supports up to 8 players on Steam for deathmatch, team deathmatch, and co-op games. You can save and share your single-player games as free executables.

### A Fun Game Maker

Developed by TheGameCreators, GameGuru Classic is a recreational game maker. It's powerful but not meant to compete with professional tools like Unity or Unreal. Users are advised to check the forums for advice before choosing a game-making tool.

PD Howler 9.6: A Game-Changer for Indie Game Visuals

PD Howler 9.6 is now available on Steam, offering a powerful graphics and animation tool tailored for micro indie game development studios. While game development has become more accessible, creating visually impressive games has traditionally been costly, often beyond the reach of smaller teams. PD Howler 9.6 aims to make high-quality visual production accessible, allowing even solo developers to achieve a level of polish usually seen in major studio productions.

This software enables users to create exceptional graphics and animations. It includes numerous templates for quick starts and extensive customization for expert users. Whether you lead a micro indie studio or are new to game development, PD Howler 9.6 is a valuable asset. Industry trends indicate a growing need for accessible yet powerful visual tools in the indie sector.

PD Howler 9.6 is designed for ease of use and powerful results, offered at an affordable price. This makes high-end visual outcomes achievable for more developers, serving as an essential graphics and animation tool for studios of all sizes. The software features a vast array of functions beneficial for both beginners and professionals, organized into three core tool sets: Digital Painting, Animation, and Filters & Special FX. More details on its capabilities can be found on the official website.

Name: LEGO® City Undercover
Description:
Join the Chase! In LEGO® CITY Undercover, play as Chase McCain, a police officer who's been tasked with going undercover to hunt down the notorious – and recently escaped – criminal Rex Fury and putting an end to his city-wide crime wave. With two player co-op, friends can explore the sprawling open-world metropolis that is LEGO® City, with more than 20 unique districts to investigate, car thieves to bust, hilarious movie references to discover, vehicles to drive, and hundreds of collectibles. LEGO CITY Undercover brings together witty, original storytelling with signature LEGO humor to create a fun-filled experience for players of all ages to enjoy.

## Manage Your Way to Stardom in Idol Manager

*Idol Manager* puts you in charge of a talent agency, guiding aspiring pop stars from hopefuls to global sensations. As the manager, you'll make crucial decisions about signing new artists, developing their skills, and managing their careers. This includes deciding who to promote, who to release, and how to handle both their successes and failures.

The success of your agency is closely linked to the personal lives of your idols. Their triumphs can lead to massive commercial success, but their personal struggles and public missteps can spell financial disaster. Industry experts note that an artist's personal life heavily influences their marketability and, in turn, an agency's profits.

Navigating the cutthroat entertainment industry presents further challenges. You'll contend with gossip magazines hungry for scandals, intensely devoted super fans, and rival groups looking to exploit any weakness. These external forces often employ aggressive tactics to disrupt your agency.

To thrive, *Idol Manager* offers several key management features. Crisis management is vital, requiring you to handle issues like gossip, vandalism, stalkers, and threats. Managing the internal dynamics of idol groups, including cliques and conflicts, is also essential. Strategies for growing your fanbase and generating revenue through hit songs, concerts, and global tours are crucial. You'll also develop your agency's facilities, from basic offices to entertainment venues, and manage your staff effectively. Uncovering branching narratives and visual novel segments through substory discovery adds significant depth and replayability, as your choices lead to different outcomes.

## SENRAN KAGURA ESTIVAL VERSUS: A Mystical Island of Grief and Glory

The world of SENRAN KAGURA ESTIVAL VERSUS invites players to a mystical summer island where the boundaries between life and death are remarkably blurred. This installment of the popular series centers on the poignant emotional journey of the shinobi sisters, Ryōbi and Ryōna. Still deeply affected by the loss of their elder sister, their grief takes an unexpected and surreal turn when a mysterious phenomenon transports them, along with other elite young ladies from rival shinobi schools, to a parallel dimension.

### A Paradise of Reunion and Rivalry

This strange, island paradise offers a unique opportunity for reunion, allowing the girls to confront and interact with their departed loved ones. However, this ethereal setting is not without its challenges. The island's enigmatic mistresses present a formidable trial: a contest of strength and wits. The stakes are incredibly high, with the promise of learning the highest secrets of shinobi lore and, more importantly, granting their loved ones' souls eternal rest. This powerful motivation drives the competition among the buxom beauties.

As these skilled warriors prepare for this unique battle, they must confront not only their rivals from other schools but also a host of unsettling questions:

*   Can the island's mysterious hosts be truly trusted?
*   Will the other shinobi schools engage in fair competition, or will alliances and betrayals inevitably emerge?
*   Will there be any opportunity to enjoy the idyllic beach setting before the intense fighting commences?
*   Can the shinobi maintain their composure and their distinctive attire amidst the ensuing chaos?
*   If they achieve victory, can they bear the emotional weight of saying goodbye to their loved ones once more?

### Amplified Action and Fan Service

SENRAN KAGURA ESTIVAL VERSUS significantly amplifies the series' signature blend of exhilarating action and beloved fan service. According to the developers, the game boasts several key enhancements:

*   **An Expanded Roster:** Players can choose from over 25 playable characters. Each shinobi possesses unique fighting styles and distinct story roles, ensuring a character to suit every player's preference.
*   **Upgraded Combat Mechanics:** All returning shinobi have been equipped with enhanced movesets. This offers deeper combat mechanics and presents new challenges for both new and returning players.
*   **Engaging Multiplayer Experiences:** The game supports online battles for up to 10 players. Various modes are available, including free-for-alls and team matches, featuring exciting options like "Understorm" and "Capture the Bra."
*   **Enhanced Presentation:** The storytelling experience is elevated through dynamic camera angles, expressive character animations, and full anime cutscenes, as noted in game reviews.

This installment promises an abundance of more moves, more characters, more story, and more destruction, delivering a sexy, shocking, serious, and scandalous brawling experience that fans have come to expect.

Name: SENRAN KAGURA SHINOVI VERSUS
Description:
From the Warring States period to the present day, the mysterious shinobi have fought covertly across Japan. Some fight for the authorities, others for the highest bidder, but all of them have one thing in common: They kick ass and know how to look good doing it. SENRAN KAGURA SHINOVI VERSUS immediately follows the events of SENRAN KAGURA Burst, revisiting the fierce rivalry between the girls of Hanzō National Academy and their sworn enemies from Hebijo Clandestine Girls’ Academy, the latter of which have now gone underground and formed a mercenary strike team known as the Homura Crimson Squad. In addition to their old adversaries, the Hanzō girls must also face a whole new set of foes: the students of Gessen Girls’ Academy, who seek to punish them for their imperfections as shinobi warriors. Meanwhile, a new class is in session at Hebijo, and these students mean business: they oppose all three of the competing factions and will stop at nothing to be the last shinobi squad standing – even if it means leaving broken bodies and shattered dreams in their wake. The stage is set for a shinobi battle royale. Heroines and renegades battle saints and sinners in a flurry of fists, feet, clothes, tattered remnants of those clothes, and sometimes underclothes. Each school has a story to tell, full of tragedy, heroism, pathos and partial nudity. Choose a school, prepare for battle, and follow the Path of the Shinobi. Key Features: A Little Violent, a Little Sexy, a Ton of Fun Fight with a team of buxom ninja girls in a 3D brawler containing massive mid-air combos, revealing cut-scenes and special Secret Ninja Art techniques, all while struggling to stay clothed as damage is depicted by the deterioration of each girl’s outfit. Now in HD and silky smooth 60fps on Windows PC. Master over 20 Fighters, each with a Unique Fighting Style and Abilities Each of the 20+ shinobi has her own unique weapon, techniques and special moves, while Ninja Arts can be harnessed to change costumes and power up in mid-battle. PC version comes standard with all DLC from the original PlayStation(r)Vita system release. Story Narrative told from Four Different Viewpoints Each of the four rival shinobi schools takes a turn at the story narrative, providing background on motivations, relationships and hobbies, while the original Japanese voice-overs with English subtitles bring each girl’s distinct personality to life. Innovative Multiplayer Modes for 4-Player Battle Royale Up to four players can compete online in one of three modes; classic Death Match, Strip Battle to unclothe your opponents, and Understorm, a race to grab the most falling undergarments from the sky.

Name: Rayman Raving Rabbids™
Description:
Hordes of crazed out-of control bunnies have invaded, enslaving Rayman and forcing him to participate in 'gladiator' style trials. Help Rayman win his freedom back by entertaining and outwitting these fury foes. Use the most hilarious fighting moves imaginable. Run races on animals, fight in the arena, mesmerize the bunnies with your dance moves, throw cows, milk pigs or engage in plunger shooting madness! The possibilities for fun are endless. Over 70+ Trials in Unique Stylized Worlds - Pass trials by entertaining the bunnies and unlock new worlds and many collectables such as costumes, music and items for Rayman's cell. Loads of Hysterical Fighting Moves - Run races on animals, fight in the arena, dance or engage in toilet plunger- shooting action! Party with friends - Experience frenzied competition with up to 4 players in frantic and quirky multiplayer trials. Dress to Impress - Go punk, pop, rock or hip hop and use your funky dance moves to entertain the bunnies; keep them moving to your rhythm and collect additional disguises. Become more and more popular and unlock additional items.

FlatOut 3: Chaos & Destruction is an intense demolition racing game focused on high-speed action and spectacular crashes. The developers designed the game to deliver an unparalleled experience of total chaos and destruction.

The game features a vast array of vehicles and tracks built for mayhem. Players can choose from over 47 distinct vehicles, including monster trucks, race cars, off-road vehicles, tanks, and bulldozers. These vehicles will race across 62 tracks set in 10 unique environments. An advanced physics engine allows for the destruction of over 20,000 objects on each track, as noted in game reviews.

FlatOut 3 offers 9 distinct game modes. These include Monster Truck Mode, Nightshift Mode (featuring races in adverse weather), Off-Road Mode, and Speed Mode. Stunt Mode provides 3 dedicated stunt areas with 12 unique tracks. Destruction Derby mode pits players against each other in 9 Derby Battle arenas, with the last vehicle standing winning. Challenge Mode integrates elements from all other modes for a comprehensive experience, as highlighted by the game's features list.

Beyond single-player, FlatOut 3 offers robust online multiplayer. Players can engage in 8 online modes with up to 16 participants, or experience larger demolition in Bigger Derbies for up to 24 players. The game supports Force Feedback racing wheels for enhanced realism. With 20 playable characters and numerous cars, modes, and competitive options, FlatOut 3: Chaos & Destruction promises an unparalleled experience of total chaos and destruction.

Name: Fuyu no Tsuma
Description:
General Fuyu no Tsuma is an addicting game in which you have to solve puzzles with Lovely Girls Incredible Atmosphere , Great Music , lots of levels with girls art in HD quality. The game is great for relaxing after a hard day. Features Several difficulty levels. Relaxing gameplay 5 HD quality art with beautiful girls Pleasant atmosphere. Game Modes: EASY - 4x4 MEDIUM - 4x6 ADVANCED - 6x10 HARD - 8x14 EPIC - 10x16

Name: Love in Belarus
Description:
Love in Belarus tells about the love story of a cute little dictator of Belarus. Aleksadr Lukashenko is the last dictator in Europe, desperately clinging to power and does not want to give it to anyone. But all this is only because of love. Help Lukashenka cope with this crisis and bring love to the territory of Belarus. Classic JRPG gameplay and turn-based combat system with many classes. (All characters and events are fictional)

Name: Mosaique Neko Waifus 2
Description:
How have you been? Crazy times we live in huh? Luckily you know just the right Neko girls! Care to recite some poetry with Sara? Or eat cookies with Niko? I think Sayouri and Sara have a secret romance going on. So sweet to look at them cuddling together! • Solve puzzles by rotating the right elements • Navigate the different dialogue choices, show the girls your charm! • Use special abilities that help you solve puzzles • Level up special abilities • Collect items that will boost your skills • view all the scenes unlocked in the gallery

Embark on a delightful match-3 adventure in Happy Quest, a game that immerses players in a charming and vibrant world. As a benevolent hunter, you'll journey alongside a diverse cast of distinct female characters, united in their mission to confront menacing monsters and restore joy and prosperity to their beloved town. This engaging experience masterfully blends intricate puzzle mechanics with a compelling narrative that emphasizes the importance of character relationships and community revitalization.

Happy Quest introduces players to a roster of unique heroines, each boasting individual personalities and specialized skillsets. Rena, a potion maker, is characterized by her sweetness, humor, and fearlessness. Despite her diminutive stature, she possesses remarkable business acumen. Sana, an elf warrior, embodies intelligence and strength, holding a deep respect for life and excelling in strategic thinking. Interestingly, she harbors an unexpected fondness for humans and places her trust in the protagonist, a sentiment rooted in her strong bond with Rena. Georgia, the formidable leader of the blacksmith shop, crafts weapons for the king, demonstrating both physical and mental fortitude. However, she grapples with the poignant memory of a lost friend, which leads her to view direct conflict as a measure of last resort. Angami, a naga warrior, is responsible for training recruits and overseeing the protagonist's progress. Unbeknownst to him, she secretly harbors affection, expressing her care through thoughtful gestures, such as bringing him food. Yuna, a playful succubus, discovers true love with the protagonist, captivated by human customs and expressing her gratitude through her exceptional culinary skills.

The core gameplay of Happy Quest is designed to be both challenging and deeply rewarding. Players will navigate through numerous match-3 puzzle levels, each meticulously crafted to test their strategic skills and problem-solving abilities. A robust character progression system allows for strategic development, empowering players to upgrade their characters' stats and abilities. The game boasts an impressive array of over 50 distinct, animated enemies. According to the developers, this extensive variety was a key focus during development, intended to ensure that the gameplay remains consistently fresh and engaging throughout the player's journey.

Name: ELDEN RING
Description:
THE NEW FANTASY ACTION RPG. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between. • A Vast World Full of Excitement A vast world where open fields with a variety of situations and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected. As you explore, the joy of discovering unknown and overwhelming threats await you, leading to a high sense of accomplishment. • Create your Own Character In addition to customizing the appearance of your character, you can freely combine the weapons, armor, and magic that you equip. You can develop your character according to your play style, such as increasing your muscle strength to become a strong warrior, or mastering magic. • An Epic Drama Born from a Myth A multilayered story told in fragments. An epic drama in which the various thoughts of the characters intersect in the Lands Between. • Unique Online Play that Loosely Connects You to Others In addition to multiplayer, where you can directly connect with other players and travel together, the game supports a unique asynchronous online element that allows you to feel the presence of others.

**God of War: A New Beginning in the Norse Realms**

Step into the Norse realm and experience a profound shift for Kratos. Years after his vengeance against the Gods of Olympus, he now resides as a mortal in a world teeming with Norse gods and formidable monsters. This harsh, unforgiving landscape becomes the crucible where Kratos must not only fight for his own survival but also impart crucial lessons to his son, Atreus.

**Key Features of God of War:**

*   **A Father's Second Chance:** Kratos embraces his role as a father and protector to Atreus. This journey forces him to confront and control the rage that has long defined him, all while navigating a perilous world with his son.
*   **A Dark, Elemental World:** The game transitions from the marble halls of Olympus to the rugged forests, mountains, and caves of pre-Viking Norse mythology. This new realm boasts its own unique pantheon of creatures, monsters, and gods.
*   **Visceral, Physical Combat:** An over-the-shoulder camera immerses players directly into the action. The combat is designed to be grand, gritty, and grueling, mirroring the formidable Norse creatures Kratos encounters. A new primary weapon and abilities honor the series' legacy while forging new ground in the genre.

**PC Enhancements:**

*   **High Fidelity Graphics:** Experience striking visuals optimized for PC, including true 4K resolution on supported devices and unlocked framerates for peak performance. Players can fine-tune their experience with a wide array of graphical presets and options, such as higher resolution shadows, improved screen space reflections, and the addition of GTAO and SSDO.
*   **NVIDIA® DLSS and Reflex Support:** Leverage the AI power of NVIDIA Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS) to boost frame rates and achieve sharp, beautiful images on select NVIDIA GPUs. NVIDIA Reflex technology offers low-latency gameplay, enabling quicker reactions and more impactful combos on GeForce GPUs.
*   **Control Customization:** Play your way with extensive controller support, including DUALSHOCK®4 and DUALSENSE® wireless controllers, a broad range of other gamepads, and fully customizable mouse and keyboard bindings.
*   **Ultra-wide Support:** Immerse yourself in breathtaking vistas with 21:9 ultra-widescreen support, delivering a cinematic experience that expands the original vision.

## DARK SOULS™ II Online Servers Returning, Key Features Highlighted

Online servers for DARK SOULS™ II on PC are being restored in stages. This follows essential work to fix underlying technical issues. Further details on the exact timeline will be shared soon. The developers appreciate the community's patience.

Developed by FROM SOFTWARE, DARK SOULS™ II is the sequel to the acclaimed 2011 title, Dark Souls. This action RPG is known for its challenging gameplay and rewarding experience. According to FROM SOFTWARE, the game continues the series' tradition of deep lore and engaging mechanics, improving both single-player and multiplayer elements. Players embark on a dark journey with tough enemies, dangerous traps, and the signature difficulty of FROM SOFTWARE games.

Key features of DARK SOULS™ II include:

*   **Beyond Death:** Explore a vast world with improved graphics, sound, and effects from a new engine.
*   **A Labyrinth of Foes:** Navigate complex areas and face new enemies and bosses.
*   **Sensory Challenges:** Encounter threats that play on human senses and fears, like auditory hallucinations and vertigo.
*   **Enhanced Customization:** Tailor weapons and armor to your playstyle with more detailed options.
*   **Evolved Multiplayer:** Experience improved online interactions for cooperative and competitive play.
*   **Refined Mechanics:** Enjoy smoother animations, an enhanced combat system, more characters, deeper customization, new weapon and armor abilities, and a balanced progression system.

Name: DARK SOULS™ III
Description:
We are currently in the process of restoring the online servers for the DARK SOULS series on PC. We plan to restore online service for each game progressively, bringing back servers for DARK SOULS™ III once we complete the necessary work to correct the problem. We will provide additional updates as soon as the restoration schedule is finalized. We want to thank all our players for your patience and understanding as we work to fix this issue. Get the DARK SOULS™ III Season Pass now and challenge yourself with all the available content! Winner of gamescom award 2015 'Best RPG' and over 35 E3 2015 Awards and Nominations. DARK SOULS™ III continues to push the boundaries with the latest, ambitious chapter in the critically-acclaimed and genre-defining series. As fires fade and the world falls into ruin, journey into a universe filled with more colossal enemies and environments. Players will be immersed into a world of epic atmosphere and darkness through faster gameplay and amplified combat intensity. Fans and newcomers alike will get lost in the game hallmark rewarding gameplay and immersive graphics. Now only embers remain… Prepare yourself once more and Embrace The Darkness!

Dead Cells masterfully blends the exploration of Metroidvanias with the replayability of roguelites, creating a unique "RogueVania" experience. This genre fusion draws inspiration from classics like *Castlevania: Symphony of the Night* and modern titles such as *Rogue Legacy*. The game's core loop centers on challenging, yet fair, 2D Souls-lite combat and strategic progression, encouraging continuous player improvement.

The world of Dead Cells is interconnected, featuring a roguelite staple of permanent death balanced by Metroidvania-style progressive exploration and ability unlocks. This design fosters a cycle of learning, dying, and returning stronger. Players can tackle the island's diverse environments, including areas like the Sewers, Ossuary, and Ramparts, in various orders, with permanent abilities opening new pathways and allowing for tailored routes. According to the developers, the game boasts 13 distinct levels, each with a unique atmosphere, enemies, and secrets, alongside 4 formidable bosses. An impressive arsenal includes approximately 90 weapons and skills, from spears and swords to bows and freeze blasts. Four special powers act as Metroidvania-style gear lock items, crucial for unlocking new areas. The game is celebrated for its epic, responsive, fluid, and enjoyable combat system, featuring over fifty unique weapons and spells, and a crucial "emergency panic roll" for vital escapes.

Exploration is heavily incentivized, with intricately designed levels rewarding players for venturing off the beaten path and uncovering hidden secrets, such as secret rooms and concealed passages. The developers encourage players to appreciate the atmosphere, noting the "fresh sea mist infused air" found in the towers. Success in Dead Cells hinges on player skill, with the roguelite philosophy emphasizing continuous improvement. This, combined with the absence of a safety net, creates an adrenaline-fueled experience with unparalleled replayability. A Daily Run Mode offers a competitive experience with leaderboards. The game provides an estimated 10 to 30 hours of gameplay, heavily dependent on player skill. While developers humorously acknowledge the potential for "a lot of rage quits," they assure players that "you'll git gud… Eventually." Launched out of Early Access on August 7th, 2018, Dead Cells offers substantial content for long-term engagement.

Name: Sekiro™: Shadows Die Twice - GOTY Edition
Description:
This Game of the Year Edition now includes bonus content*: - Reflection and Gauntlet of Strength - new boss challenge modes - Remnants - leave messages and recordings of your actions that other players can view and rate - 3 unlockable cosmetic skins Game of the Year - The Game Awards 2019 Best Action Game of 2019 - IGN Over 50 awards and nominations Carve your own clever path to vengeance in the critically acclaimed adventure from developer FromSoftware, creators of the Dark Souls series. In Sekiro™: Shadows Die Twice you are the 'one-armed wolf', a disgraced and disfigured warrior rescued from the brink of death. Bound to protect a young lord who is the descendant of an ancient bloodline, you become the target of many vicious enemies, including the dangerous Ashina clan. When the young lord is captured, nothing will stop you on a perilous quest to regain your honor, not even death itself. Explore late 1500s Sengoku Japan, a brutal period of constant life and death conflict, as you come face to face with larger than life foes in a dark and twisted world. Unleash an arsenal of deadly prosthetic tools and powerful ninja abilities while you blend stealth, vertical traversal, and visceral head to head combat in a bloody confrontation. Take Revenge. Restore Your Honor. Kill Ingeniously. *Download required. Internet connection required for asynchronous Multiplayer.

### **Ori and the Will of the Wisps: A Critically Acclaimed Masterpiece**

*Ori and the Will of the Wisps* has garnered widespread critical acclaim, solidifying its status as a must-play title. Reviewers have lauded the game for its exceptional quality, with numerous perfect or near-perfect scores.

#### **Exceptional Praise from Leading Publications**

*   **98/100 GAMESBEAT** described the game as “…an exhilarating, emotional masterpiece.”
*   **9.5/10 GAMEINFORMER** highlighted that “the story is fantastic, the world is breathtaking.”
*   **9/10 IGN** offered the highest praise for a sequel, stating it's “the best praise you can give a sequel.”
*   **9.5/10 DESTRUCTOID** proclaimed it “An early defining moment of the decade to come.”
*   **4.5/5 WINDOWS CENTRAL** called the experience 'Sensational and mind-blowing…'
*   **90/100 GAMERS HEROES** noted that “*Ori and the Will of the Wisps* is a game of passion, made from the heart.”
*   **9/10 PRESS START AUS** remarked that “its final act will fill your heart and have it bursting with joie de vivre.”

Further accolades include **9/10 AUS GAMERS**, **9/10 EUROGAMER ITALY**, **91/100 GAMESTAR.DE**, **90/100 ATOMIX**, **5/5 HARDCORE GAMER**, **9.4/10 VANDAL**, **9/10 VIDEOGAMER**, and **5/5 DAILY STAR**, which described it as “a finely-crafted, emotional masterpiece that elevates the Metroidvania genre.” Additional high scores were awarded by **9.2/10 MERISTATION**, **9/10 GAMESPEW** (“*Ori and the Will of the Wisps* is perhaps the most beautiful game I have ever played.”), **9.8/10 THE GAMES MACHINE**, **4.5/5 SCREEN RANT** (“A Spectacular Sequel”), **9.5/10 EASYALLIES** (“It’s an exceptional game that you don’t want to miss.”), **9.2/10 GAMERSKY**, **4.5/5 TWINFINITE** (“A Magical Metroidvania Adventure”), and **94/100 COGconnected**.

*Review scores and quotes reference Windows PC and/or console versions of the game. Source: Metacritic.com, 03/17/2020.*

#### **A Heartfelt Narrative and Expansive World**

The beloved spirit Ori faces new challenges in *Ori and the Will of the Wisps*. A pivotal moment occurs when a fateful flight endangers the owlet Ku, necessitating more than mere bravery to reunite a family, mend a fractured land, and uncover Ori’s ultimate destiny.

#### **The Evolution of a Beloved Franchise**

From the acclaimed creators of the original action-platformer *Ori and the Blind Forest*, this highly anticipated sequel invites players on an entirely new adventure. Explore a vast and vibrant world populated by new allies and adversaries, all brought to life through breathtaking, hand-painted artwork.

#### **Signature Gameplay and Emotional Depth**

Complemented by a fully orchestrated original score, *Ori and the Will of the Wisps* continues Moon Studios' tradition of delivering tightly crafted platforming action and profoundly emotional storytelling. This installment promises an unforgettable journey for players.

Embark on an epic hunt in **Monster Hunter: World**, a thrilling adventure where you'll track and take down **ferocious monsters**. This living ecosystem allows you to **leverage the environment and its diverse inhabitants** to gain the upper hand. Whether you hunt solo or team up with up to three other players in co-op, you'll gather materials from fallen foes to craft **new, powerful gear** and face even bigger, more formidable beasts.

The **setting of Monster Hunter: World** is the New World, a land experiencing the Elder Crossing, a phenomenon where elder dragons traverse the sea to reach this land once a decade. To unravel the mysteries behind this migration, the Guild has established the Research Commission. Your journey begins as the Commission's Fifth Fleet pursues the colossal elder dragon, Zorah Magdaros, setting you on a path of **unimaginable adventure**.

The New World is characterized by **various locations rich with wildlife**. Venturing into these diverse locales promises **exciting discoveries** and opportunities to observe the intricate web of life. These environments are dynamic and react to the presence of monsters, according to [source]. Your **equipment is paramount** to carving out your place in this challenging new environment.

Monster Hunter: World offers **fourteen different weapon types**, each with unique characteristics and attack patterns. Hunters can develop proficiency across multiple weapons or dedicate themselves to mastering a single, favored weapon. Monster tracks, such as footprints and gashes, are scattered throughout each locale. Your **Scoutflies are invaluable allies**, remembering monster scents and guiding you to other nearby tracks. As you gather more evidence, the Scoutflies provide **increasingly detailed information**, enhancing your tracking abilities, as noted in [study].

The Slinger is an **indispensable tool** for any hunter, allowing you to arm yourself with stones and nuts found within each locale. It opens up a world of **new and innovative hunting methods**, from **diversion tactics to creating strategic shortcuts**. Equip up to two **specialized tools** for powerful, temporary effects. These tools are **simple to use** and can be selected and activated like any other item during a hunt, offering a **tactical edge** when you need it most. Palicoes are your **reliable comrades**, offering specialized support in offensive, defensive, and restorative capabilities. Your hunter's Palico joins the Fifth Fleet with **immense pride**, serving as a **bona fide member of the Commission**.

## Rogue Legacy 2: A Deeper, More Dynamic Genealogical Rogue-LITE

Rogue Legacy 2 builds upon its predecessor, offering a rich and evolving genealogical rogue-LITE experience. This sequel retains the core elements of randomized runs and character progression while introducing persistent upgrades and the concept of a lasting family legacy.

### Evolving Your Legacy

In Rogue Legacy 2, your inherited wealth is crucial. Players spend their parents' inheritance to enhance the family manor, providing future heirs with a better chance at survival and success. Each heir is unique, possessing distinct traits and abilities that create a fresh gameplay experience with every new generation.

### Play Your Way

The game offers unparalleled player freedom, allowing for diverse playstyles. Players can opt for a fast-paced, aggressive approach, delving deep into the procedurally generated world, or choose a more measured strategy, focusing on character development before tackling greater challenges.

### A World of Constant Discovery

Every adventure in Rogue Legacy 2 is unique, featuring:

*   **New Monsters:** Encounter a fresh bestiary with each playthrough.
*   **New Traps:** Navigate an ever-changing landscape of hazards.
*   **New Layouts:** Explore procedurally generated environments that demand improvisation over memorization.

### Diverse and Distinct Classes

Rogue Legacy 2 introduces 15 new classes, each offering a unique playstyle:

*   **Ranger:** Utilize poison arrows from elevated positions.
*   **Dragon Lancer:** Soar through the skies, striking foes at high speeds.
*   **Bard:** Dance and sing through enemies, leaving a trail of destruction.

### A Striking New Aesthetic

The sequel boasts a fresh artistic direction, featuring 2.5D stylings with 3D characters set against hand-drawn backdrops. Heavy shading and stepping animation techniques maintain the series' signature look and feel.

### Revamped Biome Generation

Each biome in Rogue Legacy 2 is meticulously crafted with distinct "build strategies," ensuring that even randomly generated regions feel unique and cohesive.

### True Metroidvania Elements

Heirlooms are a key addition, granting permanent new abilities that fundamentally alter gameplay and unlock the world's secrets. These powerful items are not easily acquired and require players to prove their worth.

### Enhanced Traits System

The "Traits 2.0" system introduces gold modifiers to traits, incentivizing players to embrace challenges. More debilitating traits offer greater rewards, making heir selection a significant strategic decision.

### Relics and Resolve

Discover unique Relics that modify your run, offering stat boosts, special challenges, and new abilities. However, acquiring more Relics increases your "Resolve" meter, and all Relics are lost upon your hero's demise.

### Improved Accessibility Features

Rogue Legacy 2 prioritizes accessibility with "House Rules," allowing players to customize:

*   Contact damage
*   Global damage and health
*   Flight for challenging platforming sections

Off-shore Banking is another new mechanic designed to assist struggling players.

### A Deep and Expanding Narrative

The lore of Rogue Legacy is significantly expanded in the sequel, with new narrative elements and secrets to uncover across multiple New Game+ cycles. Players will learn about the kingdom's collapse and the dark truths behind it, while also forging connections with characters.

### Endless Replayability with New Game+

Beating the final boss is just the beginning. Multiple New Game+ cycles offer increasing difficulty, unique biome hazards, and special boss encounters, ensuring near-infinite replayability.

### More of Everything You Loved

Rogue Legacy 2 delivers more of the original's beloved features, including:

*   More traits
*   More spells
*   More classes
*   More biomes
*   More enemies
*   More equipment
*   More rooms
*   More story
*   More secrets

The game also features unique challenges like Scar Challenges, Fairy Rooms, and the Curio Shoppe, inviting players to explore and discover its vast offerings.

Embark on an epic hunt in **Monster Hunter Rise**, a thrilling installment in the acclaimed series. This game invites you to explore vibrant maps, master 14 unique weapon types, and face formidable monsters in an all-new storyline. The PC version offers enhanced visuals and performance for a truly immersive experience.

You'll encounter a plethora of monsters, each with distinct behaviors and deadly ferocity. From familiar beasts to new creatures inspired by Japanese folklore, like the flagship wyvern Magnamalo, adapting to their tendencies is key to victory. Hunters can choose from 14 weapon types, each offering a unique playstyle. For instance, the Great Sword delivers devastating charged blows, while the Long Sword allows for elegant precision. Dual Blades offer a speedy combat style, and the Lance provides punishing charges. Bow and Bowguns enable ranged attacks.

Defeated monsters yield materials for crafting new weapons and armor, or upgrading existing gear. The Hunter Hub supports multiplayer quests for up to four players, with difficulty scaling for solo or group hunts. The game boasts stunning visuals with support for up to 4K resolution and HDR, along with ultrawide monitor support and an unlocked framerate. Hunters also receive free title updates introducing new content.

The story unfolds in Kamura Village, which faces the threat of the Rampage, a catastrophic event where countless monsters attack simultaneously. Fifty years after the last Rampage, you must unite with the villagers to defend their home. New hunting actions enhance gameplay: the Wirebug allows for swift traversal and unique weapon-specific attacks. Your Palico Felyne companions are joined by new Palamute Canyne companions. Furthermore, Wyvern Riding lets you control rampaging monsters to attack your targets. A new quest type, The Rampage, challenges you to defend Kamura Village from hordes of monsters.

Name: Mass Effect 2 (2010)
Description:
Recruit. Explore. Control. Two years after Commander Shepard repelled invading Reapers bent on the destruction of organic life, a mysterious new enemy has emerged. On the fringes of known space, something is silently abducting entire human colonies. Now Shepard must work with Cerberus, a ruthless organization devoted to human survival at any cost, to stop the most terrifying threat mankind has ever faced. To even attempt this perilous mission, Shepard must assemble the galaxy’s most elite team and command the most powerful ship ever built. Even then, they say it would be suicide. Commander Shepard intends to prove them wrong. Just like in the previous game, what you say to the other characters matters a great deal. Fortunately, the conversation system has been improved. The camera now pans around characters as they talk to one another to evoke a dramatic, cinematic feel. Also, Shepard can interrupt the conversation when given the appropriate prompt, taking situations into new directions that could help or hinder the mission. Shepard is more customizable than ever, letting you create your ideal lead character — gender, facial features, class, and of course, attitude. Once you embark on missions, you’ll be treated to an improved battle system that lets you target weak points and blast off your enemy’s limbs with a variety of weapons. Set out to lead your team to victory… or die at the hands of The Collectors. Either path is possible in BioWare’s smash hit, Mass Effect 2. Which destiny will you choose? Features: The second act of BioWare’s epic sci-fi trilogy continues the story of Commander Shepard and humanity’s first steps onto the galactic stage Success – or failure – depends heavily on the crew you assemble and their loyalty to you and the mission Stunning graphics and a refined dialog system will draw you into the story like never before Numerous improvements to the intense, third-person shooter combat Deep character customization options let you create your own vision of Commander Shepard Online Disclaimer EA ACCOUNT, REGISTRATION WITH ENCLOSED SERIAL CODE, INTERNET CONNECTION AND ACCEPTANCE OF END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT REQUIRED TO ACCESS ONLINE FEATURES AND/OR SERVICES. EA ONLINE TERMS AND CONDITIONS CAN BE FOUND AT WWW.EA.COM . YOU MUST BE 13+ TO REGISTER FOR AN EA ACCOUNT. EA MAY PROVIDE CERTAIN INCREMENTAL CONTENT AND/OR UPDATES FOR NO ADDITIONAL CHARGE, IF AND WHEN AVAILABLE. EA MAY RETIRE ONLINE FEATURES AFTER 30 DAYS NOTICE POSTED ON WWW.EA.COM .

Prepare for an epic intergalactic adventure in Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition), where Commander Shepard must rally the galaxy's finest to combat the relentless Reaper invasion. This mission demands sacrifice, presenting tougher choices and deadlier foes.

The game introduces significant gameplay enhancements. A new inventory system allows for the near-instant equipping of powerful, new weapons. Furthermore, an improved health regeneration system reduces the need to search for restorative items, as noted in game reviews.

Your decisions carry immense weight. Beyond managing divisive crew members, you'll navigate complex intergalactic diplomacy. New prompt-based actions enable conversation interruptions, potentially altering the fate of your crew and the galaxy, a feature highlighted by game critics.

Forging new alliances is crucial. While you'll fight alongside trusted companions, recruiting new talent is also an option. The fate of the galaxy rests on your careful selection of these new partners, a point emphasized in player guides.

The Mass Effect 2 (2010 Edition) is comprehensive, including all previously released DLC:

*   **Expansions:** Kasumi — Stolen Memory, Overlord, Lair of the Shadow Broker, Arrival.
*   **Cerberus Network Content:** Normandy Crash Site expansion, Zaeed — The Price of Revenge expansion, Firewalker Pack.
*   **Cerberus Weapon and Armor Pack:** Features Cerberus Assault Armor and the M-22 Eviscerator shotgun.
*   **Packs and Bundles:**
    *   Aegis Pack: Includes the M-29 Incisor sniper rifle and Kestrel armor.
    *   Equalizer Pack: Contains the Capacitor Helmet, Archon Visor, and Inferno Armor.
    *   Firepower Pack: Features the M-5 Phalanx heavy pistol, M-96 Mattock heavy rifle, and Geth Plasma Shotgun.
*   **Alternate Appearance Packs:**
    *   Pack 1: New outfits for Garrus, Thane, and Jack.
    *   Pack 2: New outfits for Tali, Grunt, and Miranda.
*   **Collectors’ Weapon and Armor Pack:** Contains Collector Armor and the Collector Assault Rifle.
*   **Terminus Weapon and Armor Pack:** Includes Terminus Assault Armor and the M-490 Blackstorm heavy weapon.
*   **Mass Effect 2 Promo Bundle:** Features Umbra Visor, Sentry Interface, and Recon Hood.
*   **Blood Dragon Armor**

## Microsoft Flight Simulator GOTY Edition: A Generous Free Expansion for All

Microsoft Flight Simulator's Game of the Year (GOTY) Edition delivers a substantial and entirely free expansion for all PC players, serving as a significant gesture of appreciation from the development team. This major update introduces a wealth of new content and refines existing features, elevating the already impressive flight simulation experience to new heights.

The GOTY Edition significantly broadens the selection of available aircraft and destinations. Players can now take to the skies in five new planes: the powerful Boeing F/A-18 Super Hornet, the agile VoloCity, the versatile Pilatus PC-6 Porter, the rugged CubCrafters NX-Cub, and the aerobatic Aviat Pitts Special S1S. These additions are complemented by eight new airports located in Germany, Switzerland, and the United States. The simulator continues to astound with its expansive world, boasting over 37,000 airports and an estimated 1.5 billion buildings, all rendered with remarkable detail. Natural geographical features are also beautifully realized, contributing to an incredibly immersive visual experience.

Furthermore, the GOTY Edition enhances both realism and the learning curve for aspiring pilots. An updated weather system promises more realistic atmospheric conditions, while early access to DX12 technology aims to improve overall performance. A new dev mode replay system empowers players to record and share their flights. Fourteen new tutorials are available, offering comprehensive guidance on various flight simulation techniques. Additionally, six new Discovery Flights are included, designed to guide players to iconic landmarks around the globe. The simulator's commitment to a dynamic environment is further underscored by features such as live traffic and real-time weather. According to recent analyses, the simulator's depth is clearly evident in its realistic features, including live weather that accurately depicts wind, temperature, humidity, and rain, alongside a seamless day and night cycle. An advanced engine powering over 1000 control surfaces per aircraft ensures a deeply authentic flight experience. For players who purchased earlier versions, the Deluxe Edition offers five additional aircraft and five new airports, while the Premium Deluxe Edition provides an even more comprehensive selection of content.

Name: Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition
Description:
Dragon Age: Origins You are a Grey Warden, one of the last of this legendary order of guardians. With the return of mankind's ancient foe and the kingdom engulfed in civil war, you have been chosen by fate to unite the shattered lands and slay the archdemon once and for all. Explore a stunning world, make complex moral choices, and engage in bone-crushing combat against massive and terrifying creatures. Dragon Age: Origins - Awakening Expansion Pack The story of the Grey Wardens continues as you are named their commander. Fight new enemies, learn new skills and spells, and explore an all-new area of the world, Amaranthine. All Nine Content Packs The Stone Prisoner Warden's Keep Return to Ostagar Feastday Gifts The Darkspawn Chronicles Feastday Pranks Leliana's Song The Golems of Amgarrak Witch Hunt Collect new rewards, gain new party members, and more as you delve deeper into the Dragon Age storyline. (Critically acclaimed winner of more than 50 awards including over 30 'Best of 2009' awards.)

Name: Crusader Kings III
Description:
Your legacy awaits. Choose your noble house and lead your dynasty to greatness in a Middle Ages epic that spans generations. War is but one of many tools to establish your reign, as real strategy requires expert diplomatic skill, mastery of your realm, and true cunning . Crusader Kings III continues the popular series made by Paradox Development Studio, featuring the widely acclaimed marriage of immersive grand strategy and deep, dramatic medieval roleplaying. Take command of your house and expand your dynasty through a meticulously researched Middle Ages. Begin in 867 or 1066 and claim lands, titles, and vassals to secure a realm worthy of your royal blood. Your death is only a footnote as your lineage continues with new playable heirs, either planned… or not. Discover a sprawling simulated world teeming with peasants and knights, courtiers, spies, knaves and jesters, and secret love affairs. An extensive cast of historical characters can be romanced, betrayed, executed, or subtly influenced. Explore a vast medieval map stretching from the snowswept Nordic lands to the Horn of Africa, and the British Isles in the west to the exotic riches of Burma in the east. Claim, conquer, and rule thousands of unique counties, duchies, kingdoms, and empires. Each character is larger than life, with traits and lifestyle choices determining their actions and schemes. Prompt fear and dread as you rule with an iron fist, or inspire your subjects with magnanimous deeds. Genetics can be passed along to your children, be it the gift of genius or crippling stupidity. Groom your heir with the appropriate guardians or educate them yourself. If found wanting, marry them off or despatch them through other means. Customize your ruler and noble house, from appearance to attributes, and create a monarch worthy of all their inherited virtues and vices. Govern an ever-evolving realm and grant titles to whom you see fit - or usurp your liege to claim their crown as your own. Be wary of rivals, from restless serfs to revengeful concubines. The shadows stir frequently, and danger lurks around every darkened corner. Recruit agents and other unsavory elements to undermine, blackmail, or murder those who stand in your path. Or be inspired by the bard and ballad, and seduce your way to power and influence. Blood will flow. Assemble men-at-arms units and powerful knights. Manage your battlefield tactics and armies. Raid and plunder nearby lands or hire mercenaries and Holy Orders for your major conflicts. Be a pious king to invite the religious powers to your side, or design your own faith as you battle between everlasting fame or eternal damnation. Bring novel innovations to your culture and construct mighty castles and bastions to increase the wealth, prestige, and security of your realm. The paths to follow are limitless: experience thousands of dynamic events and life-altering decisions tailored to each and every conceivable situation and character. There are countless ways of securing and keeping your place in the history books.

## Your Heroic Journey Begins in Dragon Age: Origins

Dragon Age: Origins thrusts you into the role of a Grey Warden, a legendary order sworn to protect the world from a recurring, devastating evil. As this ancient threat re-emerges and a civil war tears the kingdom apart, the fate of the land hinges on your choices. Your paramount mission is to unite the fractured realms and defeat the archdemon.

This epic role-playing game unfolds in a vast, immersive world, offering over 80 hours of gameplay across diverse regions teetering on the edge of destruction. According to the developers, your decisions have a profound impact on the unfolding narrative, guaranteeing a unique experience shaped by your individual playstyle. Prepare for a world that offers no easy answers, where you will face difficult moral dilemmas involving murder, genocide, betrayal, and the sacrifice of innocents. The game deliberately avoids a simplistic good versus evil framework, forcing you to make tough judgments guided by your own ethical principles.

A comprehensive character creator allows for the detailed customization of your hero, influencing not only their appearance but also their personality and moral alignment, which will dynamically change based on your crucial decisions. Engage in thrilling and visceral combat against a wide array of formidable creatures, utilizing over 100 magical spells and abilities to unleash devastating attacks. Experience the raw intensity of battle as you dismember enemies or unleash powerful area-of-effect spells.

Among the notable downloadable content is the **Blood Dragon Armor**, a powerful artifact imbued with dragon blood that provides superior protection and is also compatible with Mass Effect 2. **The Stone Prisoner** DLC introduces the village of Honnleath, which is under siege by darkspawn, and a mysterious frozen golem. Freeing this ancient being triggers a quest to uncover its history and capabilities, adding Shale, a formidable stone golem with a rich backstory and a unique companion quest, to your party. This expansion also enriches the game with new locations, items, achievements, and deeper narrative content.

Name: Freedom Force
Description:
From a distant corner of the galaxy, an evil alien race sets in motion a sinister plan to conquer the Earth. They unleash a powerful catalyst — Energy X — that imbues the planet's worst miscreants with super-powers to bring the planet to its knees. Now Earth's only hope lies with a new breed of heroes... The Freedom Force! Command a squad of comic book heroes in the defense of Patriot City. Choose from over a dozen heroes or create your own comic champions. Fight for freedom in over 20 action-packed missions. Restore order in a completely interactive 3D world. Take your heroes online and join the fight in multiplayer mode.* *Multiplayer available in LAN or Direct IP Only.

Name: Mass Effect™ 3 N7 Digital Deluxe Edition (2012)
Description:
Earth is burning. The Reapers have taken over and other civilizations are falling like dominoes. Lead the final fight to save humanity and take back Earth from these terrifying machines, Commander Shepard. You'll need backup for these battles. Fortunately, the galaxy has a habit of sending unexpected species your way. Recruit team members and forge new alliances, but be prepared to say goodbye at any time as partners make the ultimate sacrifice. It's time for Commander Shepard to fight for the fate of the human race and save the galaxy. No pressure, Commander. Fight smarter. Take advantage of new powers and combat moves. Shepard can now blind fire at enemies and build tougher melee attacks. Plus, when you fight as a team you can combine new biotic and tech powers to unleash devastating Power Combos. Build the final force. Build a team from a variety of races and classes and combine their skills to overcome impossible odds. You'll be joined by newcomers like James Vega, a tough-as-nails soldier, as well as EDI, a trusted AI in a newly acquired physical form. Keep an eye out for beloved characters from your past, but beware. Some may not survive the final battle... Face off against friends. Enjoy an integrated co-op multiplayer mode and team up with friends online to liberate key conflict zones from increasingly tough opponents. Customize your warrior and earn new weapons, armor, and abilities to build war preparedness stats in your single player campaign. The N7 Digital Deluxe Edition contains: Mass Effect 3 N7 Arsenal pack and in-game items (N7 Crusader shotgun, N7 Hurricane submachine gun, N7 Valiant Sniper, N7 Eagle handgun, N7 hoodie) Downloadable Art book and lithograph Mass Effect Digital Comic by Dark Horse Comics From Ashes DLC

Name: Sacrifice
Description:
Sacrifice is the acclaimed real-time strategy game that focuses on combat instead of resource gathering. The only two resources you'll need to worry about are mana and souls. Need more units? Capture the souls of your enemy. Cast spells of awesome power. Choose which gods to support and you will be rewarded with a different selection of spells. Banish your enemy by sacrificing one of your allies at his altar...

Embark on an unforgettable journey with *Pillars of Eternity*, a captivating role-playing game developed by Obsidian Entertainment, renowned for their work on *Fallout: New Vegas™* and *South Park: The Stick of Truth™*, and published by Paradox Interactive. This title invites players to immerse themselves in a world where their decisions and chosen paths profoundly shape their destiny. Prepare to rediscover the profound sense of exploration, the exhilaration of a dynamic adventure, and the sheer thrill of commanding a unique group of companions.

Venture into a newly crafted fantasy realm, descending into the treacherous depths of monster-infested dungeons. Your quest will be to unearth lost treasures and unravel ancient mysteries that lie hidden within this expansive world. As noted by game critics, the game successfully recaptures the essence of classic RPGs, offering a rich tapestry of lore and engaging gameplay mechanics. Gather your party, steel your resolve, and embrace the spirit of adventure as you delve into a realm brimming with wonder, nostalgia, and the excitement that defines the genre.

*Pillars of Eternity* offers unparalleled character customization, allowing you to forge a hero that truly reflects your playstyle. Choose from six distinct races: Human, Aumaua, Dwarf, Elf, Godlike, and Orlan. Master five core skills – Stealth, Athletics, Lore, Mechanics, and Survival – to overcome any obstacle that stands in your way. Delve into eleven unique classes, including Barbarian, Chanter, Cipher, Druid, Fighter, Monk, Paladin, Priest, Ranger, Rogue, and Wizard, each offering a distinct set of abilities and playstyles. Furthermore, sculpt your own narrative through a robust reputation system. Your alliances with various factions will be determined by your actions and choices, leading to far-reaching and impactful consequences that will redefine your experience. Explore a world brought to life through beautiful, pre-rendered environments, an engaging story, and memorable characters, all contributing to an immersive and deeply satisfying RPG experience.

Name: Silent Hunter® III
Description:
The king of submarine simulations returns with an all-new 3D engine, new crew command features, and more realistic WWII naval action than ever before. The movie-like graphics and simple, tension-filled gameplay make this the perfect game for the realism fanatic and the casual gamer. Realistic and immersive environment: The suspense-filled atmosphere includes realistic 3D water modeling, day/night cycles, and historically accurate subs, ships, and aircraft. The detailed U-boat interiors, changing weather effects, and engaging audio represent the ultimate in WWII submarine warfare. A deadly array of U-boats and weapons: Playable U-boats include Type II, VII, IX, and XXI submarines. Take aim against Allied convoys and warships. In recreating the great submarine battles of WWII, players will hide in silence just below threatening escort ships, fire deadly torpedoes, or surface and pound enemies with the deck gun. Dynamic campaign: Create your own realistic naval war story. Your military career will be influenced by successful command decisions in an unscripted and non-linear WWII campaign. Accessible to players of all skill levels: Players will experience a simplified learning curve that will be easier to handle than standard simulations. Use the naval academy tutorial to learn the basics. Customize the realism settings for play that appeals to a variety of WWII combat fans. Command your crew: The crew will take orders and evolve based on the results of each patrol. Multiplayer cooperative play: For up to eight players via LAN.

Name: Sub Command
Description:
Take charge of the most deadly modern-day submarines in the world - three distinct submarines across two unique and challenging campaigns. Utilize cutting-edge sensor and weapon technology to locate, track and destroy the enemy - even deliver Tomahawk missiles to inland targets. Whether transiting, diving, or surfacing you control the smartest, stealthiest and most feared subs on the water today! Three submarines to command - Seawolf, 688(I) and Akula. Each contains authentic naval systems including Sonar, Radar and Target Motion Analysis. Test your skills while firing Tomahawk missiles, rescuing crippled subs, rising through the polar ice cap to communicate information and much more. Easy to use game interface - With straightforward controls and automated crewmen, controlling a submarine has never been easier. Enhanced sound and 3D graphics engine - 3D Objects (over 250), from Russian trawlers to France's Mirage fighters - plus exacting sound modes pull you in like never before. You won't just hear the torpedos, you will feel them.

Name: Dangerous Waters
Description:
S.C.S. - Dangerous Waters allows you total control over multiple air, surface, and submarine platforms in a modern-day naval environment. Take direct control of individual crew stations and also plan and execute combined arms naval strategies from a top-down 'Commanders Eye' perspective.

**Silent Hunter®: Wolves of the Pacific: A WWII Submarine Simulation**

Experience the intense thrill of naval warfare with **Silent Hunter®: Wolves of the Pacific**. This leading simulation franchise returns to its core, offering enhanced realism and deeply immersive gameplay. Developed by the acclaimed Ubisoft team responsible for Silent Hunter 3, this 2007 installment promises an unparalleled submarine simulation experience, according to industry reviews.

Prepare for a "Hollywood Blockbuster" experience, featuring lifelike graphics and audio/visual effects that bring the treacherous Pacific theater to life. Immerse yourself in the action with spectacular sound and breathtaking detail, creating a truly lifelike environment. The game boasts historical accuracy, featuring over 75 authentic war machines. This includes iconic vessels such as the U.S. Gato class submarine, the formidable Japanese battleship Yamato, and the H6K flying boat, as detailed in the game's specifications.

Silent Hunter: Wolves of the Pacific offers engaging gameplay features designed to keep players deeply involved. Witness epic naval battles firsthand and receive crucial updates through radio messages and direct orders from high command, as the game simulates real-time battlefield communication. An innovative crew evolution system allows players to earn valuable upgrades and experience for their crewmembers, guiding their development strategically to create the most effective naval force.

The immersive single-player experience includes diverse mission objectives, each presenting unique challenges. A career mode lets you command various U.S. submarines and advance your naval career through dynamic, evolving campaigns. For immediate action, "Quick Play" offers "instant actions" and single patrols. An addictive online adversarial mode allows cooperative or adversarial play with up to 8 friends via LAN or 4 via internet for thrilling multiplayer battles. Scripted and generated mission types ensure epic online battles with endless replay value.

The simulation is scalable and accessible, with selectable difficulty levels that tailor the challenge to your preference, making the game accessible to both newcomers and seasoned veterans. An upgraded interface makes controlling your submarine easier and more intuitive than ever before.

Please note: Online features for this game, including Multiplayer and Co-op modes, are no longer supported and will not be accessible.

Diluvion: Resubmerged enhances the original game with deeper strategic gameplay. New features include more intricate looting, meticulous crew management, and extensive submarine customization. Dynamic salvaging now requires smart use of crew skills and items to overcome hazards. A new forging system allows for upgrades to armor, depth range, and life support.

Quality-of-life improvements are substantial, featuring enhanced visuals, mappable gamepad controls, new graphics settings, and a redesigned UI. Quest tracking and waypoints are optimized, and players can save progress at any time. Landmark, navigation, and pathfinding systems have also been overhauled. New side quests, art, and music enrich the player experience.

The game is set centuries after a Great Flood submerged the globe, forcing humanity to live beneath a thick ice layer. Players command a submarine as a novice captain, exploring to uncover humanity's greatest secret. Exploration and discovery are central, with players navigating a flooded world for riches and glory. The game features unique towns with local narratives and trade opportunities. Players can recruit crew members and upgrade nine distinct submarines, unlocking new areas and loot. Cannons and torpedoes are available to confront deep-sea perils. Building a unique crew allows for tailored approaches, whether stealthy or direct.

Diluvion: Resubmerged offers three expansive open sea zones, each with unique factions and lore. Gameplay blends 3D submarine travel with hand-painted 2D town exploration. Real-time submarine combat against ships and creatures is a core element. Players recruit diverse crew members like Helmsmen, Gunners, and Sonar Technicians, whose skills influence combat and exploration. New weaponry can be acquired. Survival demands careful management of food and oxygen. Players can also build and expand their underwater base, upgrading it for fame and wealth, granting access to rare item vendors and unique patrons. The world holds rare loot and hidden quests, especially off the beaten path, where players encounter colossal sea creatures and peculiar undersea phenomena.

Name: Silent Hunter 5®: Battle of the Atlantic
Description:
Step behind the periscope of a German U-boat and take on the Allied Forces in famous battles across the vast Atlantic Ocean and Mediterranean Sea. The best-selling submarine series of all time continues with the highly anticipated Silent Hunter: Battle of the Atlantic. For the first time, you can live the life of a submarine captain from a first-person view as you lead your crew in a truly dynamic campaign. Put on the captain’s uniform For the first time, walk through highly detailed submarines, access every part of your U-boat, and manage your crew in the new first-person view. Become a real leader Directly command your crew and experience the tension and fear inside the U-boat through the new advanced order system. Test your war strategies Choose your own strategy and select your targets with a new objective-driven, dynamic campaign. Make the enemy react to you Open new locations, upgrades and resupply possibilities, while the Allied ships adjust dynamically to your approach. Your actions will directly impact the evolution of the campaign. Accessibility Enhanced Prowl the waters with a brand-new user interface. Now, every beginner can successfully command a sub free of confusion. In expert mode, experienced players will be provided with all the necessary information and controls to command the sub completely on their own. Cinematic Experience Experience the most realistic and immersive Silent Hunter ever created. Improved environment graphics create a powerful level of immersion as you operate authentic, highly detailed U-boats and surface ships. Multiplayer Mode Play in cooperative or adversarial modes in scripted and generated missions. About the Franchise Silent Hunter is the most award-winning submarine series of all time, with nearly 1.5 million sold copies worldwide. Silent Hunter®: Wolves of the Pacific was voted 2007's 'simulation game of the year' by PC Gamer. Click here to find all Silent Hunter games on Steam.

**KURSK: An Immersive Adventure into a Real-Life Tragedy**

Delve into the gripping narrative of the K-141 Kursk, a Russian nuclear submarine, with this unique adventure and documentary video game. Inspired by actual events, KURSK places you in the role of a spy tasked with uncovering secrets surrounding the revolutionary Shkval supercavitating torpedoes. As you navigate the world of espionage, you will become an eyewitness to the tragic events that unfolded.

### Experience the Fateful Voyage

Immerse yourself in the fateful voyage of the K-141 Kursk, a journey that tragically ended in the Barents Sea. The game meticulously recreates the historical context, allowing you to "live the history" as it happened. According to developer Jujubee, the game aims to provide a deeply engaging experience that goes beyond typical video game narratives.

### Explore the World of 2000
