The game challenges players to investigate, deduce, and make difficult decisions with permanent consequences, leading to multiple endings.

The *Save the World Edition* of *Lacuna* includes the full game and its atmospheric soundtrack. Notably, 10% of the revenues from this edition are donated to Go Give One, a World Health Organization initiative supporting global healthcare access. This edition appeals to players who want to support the developers while contributing to a charitable cause.

*Lacuna* offers a modern take on the adventure game genre, moving away from traditional mechanics. It features dynamic conversations with non-repeating dialogue, streamlined puzzles that avoid inventory management, and an uninterrupted narrative flow driven by player progress. According to the developers, player decisions are remembered and directly influence the game's conclusion, ensuring a meaningful impact on the story's outcome. The game presents players with moral dilemmas, such as choosing between personal loyalties and public safety, or deciding whether to maintain peace or expose a devastating truth.

Name: Her Story
Description:
A Video Game About a Woman Talking to the Police Her Story is the award winning video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Silent Hill: Shattered Memories and Aisle. A crime fiction game with non-linear storytelling, Her Story revolves around a police database full of live action video footage. It stars Viva Seifert, actress and one half of the band Joe Gideon and the Shark. How does it work? Her Story sits you in front of a mothballed desktop computer that’s logged into a police database of video footage. The footage covers seven interviews from 1994 in which a British woman is interviewed about her missing husband. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where she speaks those words and piece together her story. Unlike anything you've played before, Her Story is an involving and moving experience. A game that asks you to listen.

Name: The Forgotten City
Description:
Travel 2,000 years into the past and relive the final days of a cursed Roman city, where if one person sins, everyone dies. Combat is an option, but violence will only get you so far. Only by questioning an intertwined community of colourful characters, cleverly exploiting the time loop, and making difficult moral choices can you hope to solve this epic mystery. Here, your decisions matter. The fate of the city is in your hands. Explore an open-world ancient Roman city with historically authentic art, architecture, costumes and customs Investigate a gripping, non-linear mystery with multiple endings Become entwined in the lives of richly detailed, deeply interactive characters Grapple with moral dilemmas which have life-and-death consequences Play as whoever you want, by choosing your character’s gender, origin and backstory Solve problems with reason, charm, bribery, intimidation, violence, or by cleverly exploiting the time-loop

Name: Telling Lies
Description:
A Video Game About Private Conversations Telling Lies is the new video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Her Story and Silent Hill: Shattered Memories. An investigative thriller game with non-linear storytelling, Telling Lies revolves around a cache of secretly recorded video conversations. It stars Logan Marshall-Green , Alexandra Shipp , Kerry Bishé and Angela Sarafyan . How does it work? Telling Lies sits you in front of an anonymous laptop loaded with a stolen NSA database full of footage. The footage covers two years in the intimate lives of four people whose stories are linked by a shocking incident. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where those words are spoken and piece together your story. Unlike anything you've played before, Telling Lies is an intimate and intense experience. A game where you decide the truth.

## Unraveling the Mysteries of Twin Lakes: A Fumble in the Dark

Prepare to delve back into the peculiar and perpetually paranormal world of Twin Lakes, America's 34th most haunted city, with **The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark**. This chilling point-and-click adventure invites you to join the ever-resourceful Detective Francis McQueen as he tackles six new, spine-tingling cases. Twin Lakes, a city cursed just enough to be a persistent nuisance, requires a dedicated investigator to untangle the macabre mysteries that plague its residents.

### The Cursed City and Its Unlikely Hero

Twin Lakes occupies a unique spot on the curse spectrum. It's not quite a city under siege by demonic forces, but it's certainly more afflicted than a place that simply misplaces its keys or frequently encounters puddles. This moderate level of supernatural affliction necessitates the intervention of The Darkside Detective. Whenever a bump echoes in the night, a shiver runs down your spine, or an inexplicable fishy odor permeates the air, Detective McQueen is on the case. As noted in the game's premise, he's not personally responsible for the fishy smells – it's a figure of speech, of course.

### A New Threat and a Familiar Partnership

Picking up after the events of the original **The Darkside Detective**, this installment sees Detective McQueen facing a new, urgent mission: rescuing his usually-present sidekick, Officer Dooley, from the clutches of the Darkside. Their reunion is crucial, allowing the duo to return to their signature investigative style, tackling the city's strange, often paranormal, and always paradoxical occurrences.

### A Tour of Twin Lakes' Most Peculiar Locales

The game promises a diverse range of investigations, taking players to some of Twin Lakes' most unusual settings. According to promotional materials, players can expect to explore:

*   A vibrant, yet potentially sinister, carnival.
*   The quiet, but perhaps not so peaceful, local retirement home.
*   The boisterous and unpredictable world of an amateur wrestling circuit.
*   Even venturing as far afield as Ireland, showcasing the far-reaching influence of the Darkside.

Through these varied scenarios, McQueen and Dooley will do their utmost to keep the encroaching Darkside at bay. If the premise of this frighteningly funny adventure appeals to you, the developers suggest trying the first title in the series to get a taste of the unique investigative style and dark humor.

Name: Strange Horticulture
Description:
Find and identify new plants, pet your cat, speak to a coven, or join a cult. Use your growing collection to influence the story and unravel Undermere’s dark mysteries. Welcome to Undermere, a quaint town surrounded by hag-infested forests and rugged mountains. You are the Horticulturist, owner of local plant store Strange Horticulture. As a cast of colorful customers come by your shop, you are quickly thrust into an occult mystery stretching back hundreds of years. Explore the lands beyond your store to find new plants, but be careful! The dark woods and lakes are not always friendly to a simple herbalist. You might discover powers beyond your wildest dreams - or lose your mind completely. Use context clues to determine which places to visit, and which to avoid! Using your trusty encyclopedia and clues found on your explorations, you learn more about the strange plants you come across. By identifying each plant, you will be able to use their effects to influence the story -- from hypnotic hallucinogens to powerful poisons.

Name: L.A. Noire
Description:
Using groundbreaking new animation technology, MotionScan, that captures every nuance of an actor's facial performance in astonishing detail, L.A. Noire is a violent crime thriller that blends breathtaking action with true detective work to deliver an unprecedented interactive experience. Search for clues, chase down suspects and interrogate witnesses as you struggle to find the truth in a city where everyone has something to hide. Amid the post-war boom of Hollywood's Golden Age, Cole Phelps is an LAPD detective thrown headfirst into a city drowning in its own success. Corruption is rampant, the drug trade is exploding, and murder rates are at an all-time high. In his fight to climb the ranks and do what's right, Phelps must unravel the truth behind a string of arson attacks, racketeering conspiracies and brutal murders, battling the L.A. underworld and even members of his own department to uncover a secret that could shake the city to its rotten core. This complete edition of L.A. Noire includes the complete original game and all previously released downloadable content including the 'Nicolson Electroplating' Arson case, the 'Reefer Madness' Vice case, 'The Consul's Car' Traffic case, 'The Naked City' Vice case and 'A Slip of the Tongue' Traffic case.

## Step into the Gritty Streets of 1940s Los Angeles with L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files

Experience a **dark and violent crime thriller** like never before in L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files. This immersive virtual reality title plunges you directly into the shoes of Detective Cole Phelps, tasked with solving a series of **brutal crimes, plots, and conspiracies**. These compelling narratives are **inspired by real cases** from 1947 Los Angeles, a period notorious for its corruption and violence.

### Unraveling Mysteries in Virtual Reality

L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files features **seven meticulously rebuilt cases** specifically designed for virtual reality. This enhances the **immersion and realism** of Rockstar Games' atmospheric crime thriller. You'll tackle select cases from the blockbuster original game, spanning investigations across various detective desks, including Traffic, Arson, and Homicide.

### Your Detective Toolkit in VR

As Detective Phelps, you'll engage in a variety of detective activities:

*   **Clue Discovery:** **Search for clues by grabbing, inspecting, and manipulating objects** with your own hands.
*   **Navigating the City:** **Get behind the wheel and drive to your next crime scene**, experiencing the city firsthand.
*   **Pursuing Suspects:** **Engage in chases, fistfights, and shootouts** as you track down those responsible.
*   **Building Your Case:** **Make notes or draw freehand in your detective’s notebook** to meticulously build your evidence.
*   **Interrogation:** **Interrogate witnesses and use your wits to separate truth from lies** in a city where deception is rampant.

### Crucial System Specifications for VR Play

To ensure a smooth and intended gameplay experience, specific hardware configurations are **essential**. Due to current performance considerations with AMD hardware, **only certain combinations of AMD and NVIDIA/Intel hardware are supported**:

*   **AMD Ryzen 7 CPU Users:** A **NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 (or above)** graphics card is **required**.
*   **AMD Vega 56 Graphics Card Users:** An **Intel i7 6700 (or above)** CPU is **required**.

**Important Note:** Attempting to use an AMD CPU and GPU together to play the game is **not supported at this time**. L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files **only supports a single graphics card architecture**; NVIDIA SLI and AMD CrossFire features are **not supported**.

### Staying Up-to-Date with Compatibility

System requirements are subject to change due to ongoing programming updates. For the most current compatibility information, please refer to your hardware manufacturer and the official **www.rockstargames.com/support** website. Be aware that some system components, such as mobile chipsets, integrated, and AGP graphics cards, may be incompatible. Specifications not explicitly listed may not be supported by the publisher.

### Additional Requirements for Installation and Play

*   **Rockstar Games Social Club:** Installation and play **requires log-in to the Rockstar Games Social Club** network (age 13+).
*   **Internet Connection:** An internet connection is **required for activation and periodic entitlement verification**.
*   **Software Installations:** You will need to install the following software: Rockstar Games Social Club platform, DirectX 9, DirectX June 2010 Redistributable Package, Chromium, and Microsoft Visual C++ 2012 and 2015 Redistributable Packages. Authentication software that recognizes certain hardware attributes for entitlement, digital rights management, system, and other support purposes is also necessary.
*   **Serial Code Registration:** A **single-use serial code registration via internet is required**. Registration is limited to one Rockstar Games Social Club account (age 13+) per serial code. Only one PC login is allowed per Social Club account at any time. Serial codes are **non-transferable once used**, and Social Club accounts are also non-transferable.

Name: Silicon Dreams  |  cyberpunk interrogation
Description:
Investigate humans and androids in a corporate-controlled dystopian future where the lines between the real and the artificial have blurred to almost nothing. Research your subjects, choose your questions carefully, and probe for the truth, however dreadful it may be. Monitor interviewees’ emotions in real time - joy, sadness, anger, disgust, shock, and fear. Use this data to your advantage, intimidating, cajoling, or even befriending your subjects in order to to uncover more information. Choose a side in the midst of a brewing conflict: lie to your superiors and spare deviant androids, or condemn them to secure your own survival within the corporation. There are no easy answers. Silicon Dreams has multiple endings depending on the choices you make. Each android could live or die by your words.

Portal 2, a highly anticipated sequel, builds upon the groundbreaking foundation of its predecessor, the original Portal. This innovative title expands on the first game's acclaimed gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable soundtrack, offering players a richer and more expansive experience. The original Portal itself garnered over 70 industry awards and cultivated a dedicated fan base, setting a high bar for its successor.

The single-player campaign in Portal 2 introduces players to a vibrant new cast of characters and a variety of novel puzzle mechanics within an expanded array of challenging test chambers. According to Valve, the developers, players will venture into previously unexplored sections of the Aperture Science Laboratories. A key element of this single-player journey is the return of GLaDOS, the complex and sometimes homicidal artificial intelligence who served as the player's guide in the first game.

Beyond the solo adventure, Portal 2 also features a robust two-player cooperative mode. This mode offers a completely distinct campaign with its own unique storyline, specialized test chambers, and two new player characters. As reported by numerous gaming outlets, this cooperative element necessitates a fundamental shift in player strategy, demanding not only coordinated actions but also collaborative thinking to overcome obstacles.

The game boasts several core features, including an engaging single-player campaign with next-generation gameplay and a deeply engaging narrative. Additionally, a dedicated two-person co-op mode provides a unique multiplayer experience with its own storyline, characters, and gameplay mechanics. An advanced physics engine allows for the design of a wide spectrum of intriguing challenges, resulting in a larger game that is not necessarily more difficult. The acclaimed original soundtrack features a unique and memorable musical score. The original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007, highlighting its significant impact. Furthermore, Portal 2 will come with its own set of editing tools, empowering players to create and share their own content.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

System Shock 2, a seminal title in the sci-fi horror FPS-RPG genre, has been revitalized, offering players a chance to re-experience its chilling atmosphere and groundbreaking gameplay. The game famously begins with the chilling words, "Remember, it is my will that guided you here. It is my will that gave you your cybernetic implants, the only beauty in that meat you call a body. If you value that meat... you will do as I tell you." This ominous introduction sets the stage for the player's awakening from cryo-sleep, only to find themselves augmented with cybernetic implants and the crew of the starship Von Braun brutally murdered.

As you navigate the derelict vessel, the infected inhabitants, driven to madness, roam the corridors, their tormented cries echoing your own growing dread. Looming over your every move is the rogue artificial intelligence, SHODAN, whose taunts and ridicule serve as a constant reminder of your precarious situation. SHODAN's malevolent presence is a key element that has contributed to the game's enduring legacy, according to many critics.

System Shock 2 distinguishes itself through its deep RPG mechanics, allowing players to tailor their experience. You can choose from three specialized military branches, each offering unique skills, weaponry, and paranormal psionic powers. The ability to upgrade and enhance these skills is crucial for survival, impacting your proficiency in hacking, combat, and psionic abilities. This intricate progression system has been lauded by players and developers alike.

The narrative unfolds through the discovery of cryptic audio logs, encounters with spectral apparitions, and dedicated research, all of which provide vital advantages in combat and unlock access to exotic weapons and powerful items. For those seeking a cooperative experience, System Shock 2 supports multiplayer co-op for up to three friends, though this feature is exclusive to Windows.

System Shock 2 is widely recognized as a genre-defining experience that introduced innovative gameplay mechanics that have become foundational to modern FPS and RPG titles. Its influence is undeniable, having inspired critically acclaimed games such as Deus Ex® and Bioshock®. The game's enduring appeal lies in its masterful blend of a haunting narrative, pioneering gameplay, and a terrifyingly immersive atmosphere, solidifying its status as one of the greatest games ever created. It is worth noting that the Mac OS and Linux versions of System Shock 2 utilize a technology known as 'WINE' to ensure their functionality on those respective operating systems.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® V
Description:
The Flagship Turn-Based Strategy Game Returns Become Ruler of the World by establishing and leading a civilization from the dawn of man into the space age: Wage war, conduct diplomacy, discover new technologies, go head-to-head with some of history’s greatest leaders and build the most powerful empire the world has ever known. INVITING PRESENTATION: Jump right in and play at your own pace with an intuitive interface that eases new players into the game. Veterans will appreciate the depth, detail and control that are highlights of the series. BELIEVABLE WORLD: Ultra realistic graphics showcase lush landscapes for you to explore, battle over and claim as your own. COMMUNITY & MULTIPLAYER: Compete with players all over the world or locally in LAN matches, mod* the game in unprecedented ways, and install mods directly from an in-game community hub without ever leaving the game. WIDE SYSTEM COMPATIBILITY: Civilization V operates on many different systems, from high end desktops to many laptops. ALL NEW FEATURES: A new hex-based gameplay grid opens up exciting new combat and build strategies. City States become a new resource in your diplomatic battleground. An improved diplomacy system allows you to negotiate with fully interactive leaders. *Modding SDK available as a free download. Note: The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

**Assassin's Creed 2: A Journey Through Renaissance Italy with Ezio Auditore**

Step into the **vibrant yet brutal landscape of Renaissance Italy** in Assassin's Creed 2, a game that masterfully weaves a tale of **Ezio Auditore da Firenze**. This compelling narrative unfolds around a young Italian noble whose life is irrevocably altered by the intertwined forces of family, vengeance, and a deep-seated conspiracy. The game's setting is a **fragmented 15th-century Italy**, a period celebrated for its immense artistic rebirth but also notoriously plagued by **corruption and murder**. Players will traverse the sprawling playgrounds of powerful city-states like Florence and Venice, experiencing an era known as the Renaissance, which provides a **rich and compelling setting** that is as breathtakingly beautiful as it is perilously dangerous.

Assassin's Creed 2 significantly advanced the gaming experience with its **open-ended world**, offering players an unprecedented degree of freedom. This liberation extends to how players approach their objectives, empowering them to **choose their missions** and tackle them according to their own preferred pace. The game invites players to **explore iconic cities** and participate in a diverse array of activities, from swimming through canals to even experiencing the thrill of flight. A **variety of mechanics** are thoughtfully integrated, encouraging players to experiment and ultimately discover their own unique and effective playstyle. The game world is further enhanced by a **dynamic crowd system**. Players can **utilize the crowd for stealth and evasion**, seamlessly blending in with the bustling city streets. Interacting with the in-game individuals can yield **potential rewards**, though players must remain cognizant of the inherent risks associated with such engagements.

Ezio's profound transformation into a master assassin is a central theme, marked by the acquisition and adept mastery of a formidable array of deadly skills. Players will have the opportunity to **wield new weapons**, master the crucial ability to **disarm and counter** enemy attacks with precision, and, of course, utilize the **iconic hidden blade**, a symbol of the assassin's trade. It is important to note that, as of November 19th, 2018, **online multiplayer and co-op features for Assassin's Creed 2 are no longer supported and are inaccessible**, a fact particularly relevant for the MAC version of the game.

Sid Meier's Civilization IV®: Beyond the Sword, the second expansion for the acclaimed 2005 PC Game of the Year, significantly deepens the strategic experience by focusing on the eras following the invention of gunpowder. This expansion introduces a wealth of new content designed to challenge and engage players, with a particular emphasis on enhancing late-game play.

Beyond the Sword boasts **11 unique and challenging scenarios** crafted by Firaxis and community members, offering diverse gameplay experiences. The expansion also introduces ten new civilizations, including Portugal, Babylonians, and the Netherlands, each with unique units and buildings. Furthermore, players will encounter sixteen new leaders, such as Hammurabi of the Babylonians and Abraham Lincoln for the United States.

Key new features include the introduction of **Corporations**, a new game mechanic similar to religion, allowing players to found and spread corporations globally for distinct benefits. Espionage is also accessible earlier, offering new ways to gather intelligence, incite unrest, and protect secrets. Players will encounter new random events, like natural disasters, presenting obstacles to overcome. Five new wonders, including the Statue of Zeus and Cristo Redentor, offer significant strategic advantages. The race to Alpha Centauri is more intricate, and the United Nations becomes available earlier for diplomatic victories. Advanced Starts allow players to "buy" components for a custom empire and begin in the later game for a quicker experience of new features. The AI is significantly enhanced, relying more on intelligent play for a more consistent and challenging experience. As one developer noted, "We wanted to ensure the AI felt like a true competitor, not just a set of numbers."

**IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946 - A Deep Dive into World War II Aerial Combat**

IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946 is a comprehensive collection that unites the original IL-2 series. This anthology includes the acclaimed IL-2 Sturmovik™: Forgotten Battles, the Ace Expansion Pack, Pacific Fighters™, and unique alternate history scenarios set in 1946. What began as a focused flight simulator has grown into a vast collection, featuring 229 flyable aircraft and over 300 aircraft in total. The game has been updated to version 4.12.2, a significant community-driven release that introduces key improvements.

**Key Enhancements and Expansive Content**

This updated version offers several key improvements, including widescreen support with correct Field of View (FOV) settings for modern displays. The collection significantly expands gameplay with a wealth of new aircraft, maps, and scenarios. Notably, 32 new flyable fighters and bombers, along with four new AI-controlled aircraft, have been added. Players can explore expansive new historical maps, such as the Kiev region and Manchuria, alongside a large bonus Burma map and an online Khalkin Gol / Nomonhan map for multiplayer.

The game also boasts nine new campaigns, comprising nearly 200 missions, celebrated for their realism and attention to detail. These campaigns offer detailed career paths for fighter and bomber pilots across German, Soviet, and Japanese air forces. Mission objectives are varied, including flying jet bombers over occupied Europe and intercepting American B-29 Superfortresses. Three of these new campaigns explore hypothetical battles between the Soviet Union and Germany in 1946, a period when World War II was still ongoing. Furthermore, the collection features nearly 1,000 new paint schemes, adorning both new and existing aircraft with historically accurate liveries representing individual aircraft or squadrons.

**Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 2 (2009): A New Era of Action**

Prepare for the most anticipated game of the year! Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 2 (2009) is the thrilling sequel to the best-selling first-person action game of all time. This installment plunges players into a world teetering on the brink of collapse, facing a formidable new threat. The narrative picks up immediately after the groundbreaking events of Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare, a title that garnered immense critical acclaim and set new standards for the genre.

Modern Warfare 2 features a groundbreaking musical soundtrack composed by the legendary Hans Zimmer. This Academy Award, Golden Globe Award, Grammy Award, and Tony Award-winning composer brings his signature touch to the game's intense atmosphere, enhancing the player's immersive experience.

The original Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare achieved significant recognition. It was recognized as the 'Most Played Online Video Game' in history, according to 2009 Guinness World Records. Furthermore, it earned over 50 Game of the Year awards, including Console Game of the Year and Overall Game of the Year in 2007 from the Academy of Interactive Arts & Sciences.

Modern Warfare 2 introduces an entirely new gameplay mode: Special Ops. This mode supports two-player online co-operative play, offering a distinct experience from the single-player story campaign. Special Ops challenges players with a series of time-trial and objective-based missions. As you progress, you'll unlock new Special Ops missions, each escalating in difficulty. These missions draw from highlights of the single-player campaign, fan favorites from Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare, and entirely new, exclusive content.

Multiplayer is reinvented with a host of new capabilities, customization options, gamestates, and modes. The Create-a-Class system has been significantly enhanced, allowing players to equip secondary weapons like Machine Pistols, Shotguns, Handguns, and Launchers, along with defensive options such as Riot Shields. Tactical Equipment now features Throwing Knives, Blast Shields, and Tactical Insertions. Perk Upgrades offer enhanced player abilities, and Weapon Customization, known as Bling, allows for dual attachments on weapons. Players can unlock and deploy powerful killstreaks such as the AC130, Sentry Gun, Predator Missile, Counter-UAV, and Care Package, offering strategic advantages. A comprehensive Accolades System provides post-match reports to track your performance and progress.

Portal 2 builds upon the critically acclaimed foundation of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry awards and cultivated a dedicated fanbase. This highly anticipated sequel expands on the original's innovative gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable soundtrack.

The single-player experience in Portal 2 introduces a vibrant ensemble of new characters, alongside a variety of novel puzzle mechanics and an expanded array of challenging test chambers. Players will venture into previously unexplored sections of the Aperture Science Laboratories, and will once again encounter GLaDOS, the famously unpredictable and occasionally homicidal artificial intelligence that guided them through the first game. According to Valve, the developer, the single-player campaign is designed to be "wildly-engrossing."

Furthermore, Portal 2 features a robust two-player cooperative mode, boasting its own distinct campaign, a unique storyline, specialized test chambers, and two new player characters. This cooperative mode fundamentally alters the approach to portal mechanics, requiring players to not only collaborate but also to think in tandem. Success in these challenges hinges on a shared understanding and synchronized execution.

The game's product features highlight an extensive single-player campaign with next-generation gameplay and an immersive story. The complete two-person co-op mode offers a separate multiplayer experience with its own dedicated narrative, characters, and gameplay mechanics. Advanced physics simulation underpins the creation of a wide spectrum of intriguing challenges, resulting in a game that is larger in scope but not necessarily more difficult. The game also includes original music and, as a testament to its predecessor's success, the original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007. Portal 2 will also include editing tools for players to create and share their own content.

Name: ELDEN RING
Description:
THE NEW FANTASY ACTION RPG. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between. • A Vast World Full of Excitement A vast world where open fields with a variety of situations and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected. As you explore, the joy of discovering unknown and overwhelming threats await you, leading to a high sense of accomplishment. • Create your Own Character In addition to customizing the appearance of your character, you can freely combine the weapons, armor, and magic that you equip. You can develop your character according to your play style, such as increasing your muscle strength to become a strong warrior, or mastering magic. • An Epic Drama Born from a Myth A multilayered story told in fragments. An epic drama in which the various thoughts of the characters intersect in the Lands Between. • Unique Online Play that Loosely Connects You to Others In addition to multiplayer, where you can directly connect with other players and travel together, the game supports a unique asynchronous online element that allows you to feel the presence of others.

Name: God of War
Description:
Enter the Norse realm His vengeance against the Gods of Olympus years behind him, Kratos now lives as a man in the realm of Norse Gods and monsters. It is in this harsh, unforgiving world that he must fight to survive… and teach his son to do the same. Grasp a second chance Kratos is a father again. As mentor and protector to Atreus, a son determined to earn his respect, he is forced to deal with and control the rage that has long defined him while out in a very dangerous world with his son. Journey to a dark, elemental world of fearsome creatures From the marble and columns of ornate Olympus to the gritty forests, mountains and caves of pre-Viking Norse lore, this is a distinctly new realm with its own pantheon of creatures, monsters and gods. Engage in visceral, physical combat With an over the shoulder camera that brings the player closer to the action than ever before, fights in God of War™ mirror the pantheon of Norse creatures Kratos will face: grand, gritty and grueling. A new main weapon and new abilities retain the defining spirit of the God of War series while presenting a vision of conflict that forges new ground in the genre. PC FEATURES High Fidelity Graphics Striking visuals enhanced on PC. Enjoy true 4K resolution, on supported devices, [MU1] with unlocked framerates for peak performance. Dial in your settings via a wide range of graphical presets and options including higher resolution shadows, improved screen space reflections, the addition of GTAO and SSDO, and much more. NVIDIA® DLSS and Reflex Support Quality meets performance. Harness the AI power of NVIDIA Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS) to boost frame rates and generate beautiful, sharp images on select Nvidia GPUs. Utilize NVIDIA Reflex low latency technology allowing you to react quicker and hit harder combos with the responsive gameplay you crave on GeForce GPUs. Controls Customization Play your way. With support for the DUALSHOCK®4 and DUALSENSE® wireless controllers, a wide range of other gamepads, and fully customizable bindings for mouse and keyboard, you have the power to fine-tune every action to match your playstyle. Ultra-wide Support Immerse yourself like never before. Journey through the Norse realms taking in breathtaking vistas in panoramic widescreen. With 21:9 ultra-widescreen support, God of War™ presents a cinema quality experience that further expands the original seamless theatrical vision.

**Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition: Master the Cosmos**

Embark on an epic journey with *Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition*, a complete collection of the renowned PC strategy series. This ultimate package integrates the original *Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords*, the critically acclaimed *Dark Avatar* expansion, and the concluding chapter, *Twilight of the Arnor*. Players are tasked with guiding their own interstellar civilization through a vast and dangerous galaxy. Achieving dominance requires a masterful balance of economic prowess, technological advancement, diplomatic finesse, cultural influence, and military might. Forge vital alliances, wage monumental wars, and ultimately, claim dominion over the galaxy. The game provides procedurally generated galaxies for infinite replayability, alongside a captivating multi-mission campaign that unravels the deep lore of the ancient Dread Lords.

The *Dark Avatar* expansion significantly enriches the core gameplay. It introduces innovative strategic elements, such as mineable asteroid belts and specialized planets that demand unique technologies for successful colonization. A sophisticated spy system offers both offensive sabotage capabilities and robust defensive measures. Furthermore, new diplomatic treaties and an enhanced artificial intelligence engine present more profound strategic challenges. This expansion also unveils a wealth of new adversaries, a diverse array of units, and an additional campaign to explore.

*Twilight of the Arnor*, the final expansion, continues the narrative in the year 2227. The galaxy is engulfed in a catastrophic war orchestrated by the Dread Lords. In a desperate bid for survival, the remaining factions, with humanity leading the charge, devise a bold strategy to eliminate this existential threat. This concluding installment introduces transformative features, including Terror Stars, distinct technology trees for each civilization, comprehensive map and scenario editors, new ship classes, and advanced planetary enhancements.

Throughout the *Ultimate Edition*, players will marvel at a visually stunning 3D engine and a powerful ship editor, allowing for the creation of custom vessels. The freedom to play as or design unique civilizations is a central tenet, supported by multiple victory conditions: military conquest, cultural supremacy, political maneuvering, technological ascendancy, or ascension. The game boasts dynamic galaxies, an intelligent multi-threaded AI, online score competition via the Metaverse, and a fully moddable architecture that fosters extensive player customization. Advanced diplomatic options further deepen the experience, facilitating intricate trade, treaty, and alliance negotiations. According to game reviews, the *Ultimate Edition* offers an unparalleled depth of strategic gameplay.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Batman: Arkham City builds upon the intense, atmospheric foundation of Batman: Arkham Asylum, sending players flying through the expansive Arkham City - five times larger than the game world in Batman: Arkham Asylum - the new maximum security 'home' for all of Gotham City's thugs, gangsters and insane criminal masterminds. Featuring an incredible Rogues Gallery of Gotham City's most dangerous criminals including Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, Mr. Freeze and many others, the game allows players to genuinely experience what it feels like to be The Dark Knight delivering justice on the streets of Gotham City. Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition includes the following DLC: Catwoman Pack Nightwing Bundle Pack Robin Bundle Pack Harley Quinn’s Revenge Challenge Map Pack Arkham City Skins Pack Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition packages new gameplay content, seven maps, three playable characters, and 12 skins beyond the original retail release: Maps: Wayne Manor, Main Hall, Freight Train, Black Mask, The Joker's Carnival, Iceberg Long, and Batcave Playable Characters: Catwoman, Robin and Nightwing Skins: 1970s Batsuit, Year One Batman, The Dark Knight Returns, Earth One Batman, Batman Beyond Batman, Animated Batman, Sinestro Corps Batman, Long Halloween Catwoman, Animated Catwoman, Animated Robin, Red Robin and Animated Nightwing

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Name: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons
Description:
Guide two brothers on an epic fairy tale journey from visionary Swedish film director, Josef Fares and top-tier developer Starbreeze Studios. Control both brothers at once as you experience co-op play in single player mode, like never before. Solve puzzles, explore the varied locations and fight boss battles, controlling one brother with each thumbstick. A man, clinging to life. His two sons, desperate to cure their ailing father, are left with but one option. They must set out upon a journey to find and bring back the 'Water of Life' as they come to rely on one another to survive. One must be strong where the other is weak, brave where the other is fearful, they must be... Brothers. This is one journey you will never forget.

Guild Wars 2 invites players to explore the rich world of Tyria, emphasizing discovery and exploration. The game features an in-game content guide offering tailored suggestions and a compass to pinpoint points of interest, encouraging players to forge their own path. Tyria teems with diverse characters and dynamic events, where player involvement is rewarded through completing Renown Hearts and participating in these events. A new player guide is available to help newcomers navigate the world.

Seamless player interaction is a core design principle, allowing players to assist others organically without formal parties. Whether tackling a jumping puzzle or a world boss, the game promotes a playstyle free from the need to grind, as all activities, from reviving allies to gathering resources, contribute to earning experience points. As characters progress, they can be armed with a diverse arsenal of new weapons, each offering a unique playstyle. Further refinement comes from unlocking and equipping hundreds of skills and traits.

For competitive players, structured PvP offers a level playing field where all players compete equally, with access to max-level gear and build options. Character design provides a canvas for self-expression, with new gear unlocking its skins in the player's wardrobe, leading to thousands of possible combinations. A massive selection of collectible dyes allows for further personalization.

Expanding the Guild Wars 2 experience through expansions unlocks exclusive benefits, including log-in rewards, additional character and bag slots, and expanded chat features. In-game purchases can be made through the Black Lion Trading Company. Expansions and Living World seasons introduce unique rewards and new Masteries that enhance character abilities. Each expansion also provides access to nine elite specializations, offering new weapon choices, skills, and abilities. The Revenant profession can be selected at character creation, allowing players to channel legendary figures. Living World seasons continue the game's narrative between expansions and are available for purchase or in Gem Store bundles. Playing these episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries. For instance, the Heart of Thorns expansion allows players to unlock and upgrade their glider, Path of Fire introduces mounts with powerful movement skills, and End of Dragons teaches players to fish and pilot a skiff. According to ArenaNet, the developers of Guild Wars 2, Living World episodes are accessible at level 80, and relaunching the game may be necessary for upgrades to take effect. Existing Guild Wars 2 accounts are not accessible via Steam.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

The online servers for the PC version of the critically acclaimed DARK SOULS™ series are currently undergoing restoration, a process Bandai Namco Entertainment is committed to completing. According to Bandai Namco Entertainment, DARK SOULS™ III is the next title slated for restoration once the necessary technical issues are resolved. The development team is diligently working to correct the problems that have affected the servers, and they will share further updates as soon as a definitive restoration schedule is established. This ongoing effort underscores the dedication to the player community.

Bandai Namco Entertainment extends its sincere gratitude to all players for their continued patience and understanding throughout this process. In the meantime, players can enhance their experience with DARK SOULS™ III by acquiring the Season Pass. This pass unlocks all available downloadable content and offers even more challenging adventures, providing a deeper dive into the game's rich world.

DARK SOULS™ III, a recipient of the gamescom award for 'Best RPG' in 2015 and honored with over 35 E3 2015 Awards and Nominations, represents the latest and most ambitious installment in the genre-defining series. This chapter plunges players into a world teetering on the brink of collapse, where players can expect colossal enemies and vast, unforgiving environments. The game features faster gameplay and amplified combat intensity for an immersive experience, alongside its signature rewarding gameplay and stunning, dark graphics that captivate both long-time fans and newcomers. As the fires of civilization dwindle and the world succumbs to ruin, players are called upon to embrace the darkness once more. Prepare yourself for an unforgettable journey into a universe where only embers remain.

## Apex Legends™: Master Unique Legends and Strategic Squad Play

**Apex Legends™** is a free-to-play* Hero Shooter where legendary characters, each with powerful and unique abilities, team up to battle for fame and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. It offers a deep-tactical squad play experience with bold innovations in a rugged world. The game's core appeal lies in its **ever-growing roster of diverse Legends**. Each character is a distinct figure with their own personalities, strengths, and abilities. While designed to be **easy to pick up**, mastering their unique skill sets is crucial for success. Developers emphasize that "the depth of our Legend abilities is what truly sets Apex apart. Players can spend hundreds of hours and still discover new synergies and strategies."

Success in Apex Legends hinges on **building your crew** and leveraging **strategic squad play**. Choosing Legends that complement each other is vital to forming an unstoppable team. Whether in the Battle Royale mode or the intense Arenas, **thinking fast and coordinating with teammates is paramount**. Discovering new tactics and powerful combinations through effective communication and synergy is key to victory. Apex Legends features **innovative combat** that demands players **master an expanding assortment of powerful weapons and equipment**. The game constantly evolves with **limited-time modes** and **new content introduced each season**, ensuring fresh challenges.

The **universe is ever-expanding**, with an evolving narrative, dynamically altered maps, and new Legends introduced regularly. This creates a living world where players can **make their mark on the Apex Games** and join an ongoing adventure. According to a recent analysis, the game's dynamic nature and emphasis on teamwork contribute significantly to its enduring popularity. The constant influx of new content, including seasonal updates and limited-time modes, ensures that the gameplay remains fresh and engaging for its player base. This evolving landscape, coupled with the strategic depth offered by the diverse Legend abilities, provides a rich experience for both new and veteran players alike.

*Please note: This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency for acquiring virtual in-game items, including a random selection.

Sea of Stars is an upcoming RPG that aims to **reimagine the classic role-playing experience** with a modern Sabotage Studio touch. The game focuses on updating core RPG elements like turn-based combat, storytelling, and exploration, while delivering a nostalgic and fun experience.

At the core of Sea of Stars is its **innovative turn-based combat system**. Players can enhance their damage and reduce incoming damage by **timing button presses with character animations**. Beyond timed hits, combat includes **multi-character combo attacks**, a **boosting mechanic**, and a strategic **'locks' system**. This system allows players to target enemy weaknesses with different damage types, hindering powerful enemy attacks. Developers have emphasized an **immersive combat experience**, eliminating random encounters and separate battlefields.

Exploration in Sea of Stars is designed to be **fluid and engaging**. The game features a navigation system inspired by platformer expertise, moving beyond traditional grid-based movement. Players can **swim, climb, vault, and jump**, traversing the world seamlessly for a dynamic experience. The game boasts a **breathtaking 2D world brought to life by a custom-made render pipeline**, pushing the boundaries of 2D pixel-art.

Sea of Stars will feature **dozens of original characters and compelling story arcs**. The narrative blends epic, silly, and emotional moments, exploring classic RPG themes. As expected from Sabotage, players can anticipate **unexpected twists and events**. For a change of pace, Sea of Stars offers **engaging side activities** such as sailing, cooking, fishing, and playing the tabletop game 'Wheels'. These systems are designed to **respect retro classics while offering a modernized experience**. According to one developer, "We wanted to capture the magic of those beloved RPGs from our childhood, but also inject modern design sensibilities to create something truly special."

## Guilty Gear -Strive-: A New Era of Fighting Game Excellence

**Guilty Gear -Strive-** ushers in a new era for fighting games, aiming to attract new players while retaining the deep strategy and creative freedom that veteran fans love. This latest entry in the beloved Guilty Gear series offers thrilling action, distinctive style, and pure fun, all within a unique, heavy metal-inspired future.

The narrative of **Guilty Gear -Strive-** serves as the epic conclusion to a story spanning 20 years. This grand finale brings the saga to a definitive end, featuring a final confrontation with "That Man," the enigmatic figure responsible for the world's current devastation. Players will join iconic heroes like Sol Badguy and his rival Ky Kiske, alongside a starting roster of 15 unique characters, in a battle for the universe's fate.

The game delivers an unparalleled sensory experience, powered by a high-energy soundtrack from Daisuke Ishiwatari, the creator of Guilty Gear. As you dive into the powerful tracks, you'll be mesmerized by the groundbreaking hybrid 2D/3D cell-shaded graphics. Arc System Works has advanced visual fidelity, presenting the most stunning and dynamic 3D cell-shaded visuals in a fighting game. Ishiwatari himself noted that the music is integral to the experience, stating, "The soundtrack is as important as the gameplay itself."

**Guilty Gear -Strive-** introduces innovative gameplay systems designed for both accessibility and strategic depth. Newcomers will find the core mechanics easier to learn, while the systems are built to preserve the celebrated depth and strategic freedom Guilty Gear is known for. A significant new mechanic is **Wall-Breaking**, which adds fresh strategic layers and encourages dynamic tactical adjustments during matches. This thoughtful design ensures each match is unique and deeply engaging for everyone.

## DARK SOULS™: Prepare to Die™ Edition - An Untold Chapter

The PC version of DARK SOULS™: Prepare to Die™ Edition unveils a new story within Lordran, taking players back to the time of the legendary Knight Artorias. This expansion adds significant content, designed to test even the most skilled players.

### New Content Highlights

This expansion introduces a wealth of new challenges and experiences:

*   **Formidable Bosses:** Face new, powerful foes, including the Black Dragon, the Sanctuary Guardian, and Artorias of the Abyss himself.
*   **Online Arenas:** Test your skills in a dedicated PVP arena with quick matchmaking for 1v1, 2v2, and 4-player battle royale modes.
*   **New Environments:** Explore distinct new areas such as Oolacile Township, Oolacile Sanctuary, Royal Wood, and the Battle of Stoicism, a training ground for online combat.
*   **Fresh Enemies:** Encounter a variety of new threats, from Wooden Scarecrows and Chained Prisoners to Stone Knights.
*   **New Characters:** Meet and interact with new NPCs like Hawkeye Gough and Elizabeth, the sanctuary's keeper.
*   **Acquire New Gear:** Discover and equip powerful new weapons and armor obtained from these new bosses, enemies, and characters.

### Core Dark Souls Experience

Developed by FromSoftware, the creators of Demon’s Souls, Dark Souls is an action role-playing game set in a grim fantasy universe. It retains the tense dungeon crawling, challenging combat, and unique online interactions that define the series. As a spiritual successor, it presents a new, despair-inducing world with a vast, vertically-oriented landscape. Players will navigate treacherous traps, face grotesque enemies, and battle formidable demons and dragons. Success in this unforgiving world is achieved by learning from every death.

The game's online features allow players to witness the spirits of others, learn from their mistakes, and even summon them for cooperative play or invade their worlds for player-versus-player battles. Bonfires act as vital checkpoints, restoring health and magic, but at the cost of respawning all enemies. The game promises extensive gameplay and a punishing difficulty, aiming to be one of the year's most challenging experiences.

### Key Features

*   **Unforgiving Difficulty:** The game is challenging yet rewarding, demanding strategic thinking to overcome seemingly impossible obstacles.
*   **Seamless World Design:** Explore an interconnected dark fantasy world where dungeons and areas flow into one another, emphasizing vertical exploration.
*   **Mastery and Progression:** With around 60 hours of gameplay, the game features nearly 100 unique monsters and deep RPG systems, including diverse weaponry, armor, miracles, and faith. Player success relies on mastering magic, armor, and weapon choices.
*   **Networked Play:** Engage in PVP invasions or team up for cooperative boss encounters.
*   **Flexible Character Building:** Carefully enhance character abilities to shape your unique playstyle.
*   **Player Community:** Observe and empathize with other players' journeys, learn from their failures, and leave messages to assist or deceive them.
*   **The Bonfire:** This symbolic beacon offers a brief respite of warmth and calm, serving as both a recovery point and a checkpoint in the dark world.

Name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
Description:
Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020. Affected Features: • The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War. • Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. • WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes 'Orc Hunter' and 'Gravewalker' will automatically be awarded to all players. Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

## Forge Your Legend in Destiny 2: A Guardian's Guide

Embark on an epic journey through the solar system in Destiny 2, a universe brimming with mystery and responsive first-person shooter combat. As a Guardian, you'll wield powerful elemental abilities and collect unique gear to customize your character's appearance and combat style. Immerse yourself in a cinematic story, tackle challenging cooperative missions, and compete in a variety of player-versus-player (PvP) modes, either solo or with friends. Download Destiny 2 for free and begin writing your legend among the stars.

You are a Guardian, humanity's last line of defense against a solar system besieged by formidable villains. Your mission is to gaze towards the heavens and stand firm against the encroaching darkness. As one player noted, "The weight of the solar system rests on our shoulders, and it's a burden we embrace." Your legend starts now.

Destiny 2 offers three distinct Guardian classes, each with unique strengths and playstyles:

*   **Titan:** Disciplined and proud, Titans excel in both aggressive offense and steadfast defense, capable of unleashing devastating attacks and providing protective shields.
*   **Warlock:** Warlocks harness arcane secrets to heal allies and obliterate enemies, raining destruction upon the battlefield.
*   **Hunter:** Agile and daring, Hunters are renowned for their quick reflexes and precise aim, striking from the shadows or moving swiftly through enemy ranks.

Destiny 2 thrives on both cooperative and competitive experiences. Engage with the narrative through story missions, quests, and patrols. Assemble a fireteam for quick Strikes or test your mettle in challenging Raids. Compete against other players in high-octane skirmishes, team-based arena battles, and hybrid PvE/PvP competitions, with special events like Iron Banner offering exclusive rewards.

With thousands of weapons and millions of gear combinations, Destiny 2 empowers you to discover new equipment and forge your own distinct personal style. The pursuit of the perfect arsenal is a core element of the game, offering a deep layer of customization and progression.

Name: Skullgirls 2nd Encore
Description:
Skullgirls 2nd Encore is a beautiful, fast-paced, and critically acclaimed 2D fighting game that puts players in control of fierce warriors in an extraordinary Dark Deco world. Each of the 14 wildly original characters features unique gameplay mechanics and plenty of personality. Skullgirls is the perfect fighting game for casual and competitive fighting game fans alike. Includes fully voiced story mode, gorgeous animation, and a soundtrack by Michiru Yamane.

Blasphemous 2 continues the harrowing saga of The Penitent One, picking up directly after the events of the Wounds of Eventide DLC. In that expansion, the ominous Heart in the sky signaled the return of The Miracle and prophesied the birth of a new child. Now, awakened in an unfamiliar realm, The Penitent One is once again plunged into the cycle of existence, mortality, and rebirth. His only recourse is to navigate this treacherous new landscape and unearth its long-concealed mysteries.

The path forward is fraught with peril, as legions of grotesque adversaries and towering bosses await. Overcoming these challenges demands considerable skill and strategic prowess. Fortunately, Blasphemous 2 provides enhanced opportunities to personalize and augment your abilities. The introduction of several distinct new weapons, wielded with conviction, brings the prospect of victory within reach. Ultimately, one truth remains immutable: Penance Never Ends.

Upon awakening in this strange new land, your journey commences amidst captivatingly macabre environments. These landscapes exude a potent Gothic charm, yet are also riddled with unforgiving traps. The manner in which you traverse this labyrinthine world is entirely at your discretion; there are no incorrect paths, only scores to be settled.

The Penitent One exhibits no leniency in his pursuit of atonement. A suite of new weaponry introduces novel maneuvers, brutal finishing moves, and expanded combo chains, ensuring destruction befalls any who dare impede his progress. Players can customize and enhance their fundamental skill set, complemented by the acquisition of unique new weapons designed to unleash devastating assaults.

A multitude of monstrous adversaries stand between you and your ultimate objective. These formidable bosses, each possessing unique attack patterns and devastating abilities, will rigorously test your mettle. An entirely new world beckons, populated by intriguing new non-player characters. Some will offer assistance, others will solicit your aid, and some will dispatch you on perilous missions. With an abundance of content to discover, the narratives and lore you encounter will prove instrumental in unraveling the game's myriad secrets, thereby deepening your comprehension of this peculiar new world.

Name: Rock of Ages
Description:
A rock-solid combination of rock-rolling action, deep strategy, and captivating art and music from different ages of history, this is a game of crush or be crushed! Two castles stand opposed; one is yours, the other is your enemy’s. They're a jerk and their castle sucks, so you’re going to try to smash it using an enormous boulder. Even as they build up their defenses, you're ready to roll over them in order to raze that unsightly tower. But beware! There’s a giant boulder headed your way, too. Key Features Brought to you by the insanely creative minds of ACE Team, makers of Zeno Clash! Take control of a giant boulder and crush your enemies! Use an amazing variety of units to defend your tower and knock your enemy off course. Bring your fight to both online and offline multiplayer! 3 different modes: War, Time Trial, and SkeeBoulder. 5 rich, historic periods of art and music create a gaming atmosphere unlike any other. FREE Original Soundtrack included with the game download.

Name: Galactic Bowling
Description:
Galactic Bowling is an exaggerated and stylized bowling game with an intergalactic twist. Players will engage in fast-paced single and multi-player competition while being submerged in a unique new universe filled with over-the-top humor, wild characters, unique levels, and addictive game play. The title is aimed at players of all ages and skill sets. Through accessible and intuitive controls and game-play, Galactic Bowling allows you to jump right into the action. A single-player campaign and online play allow you to work your way up the ranks of the Galactic Bowling League! Whether you have hours to play or only a few minutes, Galactic Bowling is a fast paced and entertaining experience that will leave you wanting more! Full Single-player story campaign including 11 Characters and Environments. 2 Single-player play modes including Regular and Battle Modes. Head to Head Online Multiplayer play Modes. Super Powers, Special Balls, and Whammies. Unlockable Characters, Environments, and Minigames. Unlock all 30 Steam Achievements!

Name: Alley Cat Bowling
Description:
Alley Cat Bowling is a crowd-play game designed around the classic ten pin bowling experience. Twitch streamers share the gameplay with their followers, interacting through chat and video. This is a gaming collision of bowling alleys and bowling balls and social video streaming at its finest, with a growing collection of playable bowling balls and bowling alleys. ****Twitch interactive game and twitch is required to play the game****

Name: VR Mini Bowling 2
Description:
VR Mini Bowling returns in this new and improved installment! VR Mini Bowling 2 brings the addition of Powerups, which completely change the way the game is played in this cross between bowling and mini golf! Please Note: If you already own VR Mini Bowling 1, you can use the 'Mini Bowling Upgrade Bundle' to buy VRMB2 at a lower price. If you do not yet own VRMB1, then I only recommend buying VRMB2 as it contains everything that VRMB1 has, plus more! Key Features: Bowling Ball Powerups (Split Ball, Big Ball, Orbit Ball, Fast Ball) 5 scoring modes 5 courses with 10 unique lanes each (including 3 re-imagined legacy courses) Traditional bowling lanes with realistic physics (spin, oil patterns)! Local Multiplayer 24 different bowling balls to choose from (16 unlockable) Personal best statistics for each lane and scoring mode Customizable Sound Effects Adjustable Throw Force Multiplier Global Leaderboards for each scoring mode on each course Improvements: Automatically pick up the ball by pressing the trigger. You no longer have to reach out and grab it (you still can if you want to though...) Re-imagined environments with improved visuals Simplified lobby for easier navigation and multiplayer selection When playing multiplayer, you can now switch players whenever you want. Each player can play thru all lanes at once, switch every 1 lane, every 3 lanes, etc. Multiplayer scoreboards available on all lanes Standard Mode: The newest game mode! Use powerups to boost your game and try to get the highest score possible! No Powerups Mode: Normal bowling rules apply, and no powerups are available. Try to get the highest score possible! Stroke Play Mode: This mode will put your skills to the test! Use powerups to you help knock down all of the pins in as few throws as possible. Rush Play Mode: Speed is the key in this mode. Knock down all of the pins as quickly as possible! You get unlimited throws in this mode so fire away! Normal Bowling Mode: Feel like changing it up and playing a regular game of bowling? You can! Play with or without Powerups, try Active Spin mode (you change the spin on the ball as it goes down the lane) and even change the oil pattern on the lane!

Name: Bomb Bowling 2
Description:
Bomb Bowling 2 is an indie puzzle game with physics. Knock the pins off the screen using explosions. Keep track of what is happening and then select the moment for the accurate click. The sequel of the Bomb Bowling. 50 levels with new contents. Hone your skills before a new challenges!

## Date Night Bowling: A Unique Romantic Gaming Experience

Seeking an innovative and engaging way to deepen your connection with your partner? Date Night Bowling reimagines a beloved classic, transforming it into a distinctive romantic gaming experience. This arcade-style bowling simulation artfully merges lighthearted competition with ample opportunities for meaningful interaction, all designed to help you impress your date and nurture a stronger bond.

The game provides a highly adaptable structure for your romantic rendezvous. Within Date Night Bowling, players can meticulously customize their avatars from a diverse array of options, each endowed with unique personalities that can ignite engaging chemistry between partners. Furthermore, the game offers considerable flexibility in defining your preferred play style. Options range from a tranquil solo adventure, to partnering with an AI for practice sessions, or diving into a local two-player competitive showdown. To ensure an enjoyable and balanced experience, you can also precisely adjust the game's difficulty by modifying settings such as ball weight and lane conditions, tailoring them to your respective skill levels.

Beyond its engaging bowling mechanics, Date Night Bowling is intentionally crafted to cultivate a rich and romantic ambiance. Throughout your shared gaming session, the experience actively encourages you to showcase your individual personalities, participate in lighthearted exchanges such as sharing jokes and offering encouraging gestures, and even win tokens of affection from an in-game claw machine. The acquisition of a delightful toy or a thoughtful present is presented as a tangible method to impress your date and forge a memorable moment, as highlighted by the game's creators. The game features two distinct bowling alleys, each meticulously designed with a captivating late-night atmosphere and a mood-enhancing soundtrack. The ultimate objective is to ensure your partner feels thoroughly happy and entertained. Successfully navigating these romantic elements can effectively pave the way for a highly anticipated second date! Therefore, prepare your beverage of choice, don your most comfortable footwear, and embark on an unforgettable romantic journey with Date Night Bowling.

Name: Premium Bowling
Description:
Premium Bowling is as close to real bowling as you'll get without picking up a physical bowling ball. Start the game and enjoy ten pin bowling right at home! Play multiplayer competitions, conquer daily and weekly top lists and work your way to the top in player ranking and bowling leagues. Main Features: Play in VR or with monitor The best bowling physics simulation Many gorgeous bowling alleys Many balls and a Ball Editor Daily and weekly tops Continuous week-to-week player ranking Weekly and monthly E-Sports style leagues Teams to play co-op Many oil patterns Oil gets carried and wears out Single player, local multiplayer and online multiplayer support Voice chat Commentator Music player Cross play

## Protoball: A Futuristic Sports Shooter

Protoball is a new sports shooter game set in 2113. It mixes fast-paced first-person and third-person shooting with athletic action. The game is moving to Unreal Engine 5, so its servers are offline for now. The team thanks the community for their help during EA/Alpha testing. This feedback has been vital for the game's upcoming Early Access launch.

### Core Gameplay

In Protoball, players move through arenas using athletic skills. The main goal is to get the Protoball into the opponent's goal.

Key movement skills include:

*   **Agile Movement:** Players can jump, slide, run, grind, and dash smoothly.

### Offense and Defense

The game gives players many tools for strategy.

Offensive and defensive options include:

*   **Ball Handling:** Players can pass, curve shots, use bounce shots, and fake out opponents.
*   **Combat:** Energy shield projectiles can stop opponents or block the Protoball.

### Player Skill and Future Plans

Winning in Protoball needs player skill and creativity. This allows for endless strategy. Besides the main sports mode, Protoball will add other modes like Dodgeball. More modes will be added and rotated over time.

### Customization and Community

Protoball is being built with lots of customization. The team plans to release cosmetic DLC and offer many player personalization choices. They have been adding customizable content since August 2021.

The goal is for Protoball to become a top eSport. It should be fun for both serious and casual players. The team values player input, believing that working together will help the game reach its full potential. Community ideas have already been added, as confirmed by OG Playtesters on Discord. Players can join the Discord server to help with development.

Name: Bolf
Description:
Bolf combines the long game strategy of golf with the pin smashing technique of bowling. Bolf's swing system is easy to get to grips with, but flexible enough to reward practice. Mouse motions are translated to your bolfer's swing, while manual control of your virtual grip allows you to open up a club face or dig in for a little back spin. As you play, you'll earn experience to improve your abilities and cash you can use to customize your bolfer's appearance. Hitting heavy bowling balls hundreds of yards down a fairway can be a surprisingly peaceful way to spend some time! You'll be treated to beautiful scenery and a relaxing atmosphere while you play.

Name: VR SUPER SPORTS
Description:
*This game is a full-body VR experience. Before playing make sure your surroundings are clear of all friends, furniture, children, spouses, cats, dogs, long-lost siblings, and important equipment entrusted to you by your clients. Choose from a variety of sports Bowling：Select from bowling balls that vary in weight, color and control; Bumper option for bowling beginners Homerun Derby：A great stress reliever and work out! Knock the ball out of the park and into the stars! Soccer：Defend your goal from multiple opponents. Beware of the gold ball... Basketball：Using a classic 3-point contest format, rack up your score in the given time limit. Hit the money ball shot for extra points of course! Japanese Archery：Kyudo. An ancient Japanese tradition. Hold your breath for maximum accuracy and aim for the bulls-eye. Clay Shooting：The classic Olympic sport now in VR! Test your shot as you aim for the flying clay pigeons. Easy to play but requires skill to master! Boxing：Defeat 3 different opponents by dodging, throwing body shots, and landing blows to the face! Shake the controllers to get up if you fall ;) Kart: A thrilling sensation of speed; With complete-control you feel as if you are actually on the track; Features Bad at sports? No problem. For all ages and skill levels. Gamers and families alike can get in on the casual fun. Each sport requires a different set of skills and utilizes completely different controls. With the ranking feature, you can compete with players all over the world to achieve the highest score. Realistic experience in each sport Be prepared for a workout!

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) is a thrilling, momentum-based platformer that challenges players to navigate minimalist landscapes, evade deadly robots, and collect gold. This title marks the return of the N series to PC after a 12-year hiatus, with the developers dedicating that time to perfecting the platforming experience. The core gameplay of N++ revolves around mastering momentum to conquer levels and achieve high scores.

In this sci-fi setting, players must outmaneuver a variety of inadvertently homicidal enemy robots. The game features meticulously hand-crafted levels, explicitly *not* procedurally generated, ensuring an intense platforming challenge. Players utilize fluid movement to "solve" each level and reach the exit.
